title: AI Editor
description:
HIRING: AI EDITOR



REMOTE /WFH - FLEXIBLE SCHEDULE - LONGTERM



We are looking for someone who has real experience training AI models. This job is for people who know how to train full AI models from the beginning, not just write prompts or create LoRAs.

How to Apply

title: Short-Term Ops & Quality Management
description:
**Part-Time Night Shift Operations & Quality Control SpecialistP | Remote**



**About Us**

We are a a fast-growing short-term rental property management company operating vacation properties across the Orlando/Disney corridor. We run a tight, high-performing team and hold ourselves to a high standard — for our guests, our owners, and each other. We're looking for someone who wants to grow with us, not just clock in and out.



**Role Overview**

This is not a passive monitoring role. You will own a critical slice of our operations — from the quality of every clean to the outcome of every guest issue that comes in during your shift. You'll exercise real judgment, represent our brand, and take initiative without being told. If you're looking for something to do on the side while working another job, this is not the right fit. We need your full attention and commitment.



**Hours:** Monday–Friday, 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM EST



---



**What You'll Own**



*Quality Control & Cleaner Management*



- Review post-clean photo submissions via Turno and make expert judgment calls on approval or rejection before every guest check-in

- Review, enforce, and continuously improve our cleaner checklists — you will own these documents

- Monitor cleaner ratings and deliver regular, specific feedback based on photos, guest reviews, and claims

- Place supply and maintenance orders as needed to keep properties guest-ready

- Identify patterns and proactively flag recurring issues before they escalate



*Claims & Owner Communication*



- File and manage guest damage claims from submission to resolution

- Track claim outcomes and notify property owners of successful results

- Share video walkthroughs and property updates with owners

- Request Google reviews from guests at the right 
nt

- Support ad-hoc projects as the business grows



*Night Shift Guest Operations*



- Own all guest communication during your shift — questions, emergencies, and last-minute issues

- Coordinate guard gate access and resolve entry issues in real time

- Escalate and document i
 appropriately



---



**Who You Are**



- **Already working in short-term rentals** — you know the platforms, the pace, and the problems that come up

- Extremely detail-oriented — you notice what others miss and you care about getting it right

- Strong sense of ownership — you don't wait to be told and you don't let things slip

- Curious and self-motivated — you actively look for ways to improve your work and the systems around you

- A clear, professional communicator in writing

- You want to grow within a company, not just fill a seat



**This Role Is Not For You If:**



- You don't have hands-on STR experience

- You are working or plan to work another job simultaneously

- You need someone to check on you to stay focused

- You're looking for something low-effort during quiet hours



---



**Requirements**



- Prior short-term rental experience (Airbnb, VRBO, 
, or property management company) — **required**

- Dual-monitor setup + laptop *(photo required with application)*

- Fast, reliable internet *(speed test screenshot required)*

- Typing test completed at 
 *(screenshot required)*

- Willingness to work under screen monitoring software during shift hours



---



**Schedule & Compensation**



- Part-time | Monday–Friday, 5:00 PM – 10:00 PM EST

- Fully remote

- Competitive hourly rate based on experience

- **Growth opportunity:** For the right person, there is real room to grow over time. Tea
mbers who demonstrate ownership, consistency, and curiosity will have the opportunity to expand into other areas of the business they're interested in.



---



**To Apply**

Please submit the following:



1. Resume or summary of relevant STR experience

2. Photo of your dual-monitor + laptop setup

3. Internet speed test screenshot from 

4. A few sentences on why this role interests you and what "ownership" means to you at work

title: Experienced Sales Virtual Assistant for MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD | Inbound Calls, Cold Calling, Outreach & Closing
description:
MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD is looking for a highly experienced Sales Virtual Assistant to join our growing company for the long term.



We are not looking for just another VA.



We are looking for someone confident, persuasive, professional, and hungry to grow with a company that is building something serious in the cleaning industry.



This role is for someone who is excellent on the phone, speaks very strong English, knows how to speak with leads professionally, can handle both inbound and outbound calls, and already has real experience working with a residential cleaning company, commercial cleaning company, or both.



You must be able to prove your experience.



We are building for the long term, and we want someone who is not just looking for a temporary job, but someone who wants to become part of a company with growth, stability, and ongoing opportunity.



Main Responsibilities

Answer inbound calls from potential clients

Make outbound calls and cold calls to generate new business

Follow up with leads quickly and consistently

Do client outreach in high volume

Speak confidently with potential clients and handle objections

Help convert leads into booked appointments or closed deals

Communicate professionally by phone, message, and

Keep lead information organized and updated

What We Are Looking For

Excellent spoken and written English

Strong confidence on calls

Proven experience in sales

Proven experience working for a residential cleaning company, commercial cleaning company, or both

Strong ability in cold calling and client follow-up

Experience with high-volume outreach

Ability to close deals

Persuasive, professional, and confident communication

Organized, reliable, and consistent work ethic

Important



You must be able to prove that you have already worked in this type of role.



Please do not apply if you do not have real experience in:



cleaning company sales

cold calling

client outreach

closing



We are only looking for someone who already understands this environment and can bring value from the beginning.



Why Join Us



MT Cleaning Services EMD LTD is a growing company with a long-term vision.



We are looking for the right person to grow with us as we expand. For the right candidate, this is an opportunity to build a stable long-term role inside a business that values strong performance, commitment, and results.



If you are ambitious, reliable, and know how to generate and close cleaning clients, this could become a very strong long-term opportunity for you.



To Apply



Start your application with: CLEANING SALES PRO



Then answer all of the following:



What cleaning companies have you worked for before?

Was your experience in residential cleaning, commercial cleaning, or both?

What exactly did you do in that role?

How much of your work involved inbound calls, outbound calls, and cold calling?

What results did you get?

How do you usually handle objections from potential clients?

What is your experience with high-volume outreach?

What is your experience with closing sales?

Please send proof of your previous experience in this industry

Please send a voice recording introducing yourself in English

Proof Required



Please send any of the following if available:



voice recording

screenshots

call recordings

CRM screenshots

references

proof of past work with a cleaning company



We are looking for someone strong, experienced, and ready to build something long term with us.

title: Route Mapping & Property Research Virtual Assistant
description:
We are a UK cleaning company looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help us build targeted residential walking routes for door hanger distribution.



You will use Google Maps, Google My Maps, Zoopla, and spreadsheets to identify high-value residential houses in the UK based on strict criteria.



Your Responsibilities:



Research UK residential areas using Google Maps and Zoopla

Identify houses worth £300,000+

Confirm properties have 3+ bedrooms

Exclude bungalows, flats, apartments, and inaccessible gated communities

Use Google My Maps to create tight circular walking routes

Add and organize 100–130 qualifying houses per route

Label areas, polygons, and route markers correctly

Update spreadsheets with route name, area, and number of houses mapped

Follow our SOP exactly without skipping checks



Requirements:



Strong experience with Google Maps and Google My Maps

Good research skills and attention to detail

Able to verify properties carefully before adding them

Comfortable using spreadsheets

Able to follow detailed instructions

Bonus if you have experience with Zoopla, Rightmove, UK property research, or route planning



Work Type:

Project-based / part-time



To Apply:

Start your application with the words: ROUTE MAP UK

Then answer these 4 questions:



What experience do you have with Google Maps, My Maps, or route planning?

Have you ever researched property data using Zoopla, Rightmove, or similar websites?

How do you make sure you do not include wrong houses by mistake?

Can you send a short sample or screenshot of similar research work you have done?

title: Ecommerce video editor
description:
Hey — I’m Karos. I’m 17, and I’m running a 7-figure e-commerce brand. This is not a corporate, LinkedIn-style job post. No fluff. No buzzwords. No BS. I’m looking for a full-time Video Editor who understands direct response and actually cares about performance. This is not a “just cut clips together” role. This is about making ads that perform.



I’m building fast and I’m obsessed with results. This is only the beginning. If you join now, you’re not just editing videos — you’re growing with me, long-term. This is NOT a short-term gig. It’s a chance to build something real together.



What you’ll be doing:

Editing direct-response video ads (Meta-focused)

Creating high-converting ads, not just aesthetic edits

Producing 3 hooks per video

Turning our raw ideas + strategy into scroll-stopping creatives

Using AI tools like ElevenLabs and AI Personas where it makes sense

Iterating based on performance data

Working directly with me — fast feedback, fast decisions

Helping push the brand from “doing well” to dominating



VERY Highly valued skill:

- AI: Experience with tools like HeyGen, Google Veo, Kling, Nano Banana

Candidates with this skill set will have a strong advantage.



Who I’m looking for:

You’ve edited direct-response ads for e-commerce brands

You understand performance, not just visuals

You have a STRONG EYE for details

You’re fast, disciplined, and competitive

You care about results and high standards

You want to work exclusively on one brand and help grow it

If you want something slow, safe, and corporate — this isn’t for you.



Compensation:

Full-time, remote role

Base salary depends on experience and skill

Performance-based bonuses tied directly to ad results

For strong performers, monthly bonuses can realistically reach around $1,000, depending on output and performance. There’s no fixed cap — results drive upside. If you make winning ads, you make more money. When the brand wins, you win.



The Big opportunity:

This starts as a Video Editor role, but there’s room to grow. If you consistently deliver, understand what’s working, and show good judgment over time, you can move into a better role with more responsibility and higher pay. I’m building brands for the long run and looking for people who want stability, ownership, and multi-year collaboration, not constant job hopping.



Application process (important):

To filter unserious applicants, start your message with:

 “I create high-converting creatives.”

Then include:

Your experience with video editing & direct response ads

Whether you have AI experience

Links to relevant e-commerce ad work (portfolio)

Your availability and start date

Why you want to work with us



If this resonates and you’d thrive in this environment, D
 and I’ll get back to you. 

Speak soon, Karos

title: Lawn Care Sales and Customer Service
description:
Job Title: Senior Customer Service & Inside Sales – Lawn Care (Work From Home – Philippines)

Company: Augusta Lawn Care & Snow Removal (Denver, USA)

Hours: 40 hours per week (US time – Denver, Colorado)

Pay: $1,500–$2,500 USD per month (depending on skill and experience) + performance bonus



~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

HOW TO APPLY

Complete a short video interview so we can hear your English and see how you communicate.

Copy and paste this link into your browser and complete the video interview:

hire.li/p5w5jGE82bs55J57Mqt79

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~



About Us

We are a growing lawn care and snow removal company based in Denver, Colorado, USA.



We provide:

Lawn mowing and lawn maintenance

Fertilization and weed control

Seasonal cleanups and snow removal

We serve busy homeowners and landlords who want a professional, reliable service.

We are a faith?based, values?driven company and care a lot about honesty, respect, and doing the job right.

We already work with tea
mbers in the Philippines and are now looking for experienced lawn care sales reps to join us long?term.



Your Role

This is a senior Customer Service & Inside Sales role. We are looking for someone who:

Speaks excellent English (clear, neutral accent)

Has proven experience selling lawn care services:

Lawn mowing / lawn maintenance

Fertilization and weed control

Other green industry or home services



Your main goals:

Respond fast to new leads and make a great first impression

Explain our services clearly and close new customers

Follow up on quotes until you get a clear “yes” or “no”

Upsell existing customers into packages and pre?pay offers



Daily Tasks

Call or text new leads within a few minutes during your shift

Ask questions to understand the property and what the customer needs

Send quotes using our templates and pricing

Follow up with people who received quotes but haven’t d
 yet

Call or text current customers about:

Adding fertilization/weed control

Moving from per?mow billing to seasonal/pre?pay

Seasonal cleanups or other add?ons

Handle basic customer service:

Schedule changes

Simple questions about services

Payment issues (failed cards, updating card on file)

Log every contact and outcome in our CRM

You will have scripts, training, and support, but we expect you to take ownership of your results.



Requirements

Must?haves:

Excellent spoken and written English

Clear, easy to understand on the phone

Neutral or very light accent



Proven experience in lawn care sales, such as:

-Selling lawn mowing / lawn maintenance

-Selling fertilization and weed control programs

-Working for a lawn care / landscaping company (sales or high?level CSR)



2+ years in:

Inside sales, outbound sales, or call center with closing responsibilities

Comfortable working with targets and KPIs (calls, quotes, revenue closed)

Can work US hours and some Saturdays (day/evening in Denver time)

Quiet home office, fast and stable internet, computer, and good headset

Looking for a full?time, long?term role (not freelance/part?time)



Nice to have:

Experience with CRMs, dialers, or helpdesk tools

Experience in other home services (pest control, HVAC, cleaning, etc.)



What We Offer

Full?time, 40 hours/week, work from home

Salary: $1,500–$2,500 USD/month depending on experience and skill

60?day trial period with training and clear targets

Performance bonuses for hitting/exceeding revenue goals

Raises and long?term stability for top performers

Work directly with the owner and US office manager – not a huge call center



~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

HOW TO APPLY

Complete a short video interview.

Copy and paste this link into your browser and complete the video interview:

hire.li/p5w5jGE82bs55J57Mqt79

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

title: PDF OCR & AI Text Extraction Specialist (Searchable PDFs +  AI)
description:
We are looking for a highly detail-oriented and reliable virtual assistant to take over our current PDF-to-Word conversion workflow.



**Main Focus:**  

The primary purpose of this role is to extract text from PDF documents and deliver it in clean Microsoft Word format so we can easily copy and paste the words into AI tools (such as Grok) whenever needed.



**Exact Daily Tasks:**

- Use any OCR software (Adobe Acrobat, ABBYY, PDFelement, or equivalent) to make PDF documents fully searchable and text-selectable.

- Split the searchable PDFs into small batches of pages.

- Upload each batch to Grok AI (or any AI program) and request text extraction while preserving the original formatting, line spacing, line breaks, and layout.

- Copy the extracted text exactly as Grok returns it (including page labels like **PAGE X**, separators, and structure).

- Paste the final text into a clean Microsoft Word (.docx) document.

- Ensure 100?curacy — no words can be missed or changed. These are important court/legal documents.



**Requirements:**

- Experience using OCR software to convert scanned/image PDFs into fully searchable PDFs.

- Comfortable working with Grok AI (or similar AI chat tools) and following very specific formatting instructions.

- Extremely careful and patient with repetitive, high-accuracy work.

- Able to deliver clean, perfectly formatted Word files every time that are ready for easy copy-paste into AI.



This is precise, detail-heavy work. Speed is good, but **accuracy is critical** — we cannot have any missing or altered text.



If you are detail-obsessed and can follow instructions exactly, this is a great long-term position.

title: Virtual Assistant – Business Development & Admin | UK Maintenance Contractor
description:
About Us

We are a UK-based maintenance contracting company, CIS-registered and 3 years in operation. We deliver reactive maintenance, planned works, and void property contracts for major infrastructure and housing clients across the UK. We are growing steadily and looking for the right person to grow with us long-term.



The Role

We need a proactive VA to manage our contract application and registration pipeline — ensuring we are registered on the right portals and submitting quality applications for new work opportunities.

Your core responsibilities will include:

 • Researching contract and tender opportunities on UK procurement portals (e.g. Find a Tender, Proactis, In-Tend, Coupa)

 • Completing company registrations and PQQs on contractor and client portals

 • Submitting tender applications for reactive maintenance, planned, and void works

 • Tracking submission deadlines, portal statuses, and follow-ups

 • General admin support as required



What We’re Looking For

 • Background in admin for a construction, maintenance, or facilities management company is highly desirable — understanding the industry language and workflow will make you effective from day one

 • Familiarity with UK procurement, social housing, or local authority clients is a strong bonus

 • Excellent written English — you will be representing us in formal applications

 • Highly organised, self-sufficient, and deadline-driven

 • Prior VA or business development admin experience preferred



Why Join Us?

? Established and actively growing maintenance contractor

? Long-term opportunity — we want someone who builds with us

? Flexible remote role with direct access to the business owner

? Varied work across admin, business development, and operations



To Apply

Send your CV and a brief cover note (3–5 sentences) highlighting any experience in construction, maintenance, or facilities management admin, and any familiarity with UK procurement portals.

title: VIRAL REELS CREATOR FOR MEN’S AESTHETIC BRAND
description:
Part-Time | Remote | Fixed + Bonus Pay



---



WHAT WE DO



We run a men’s fashion brand called MECENAS. Our target customer is an ambitious man aged 21–30 who is into old money style, surfing, classic cars, stoic philosophy, and living well. 



---



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Your only job is to post 2 Reels per day on our Instagram.



To do this, you will:



1. Search TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube for videos that are already viral and match our brand vibe

2. Re-use that footage or remix it slightly to fit our brand

3. Add our brand’s philosophy text, quotes, or voiceovers when needed

4. Also use footage from our own brand photoshoots (we will provide these)

5. Post 2 finished Reels every single day



You do NOT need to film anything yourself. You do NOT need to create everything from scratch. Most of the time you are finding content that already went viral for someone else and adapting it slightly for us.



---



WHAT KINDS OF VIDEOS TO MAKE



All videos must feel relevant to this type of man:



- Clips from movies like Peaky Blinders, American Psycho, The Godfather, James Bond

- Lifestyle content: classic cars, surfing, nice watches, coffee, suits, travel

- Motivational or stoic quotes with cinematic backgrounds

- Voiceover videos about discipline, ambition, success, style

- Men’s fashion and style clips

- Any viral content that a stylish, ambitious 25-year-old man would stop and watch



IMPORTANT: Do not post content about gym motivation, nightclubs, flashy cars, loud music, or anything that looks cheap or loud. Our brand is quiet, elegant, and classy.



---



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR



- You have experience creating or repurposing Reels or TikTok videos

- You know how to use CapCut or similar editing app

- You understand what makes a video go viral

- You are consistent and reliable — 2 posts per day, every day, no excuses

- You have good English for captions and text overlays

- You understand men’s lifestyle content (not required to be an expert, but needs to “get it”)



---



PAY



- Fixed base pay every month (discuss in application)

- Bonus payment for every Reel that reaches over 100,000 views

- The more videos go viral, the more you earn



---



HOW TO APPLY



Send us:

1. 3 examples of Reels or TikToks you have made or remixed (links are fine)

2. One sentence explaining why you understand our brand audience

3. Confirm you can post 2 Reels per day consistently



Applications without examples will not be considered.

title: Systems Administrator
description:
Location: Fully Remote (Ph)

Schedule: Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST (with flexibility as needed for client impact events)



About T3 Tech Partners



T3 Tech Partners is the team MSPs rely on when challenges exceed Tier 2 or internal expertise. We operate as a Fractional Tier 3 partner, delivering advanced Microsoft 365, cloud, and security expertise to MSPs supporting diverse client environments.

Our engineers are trusted technical partners — leading implementations, resolving complex escalations, and working directly with MSP clients to execute real-world solutions.

________________________________________

Role Overview

We are seeking a senior-level Cloud Solutions Engineer (Level 3) to lead advanced Microsoft 365 and cloud initiatives, handle complex escalations, and implement solutions directly with MSP clients. This is a technical, customer-facing role — while not sales-focused, you will regularly work directly with customers to design and implement the solutions required to meet their business and technical needs.

This role requires strong technical depth, independence, and the ability to step into unfamiliar environments and software ecosystems with confidence.

________________________________________

Key Responsibilities

Advanced Cloud & Escalation Support

• Handle advanced and expert-level escalations related to cloud infrastructure and SaaS services.

• Serve as a senior escalation point for Microsoft 365 and cloud-related issues across multiple MSP environments.

• Perform root-cause analysis and implement long-term remediation for complex or recurring issues.

• Work directly with MSP clients and end customers to execute solutions and improvements.



Microsoft 365 (Core Focus Area)

• Architect, deploy, optimize, and support Microsoft 365 environments end-to-end, including:

o Exchange Online (mail flow, security, migrations, troubleshooting)

o SharePoint Online and OneDrive (architecture, permissions, governance, performance, migrations)

o Microsoft Teams (policies, governance, troubleshooting)

• Perform and lead tenant-to-tenant migrations, including
, OneDrive, SharePoint, and Teams data.

• Execute server-to-cloud migrations, such as file servers to SharePoint or OneDrive.

• Expert-level administration and troubleshooting of:

o Microsoft Intune (endpoint management, compliance policies, configuration profiles, application deployment, Autopilot)

o Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) including identity lifecycle, SSO, MFA, and hybrid identity

o Conditional Access policy design and enforcement

o Microsoft Defender (Endpoint, Office 365, Identity)

o Microsoft Purview (data governance, retention, compliance, DLP)

• Implement and maintain Microsoft 365 security best practices across client tenants.

• Assist MSPs with tenant configuration, licensing strategy, and feature utilization.



Third-Party Application Integration

• Work with third-party software applications that integrate with Microsoft 365 
, identity, security, document management, line-of-business platforms).

• Support applications you may not have prior experience with, requiring:

o Willingness to learn new platforms quickly

o Ability to understand how third-party systems interact with Microsoft 365

o Troubleshooting authentication, permissions, data flow, and integration issues

• Collaborate with vendors and MSPs to ensure proper configuration and supportability.



Server and Infrastructure Support

• Administer and troubleshoot Windows Server environments, including Active Directory, DNS, DHCP, Group Policy, and File Services.

• Manage and support virtualization platforms (e.g., Hyper-V, VMware) in on-premises and hybrid configurations.

• Perform server migrations, including lift-and-shift to Azure, P2V conversions, and workload transitions to cloud-hosted services.

• Support and maintain backup and disaster recovery solutions, ensuring recoverability for both on-premises and cloud workloads.

• Assist with decommissioning legacy on-premises infrastructure as part of cloud migration projects.



Projects, Optimization & Automation

• Lead cloud migration and optimization projects for MSP clients.

• Optimize Microsoft 365 environments for security, performance, and cost efficiency.

• Develop and maintain PowerShell scripts to automate Microsoft 365, Entra ID, Intune, and related administrative tasks.

• Recommend improvements, standards, and long-term strategies to MSP partners.

• Stay current on Microsoft 365 feature changes and emerging cloud technologies.

Availability & Support Expectations

• Standard working hours are 9:00 AM–5:00 PM EST.

• Some flexibility is required for high-impact client issues, critical changes, or migrations outside normal hours.

• This role is not on-call, but responsiveness during critical events is expected.

________________________________________

Qualifications

Required Experience

• 5+ years of hands-on experience with cloud solutions in an MSP or multi-tenant environment.

• Expert-level proficiency in:

o Microsoft 365 (all major workloads and admin portals)

o Microsoft Intune

o Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD)

o Conditional Access and MFA

o Microsoft Defender and Purview

• Strong experience with:

o Tenant-to-tenant Microsoft 365 migrations

o Server-to-cloud migrations (e.g., file servers to SharePoint/OneDrive)

o
 and data migrations

• Required experience with PowerShell for administration and automation.

• Experience with Google Workspace and cross-platform migrations.

• Expert-level understanding of SaaS security and cloud cost optimization.

• General knowledge of infrastructure and networking concepts.

• Proven experience working in MSP environments (required).

• Excellent native-level English communication skills, both written and verbal.

title: Content Coordinator
description:
JOB ANNOUNCEMENT



Advance Chiropractic and Performance



My name is Dr. Derek Huddleston. I’m a Chiropractic Sports Physician and I own a high-value, concierge, movement based wellness clinic called Advance Chiropractic and Performance. My mission is to keep 100,000 people out of surgery in Central Arkansas. In order to do that, I need help in building a solid marketing approach. My small team is looking for an A player for the Content Coordinator role! 



I need you to edit and schedule social content and help me develop a repeatable content execution system!



At its core, this is not a strategy role.  I’ll handle messaging direction but I want and need your input. Your job is to take what we discuss, ask questions for clarity and get it done.



READ THIS. IT MAY SAVE BOTH OF US TIME.



If your natural style is very cautious, slow to act, or requires a high level of structure before starting, this position will be frustrating for you.  If you’re someone who gets things done without making it complicated, this will be a good fit. 



If you’ve taken a DiSC assessment, include your results in your application.



This position requires someone who naturally moves fast, takes action, and adjusts as they go (typically Influence or Dominance styles).



If your
/application reads like it was written by AI, it will not be considered.



Application Process



Step 1:

Do not reply on onlinejobs.ph 

Check out the job announcement below

Step 2: You’ll receive the job description with steps to follow

Step 3: Test task w/ time limit



What you’ll do

Help me organize and execute a social content strategy, which includes a content pillar

Edit content using Edits and Instagram tools

Use Meta to schedule and manage content

Use AI tools for generating captivating social content and
s in my voice from a custom bot

Help launch content campaigns 
s, social, in-office)

Track your numbers associated with engaging content

Track your numbers associated with your Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

Added bonus if you can use Canva to help re-brand PDFs and Lead Magnets



What success looks like

Content goes out on time with minimal touchpoints

We develop an organized way to streamline transfer of content and messaging 

We get more booked calls from people engaging with the content

You know the numbers associated with engaging content



What it’s like working with me

I move fast, I think out loud, I will change direction when needed

I don’t micromanage. If I trust you, I expect you to handle your role

I’m not going to hand you everything perfectly organized. We will need to talk through the process until we find a good solution

You’ll need to think a little and figure things out

If you need constant direction or slow pace, this won’t work

If you like moving and getting things done, you’ll be fine

I care about execution, not titles

At some point, you will be asked to do things outside of your job description. If you’re not okay with that, do not apply.



I’m looking for someone who

Moves fast and takes action without overthinking

Operates without needing constant direction

Asks clarifying questions, then executes

Looks for answers on their own

Communicates clearly and directly

Takes ownership of outcomes

Works hard and stays humble

Collaborates well within a team

Understands how to represent a high-value service

Has high English proficiency



This is NOT for you if

You need perfect instructions before starting

You overthink everything

You argue instead of trying to understand

You rely on credentials instead of results

You move slow because you want everything perfect



Tools you’ll use

GHL

Instagram / Meta

Edits

Canva

ChatGPT



Requirements

Must overlap with United States, Central Standard Time (CST)

English must be strong (written and verbal)

Go High Level experience at the level of being able to create and schedule
 campaigns.



If you’ve read through this and think you’d be a great Content Coordinator for our specific needs, please fill out this form and you’ll get the job description with more instructions.

title: Senior Business Analyst
description:
Senior Business Analyst

Indigenous Wealth

Remote (Philippines-based)

Business/Systems Analysts

Full time (Contract)



About the Role

* This is one of the most important hires we'll make this year. You'll report directly to the COO and work across the full breadth of the business, not in a silo.

* Indigenous Wealth is an Australian property investment consultancy that educates, empowers, and equips Indigenous Australians to build generational wealth through property investment. We're growing, and we need a Senior BA who can build the operational backbone to scale nationally.

* Our strategic framework is built on three pillars: Capability (can we deliver?), Growth (is it working commercially?), and Impact (are clients better off?). Your job is to make sure we can measure, track, and improve against all three, and that the processes, systems, and data underneath them actually work.

* This isn't a role where you write requirements documents and hand them off. You'll design first, then build, test, and implement, taking solutions from whiteboard through to working reality. You'll own things, shape how the business operates, and see the direct impact of your work every day.



What You'll Do

* Map and improve end-to-end business processes across every function (client engagement, relationships, property, contracts, settlement) so nothing falls through the cracks

* Design how work flows through each process, assess what applications are needed at each stage, and recommend whether additional workflow or document management systems are required

* Map the data the business needs across all its processes and ensure it is clean, connected, and trustworthy

* Evaluate, recommend, and build the dashboards and reporting that give leadership real-time visibility across our Capability, Growth, and Impact metrics

* Build and own company policies, procedures, and SOPs from the ground up

* Administer and optimise HubSpot CRM: workflows, automations, pipelines, and data quality. HubSpot is a core system in the business, so strong knowledge here means you add value from day one

* Design, build, and maintain an Intranet (SharePoint or equivalent) as the team's single source of truth, including document storage

*Act as the key internal contact for all technology and IT support matters, working with external vendors and help desks to resolve issues so the rest of the team can stay focused on their roles

* Work directly with the COO to continuously improve how the business operates



What You Bring

- Every item below matters. In your cover letter, address each one with a real example or honest reflection, not a generic sentence.

* Exceptionally capable and naturally humble. No ego. You let your work speak for itself.

* 4-6 years in business analysis or a similar role where you wore multiple hats. You've been resourceful, not just followed a playbook.

* Strong HubSpot CRM experience. You've built workflows, automations, dashboards, and reporting, not just used someone else's setup.

* Ability to evaluate dashboard and reporting tools and build within them, not just read what someone else has created.

* Ability to design, build, and maintain an Intranet (SharePoint or equivalent), including document storage.

* A track record of building processes and policies from scratch, in a business that didn't have them yet.

* Sharp analytical mind with communication skills to match. You see patterns, solve problems, and explain what you found clearly.

* Excellent written and spoken English. You'll communicate daily with senior leadership in Australia and need to be clear, concise, and confident.

* High professionalism. You'll work with the COO and the Founder, and you need to hold your own.

* Self-driven. You see gaps, flag them, and fix them without being told.



Nice to Have

* Don't tick every box? If you're sharp, curious, and back yourself, we still want to hear from you. Experience in property, financial services, or consulting is a plus. So is familiarity with tools like Xero, 
, Loom, or DocuSign. Experience working with Australian businesses is a bonus but not a requirement. Qualifications are a bonus, not a barrier.



Our Values

* These aren't words on a wall. They guide how we work and who we hire: Connection (lasting relationships), Integrity (clients' best interests, always), Accountability (do what we say), Action (do the work, not just talk about it), and Excellence (quality in everything).



Why This Role?

* You'll report directly to the COO. You'll have genuine influence. The environment is professional but not stuffy. We move fast, back each other, and don't hide behind corporate jargon. If you want a role where your work actually matters, this is it.

* This is a contract role, but you'll be treated as a core member of the team. Competitive salary commensurate with experience. Working hours: 8:00 AM to 4:00 PM Manila Time (10:00 AM to 6:00 PM AEST). Flexibility to occasionally extend beyond core hours when the business needs it is appreciated.



How to Apply

** Submit your CV, a Cover Letter, and a short video introduction.

**Your cover letter is how we d
 who to interview. In it, specifically address:

   - Each item in "What You Bring" with real examples, not generic claims

   - How you approach your work across different levels, from surface-level reporting through to underlying data quality and process design

   - Describe your remote work setup, including how you ensure reliable connectivity and availability during Australian business hours



**Video: Record a 2-3 minute video (Loom or similar) introducing yourself and explaining why this role interests you.



Generic applications that don't address the above will not be considered.

title: Short From Video Editor $12/ Reel
description:
Hey, I'm Callum — a 19-year-old creator and marketer building a personal brand around My life, marketing, and AI 



I'm hiring a short-form video editor for my personal brand content, with real potential to grow into additional work across my agency's clients (we have ongoing short-form + long-form needs).



What you'll be editing:

* 40–70 second talking-head reels (me to camera)

* Clean, smooth, caption-driven edits

* Simple b-roll / image overlays to visualize what I'm explaining

* Focus is clarity and flow — NOT flashy effects, crazy zooms, or editing for editing's sake

* The edit should make the message easier to follow, not distract from it



If you're the kind of editor who adds a whoosh and a shake to every cut, this role isn't for you. I want someone who understands less is more when the content itself carries the weight.



Compensation:

* $12 USD per finished reel, paid via EasyPay every 2 weeks

* Onboarding (first 2 weeks): 5 reels/week at $12/reel (~$120 total). This is a paid trial where we align on style, workflow, and feedback.

* Ongoing (week 3+): 10 reels/week at $12/reel (~$516/month)

* Scale path: If the work is consistently great, i can eventually happily bump to $15/reel and open up additional workload from my agency's clients. I'm not trying to find the cheapest editor — I want someone who's actually good at this and wants to keep getting better. Pay will reflect that.



Why this role is different:

* You work directly with me — no project managers, no agency middle layer

* I'll give you detailed feedback in the first two weeks so we lock in the style fast. I'd rather over-communicate early than have you guessing.

* Multiple income streams over time (personal brand + agency clients)

* Fast, reliable payment via EasyPay.

* Im not looking for cheap editing, im looking for a tea
mber.



What I'm looking for:





* Portfolio with 3+ short-form examples in a similar style (clean, caption-driven, b-roll overlays)

* Fast turnaround — 24–48 hours per reel

* Clear, responsive communication (Good English)

* Willingness to do a paid test reel ($15 one-time) before the 2-week trial, so we both know if we're a fit



What I provide:

* Raw talking-head footage (usually shot vertical)

* A script or bullet-point notes for each reel

* 3–5 reference reels I love so you can see the target style

* Detailed feedback, especially early on

* Consistent pipeline — no weeks of silence then a flood of work



How to apply:

1. Send your portfolio — specific reel links, not just a website

2. Tell me what editing software you use

3. Your weekly availability and typical turnaround time

4. Include the phrase “pura vida" at the top of your message so I know you read the full post

5. (Optional) One sentence on why this role interests you



Applications without a portfolio or the keyword will be ignored. I get a lot of applicants and I need a way to filter for people who actually read.



Looking forward to finding the right person. Let's build something long-term.

— Callum

title: Experienced Amazon UK Admin / Operations VA (Seller ToolKit + Returns + Reimbursements)

Please Read Carefully Before Applying

This is not a beginner role.



We are looking for someone who has already worked inside a real Amazon UK business and understands how to manage the day-to-day admin and operational tasks that keep the business performing.



If you are detail-oriented, proactive, reliable, and take pride in doing excellent work — please continue reading.



?



About the Role

?



Key Responsibilities

 & Admin Management

s

s correctly

 • identifying operational issues



9) Process Improvement / Innovation

 • Suggest improvements to systems and workflows

 • Identify inefficiencies and propose better ways of working

 • Help make the business more organised, scalable, and efficient

 • Think like an operator, not just a task-taker



?



What We Are Looking For



We are specifically looking for someone who has real experience in the following areas:

 • Amazon UK FBA admin / operations experience

 • Seller ToolKit (STK) experience

 • Returns handling experience

 • Prep centre coordination experience

 • Invoice management

 • Spreadsheet / tracker management

 • Sourcing cost / cost price updates

This role is best suited to someone who has worked in a serious Amazon UK operation before and understands the importance of accuracy, organisation, and proactive problem-solving.



?



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

?



Who Will Excel in This Role

?



Why Join Us

?



How to Apply

 • Seller ToolKit

 • Prep centre coordination

 • Invoice management

 • Inventory adjustments

 • Reimbursements



5. Answer this question:



If inventory is missing, damaged, or adjusted incorrectly in Amazon, how would you identify whether it may be eligible for reimbursement, and what steps would you take next?

?



Final Note



We are only looking for experienced professionals who take pride in their work.



If you are a beginner, this role is not for you.



If you are highly capable, proactive, and want to grow long-term with a serious Amazon UK business — we would love to hear from you.

title: Paralegal/Attorney – Criminal Defense
description:
Position Overview:

We are seeking a skilled and detail-oriented Paralegal or Attorney to support our criminal defense practice. This role requires in-depth knowledge of criminal law, including motion preparation, legal research, and document management. The ideal candidate will be responsible for preparing motions, drafting legal documents, and ensuring compliance with legal procedures. They will work closely with attorneys to ensure the defense strategy is executed effectively, and help prepare cases for court. This is a remote position requiring exceptional written English, organizational skills, and a strong grasp of U.S. criminal law procedures fundamentals.



Key Responsibilities:



• Draft, review, and be prepared to file various legal documents including motions, briefs, and memoranda.

• Prepare appendices for motions, including organizing exhibits, declarations, and supporting documentation.

• Prepare the table of contents for legal filings, ensuring accuracy and compliance with court rules.

• Conduct in-depth legal research on complex criminal law issues and generate a research summary for the attorney.

• Analyze discovery materials to identify critical issues and inconsistencies.

• Prepare memoranda and case summaries to aid in litigation strategy.

• Assist in the preparation of motions for hearings, trials, and appeals, including motions to suppress evidence, dismiss charges, or modify bail.

• Manage case files, ensuring all relevant documents and evidence are properly documented and stored.

• Prepare discovery responses, subpoenas, and other legal documents as directed.

• Coordinate with clients, witnesses, and experts to gather information and evidence for cases.

• Maintain communication with the court, opposing counsel, and clients regarding motions, hearings, and court dates.

• Provide support during trial preparation, including organizing exhibits, trial briefs, and witness lists.

• Ensure all legal documents comply with applicable state and federal rules and deadlines.



Qualifications:



• Must be a Graduate of a law school (JD).

• Proven experience in criminal defense law, specifically in motion practice.

• Strong knowledge of court rules, procedures, and legal writing standards.

• Experience preparing appendices, tables of contents, and organizing large case files.

• Excellent research, analytical, and writing skills.

• Must have strong knowledge of legal citation

• Ability to manage multiple cases and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

• Strong communication skills and attention to detail.

• Experience with legal research tools (e.g.,Lexis/Nexis and Westlaw) and document management software, such as Clio CRM software.



Preferred:



• Prior experience in criminal defense law or litigation.

• Knowledge of specific motions in criminal defense, including motions to suppress, dismiss, and motions for bond 

        reductions.

• Familiarity with Nevada local court rules and procedures in criminal defense.



Application Process:



Interested candidates should submit the following:

• An updated resume.

• A cover letter detailing your experience with U.S. criminal law and Clio software.

• Two writing samples (legal motions or briefs preferred) with how long it required the applicant to finalize the presented 

        document (in hours) from the time the assignment was given to the document presented.

title: Tableau Expert to make a free guide giveaway to beginners
description:
Freelance Designer & Tableau User — Create a Beginner-Friendly Tableau Cheat Sheet in Canva



About This Project

We are looking for a freelancer who knows Tableau and Canva to create a visually attractive, easy-to-read beginner's cheat sheet or mini-guide for Tableau. This will be a free PDF giveaway offered to people who respond to our Instagram ad promoting low-cost Tableau tutoring services.

This is not a textbook or a full manual. Think of it as a friendly, visual "first look" at Tableau — just enough to get a curious beginner excited and oriented. Something they can glance at and immediately feel less intimidated by the software.



What You Will Deliver

A multi-page cheat sheet or mini-guide (approximately 6–12 pages, though final length is flexible based on content flow).

Designed in Canva using a free Canva account (no premium/Pro elements) so that we can edit it later ourselves.

You will share the editable Canva project link with us upon completion — this is a hard requirement.

The guide must include your own original screenshots taken from Tableau Public (the free version). No stock images of Tableau, no screenshots copied from other websites or courses.

Final export as a high-quality PDF, ready to send digitally.

Requirements for Applicants

You must have working knowledge of Tableau. You will be taking your own screenshots and writing short descriptions, so you need to actually understand what you are showing.

You must have Tableau Public installed (or be willing to install it — it is free) to capture all screenshots yourself.

You must be comfortable with Canva and able to produce a polished, professional-looking document.

Good written English. The text will be short, but it must be clear, grammatically correct, and friendly in tone.

Ability to meet a deadline (we will agree on timeline after hiring).



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

A brief introduction about yourself.

Your experience with Tableau — tell us how you have used it (work, school, personal projects, etc.). If you have a Tableau Public profile, please share the link.

A sample of your Canva design work — this can be any document, infographic, or guide you have made. We want to see your design sense.

Your proposed timeline to complete this project.

Your rate for this project (fixed price).

Bonus (not required): If you have created educational content, cheat sheets, tutorials, or guides before, we would love to see examples.



Budget

This is a one-time, fixed-price project. Please quote your rate in your application. We are a small tutoring operation, so our budget is modest, but we pay fairly and promptly.



Why This Matters

This cheat sheet is the first thing a potential student will see from us. It needs to feel helpful, generous, and professional — the kind of freebie that makes someone think, "If the free guide is this good, the tutoring must be great."

If this project goes well, there may be future work creating similar guides for other tools.



We look forward to hearing from you!

   - Translate it into the target language (Portuguese)

   - Rebrand all product names, brand names and claims to my brand

   - Rebrand all product images to match our branding

4. You rebuild the page in Funnelish

  5. You apply my brand colors, fonts and logo throughout

6. You deliver a live preview link within 48 hours



Each funnel = 1 advertorial page + 1 product/order page.



---



WHAT I PROVIDE

---------------

- Competitor reference URLs for each funnel

- My brand name, logo, colors and product images

- Product details and any specific claims to include or avoid

- Fast feedback — I will review and approve within 24 hours



---



WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR

---------------------

? MUST HAVE Past Experience building advertorial-style pages (the "article that sells" format)

? Comfortable using AI tools to rewrite and translate copy

? MUST HAVE Experience with Funnelish

? Can match the look and feel of a reference page closely

? Reliable — available 7 days a week, responds within a few hours

? Fast — 48-hour turnaround per funnel is the expectation

? Good eye for design — pages must look professional and trustworthy



---



TO APPLY — ANSWER THESE 5 QUESTIONS

--------------------------------------

Applications without answers to all 5 questions will be ignored.



1. How long have you been using Funnelish?

2. Have you built advertorial/pre-lander pages before?

   Share 2 live examples or screenshots.

3. Have you used AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) for copywriting or

   translation?

4. Can you work 7 days a week and deliver within 48 hours per funnel?

5. Leave your number in this format +?6?3?1?2?3?4?5?6?7?8

---



RATE: $15 USD per complete funnel (advertorial + product page)

TYPE: Full-time ongoing, 7 days a week

HOURS: Flexible — async communication is fine, but fast responses expected

START: Immediately

title: Figma/Framer Parallax Web Designer
description:
I need someone to design an interactive web design as follows.





Deliverables

Full website design or front-end build

Responsive layouts for desktop, tablet, and mobile

Smooth parallax and scroll-based animations

No coding is required, just create it on FRAMER or WEBFLOW



If your portfolio don't have any parallax design, create one sample with watermark to be considered.

If not your application will be ignored.

title: Remote Appointment Setter
description:
If you enjoy talking to people, following a clear process, and being measured on your results, keep reading.



About us:

We’re Bulletproof Cycling. We coach cyclists 50+ to ride stronger for longer without wrecking their life. Clients are mostly successful professionals and retired entrepreneurs who take their goals seriously.



We’re now hiring Remote Appointment Setters to help us handle the volume of warm leads coming in. You do not have to generate your own leads. Your job is simple: talk to riders who already requested more information and book them into the next call.



What you’ll do

Speak to warm leads from our funnels (inbound leads, reactivation lists, and existing conversations).

Use proven scripts to start and continue conversations via
, and short calls.

Qualify interest and book appointments for our closer.

Follow up with riders who haven’t replied or haven’t booked yet.

Hit clear daily and weekly targets (conversations started, appointments booked, show rate).

Log activity and notes in our CRM so the closer has context.

You are not selling the full program. Your focus is high?quality appointments.



What we provide:

A steady flow of warm leads.

Scripts, objection handling, and conversation frameworks.

Training on our avatar (cyclists 50+) and our offer.

Regular coaching so you can improve your numbers.

A clear progression path for top performers.

Pay and progression



This role includes:

A fixed monthly amount plus

Additional pay that increases with your performance

Most new tea
mbers who meet target activity and quality metrics earn around $3000–$3500 per month once ramped. Strong performers who consistently exceed targets can earn more and may be considered for more senior roles over time.



Exact details of the structure, targets, and progression path are explained during the interview process.



You’re a fit if:

You can work UK evenings / business hours and be available for live conversations.

You like using scripts and can also adapt based on feedback.

You’re motivated by improving your numbers and seeing that reflected in your pay.

You have reliable internet, a working computer, a webcam, and a quiet place to work.

Requirements:



Strong written and spoken English.

Comfortable on Zoom and phone.

Able to work Mon–Sa, 9am –5pm UK



How to apply:


/t/6ni393yCWvus.

This is a short form where we ask about your experience, availability, and income expectations.

If it looks like a potential fit on paper, we’ll invite you to a live group interview on Wednesday at 7pm UK.

Top candidates from the group interview will be invited to a short 1:1 call and a paid trial period.

Job Type: Full-time



Work Location: Remote

title: Customer Service Specialist (E-commerce)
description:
We are looking for a sharp, fast, and detail-oriented Customer Service Specialist to join our growing e-commerce team.

This is not a beginner role — we only hire people who already understand how professional customer service works in e-commerce.



What you’ll do



- Handle daily customer support tickets via Reamaze

- Respond to customers using structured templates (and improve them where needed)

- Process refunds, resends, and order-related issues in Shopify

- Work efficiently under time pressure while maintaining accuracy

- Spot recurring problems and proactively suggest improvements



?? Working hours

- 2 hours per day

- Fixed schedule (you must clock in at the same time every day)

- Monday – Saturday



Compensation



$4.5 per hour

Long-term opportunity if performance is strong



Requirements (IMPORTANT)



- Proven experience in e-commerce customer service

- Experience with Reamaze (REQUIRED – applications without this will be rejected)

- Experience with Shopify

- Able to work with templates AND think independently

- Fast typing and quick decision-making

- High attention to detail (mistakes are not acceptable)

- Strong written English (clear, professional, no grammar mistakes)



 What we’re really looking for



We don’t want someone who just replies to tickets.

We want someone who:

- Thinks in solutions, not problems

- Works fast without losing quality

- Takes ownership

- Can handle pressure without getting sloppy

- Improves systems instead of blindly following them



 Do NOT apply if:



- You have no Reamaze experience

- You need constant supervision

- You work slowly or make frequent mistakes

- You copy-paste without understanding



How to apply (IMPORTANT FILTER)



To make sure you actually read this:

Start your application with:

 "I work fast and precise – ready to prove it."

Then include:

- Your Reamaze experience (specific examples)

- Your Shopify experience

- Your typing speed (WPM)

A short example of how you would handle this case:

 Customer received wrong size – what do you do?

Applications that do NOT follow this will be ignored.

title: Product Research, SEO Listings and  Customer Support on Vinted and Etsy ($180 per month)
description:
Do you want to work on a cool fashion and e-commerce project from home, with complete autonomy?

We are looking for a creative, resourceful, and curious person to help us find products and create perfect visuals for our Vinted store using AI.



Your (daily) missions:



Use Gemini AI to research trending fashion niches using our prompts.



Get inspired via Pinterest to understand the visual universe of these niches.



Find similar items on platforms like AliExpress, Temu, and Shein.



Generate realistic and stylish photos according to our methods (we will train you on this) using Gemini AI and ChatGPT.



What we expect from you:



To be autonomous and constantly improving.



To enjoy brainstorming, getting inspired, and immersing yourself in new niches to find the most suitable products.



To be meticulous regarding the quality of the generated photos.



No need to be a design expert: if you know how to use Gemini and have a fashion view on Shein, you already have a big advantage.



Compensation:



$180 per month (7 hours a day).



Paid time off.



Opportunities for growth and evolution.



Conditions:



100% Remote work.



Flexible working hours.



Complete training with ready-to-use processes upon your arrival.



How to apply:

Send a short message explaining:

(Send a cover letter through the platform)



Hello and welcome! My name is Kyoungbu Kang. This is my TikTok channel to understand what I do: 



To move forward, I'd like to invite you to a short test.



This task is designed to test your understanding, your ability to follow instructions, and how well you interpret style and detail — not just basic execution.



Here's the full step-by-step guide for the task (Google Doc):





Here's the video where I explain everything visually:





Important Notes:

– Don't worry if it's not perfect.

– What matters most is that you do your best, follow each step carefully, and show you understand what I'm really looking for.

– If you go a little further or improve a small part: that's a big plus



 About Gemini:

The image generation step requires Gemini with image access (ideally Gemini Pro).

If you don't have Pro, try with the free version — it usually works, but with limitations.

Please let me know right away if you can't generate images, so I can find a solution.



Once you've completed the task, please send everything in one
 or message.



Send me your test by
 (you can use a Google Drive link) and also include your WhatsApp number.



Thanks again, and if your work is perfect for me, we will do a call together to explain what products I'm selling right now, and how to respond and list products on Vinted and Etsy.



There is also a possibility for evolution in salary to $300 per month for a job as a manager if you're good at your job.

title: Property Client Support & Lead Gen
description:
About the Role



We are looking for a dependable and organised Customer Relations / Virtual Assistant to support our client management and lead-handling processes. You will be the first point of contact for new enquiries, while also supporting existing clients and ensuring projects move forward smoothly.



This role suits someone confident on the phone, strong with follow-ups, and excellent at staying organised across multiple tasks.



?

Lead Handling & Appointment Booking

Client & Project Support

mbers and external partners

Client Communication

Research Support

Administration

?



Requirements

 • Excellent spoken and written English

 • Strong organisation and time-management skills

 • Reliable, proactive, and able to work independently

 • Comfortable using:

 • Outlook

 • CRMs (GoHighLevel preferred)

 • Google Drive/Docs/Sheets



?



Preferred 

 • Experience in customer service, client success, or admin support

 • Experience in property or professional services environments

We are looking for a highly organised and proactive Property Sourcing Assistant to support our investment team. The role involves identifying suitable property opportunities, conducting due diligence, coordinating with agents and partners, and helping ensure deals progress smoothly from enquiry through to offer.



Candidates with UK property experience are strongly preferred.



?

 • Support offer negotiations and manage communications with agents

 • Monitor active deals and flag risks, delays, or missing information

 • General research and admin support to the acquisitions team



?



Requirements

 • Experience in UK property sourcing, lettings, investments, or similar (preferred)

 • Strong analytical and research skills

 • Excellent written and spoken English

 • Confident communicator on phone and

 • High attention to detail and ability to spot issues early

 tools



?

 • Experience liaising with agents, builders, solicitors, or brokers

title: Property Investing Sourcer Assistant
description:
Do you enjoy researching properties, running numbers, and spotting hidden opportunities? We’re looking for a motivated and detail-oriented Property Investment Sourcing Assistant to join our growing team.



You’ll play a key role in finding and analysing property investment deals in the UK market – from Buy-to-Let properties to exciting refurbishment opportunities. This role starts part-time, with the potential to grow into a full-time position as we scale.



What You’ll Do

 • Research and source property investment opportunities in the UK.

 • Analyse deals for ROI, rental yield, and profitability.

 • Create clear, concise deal summaries for the team.

 • Reach out confidently to property owners, agents, and stakeholders via phone and
.

 • Keep accurate records of leads and deals.

 • Share a short Loom video introducing yourself and highlighting your experience.



What We’re Looking For

 • Previous experience in property sourcing, research, or real estate (UK property knowledge is a big plus, but not required if you’re a fast learner).

 • Strong understanding of numbers – ROI, yield, and investment returns.

 • Excellent English communication skills (written and spoken).

 • Confidence when speaking on the phone.

 • Proactive, organised, and able to work independently.



Why Join Us?

 • Work remotely with flexible hours.

 • Be part of a small but growing property investment company.

 • Real opportunity to grow into a long-term, full-time role.

 • Gain hands-on experience in the UK property investment industry.



How to Apply



Send us your CV plus a short Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining your relevant experience or why you’d be a great fit for this role.



?



This version:

 • Feels more inviting and engaging, not just a checklist.

 • Opens the door to candidates who may not have UK property sourcing experience but have transferable skills.

 • Emphasises growth and opportunity, which is attractive.

 • Uses simple, direct language instead of corporate-style wording.

title: Marketing & Growth
description:

The ideal candidate is creative, reliable, organized, and proactive, with the ability to maintain a consistent online presence, communicate professionally, and be a real contributor to the business by bringing ideas, solving problems, and adding value beyond basic task completion.

title: UK Event Marketing & Partnerships Manager
description:
About Us



RA Monster Events is one of the UK’s fastest-growing live event companies, delivering large-scale Monster Truck Motorfest and family entertainment events nationwide.



We are looking for an experienced, driven, and highly organised UK Event Marketing & Partnerships Manager to help grow attendance across all events through strategic media buying, community partnerships, and national promotional campaigns.



Role Overview



You will be responsible for creating and managing nationwide marketing systems that drive ticket sales and local awareness for our UK event schedule.



This is a hands-on role focused on performance, partnerships, and results.



Key Responsibilities



National Marketing Suppliers



Source and manage trusted UK-wide providers for:



Poster distribution campaigns



Leaflet drop services



Influencer marketing campaigns



Billboard advertising across the UK



Local Media Planning



For every event location, research and recommend:



Top 5 Newspapers / Press Titles



Best reach



Best local readership



Best advertising value



Top 5 Radio Stations



Highest local audience



Family / commuter reach



Sponsorship / competition opportunities



Live Event Radio Activation



Coordinate an on-site live radio station presence at selected events including:



Live broadcasting



Competitions



Presenter appearances



Ticket giveaways



Audience engagement



Community Partnership Network



Build a strong local promotional network for every event including:



? Football teams???? Rugby clubs???? Schools / PTAs???? Martial arts clubs???? Dance schools???? Running clubs???? Youth groups / Scouts / Cadets????? Community
 groups????? Charities / fundraisers



Responsibilities include:



Creating free ticket giveaway partnerships



Running competitions



Community promo packs



Cross-promotion campaigns



Building long-term relationships



Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who has:



Experience in events marketing, promotions, media buying or partnerships



Strong UK media knowledge



Great communication skills



Ability to negotiate deals and partnerships



Organised and self-motivated attitude



Focus on ticket sales and ROI



Creative mindset for grassroots promotion



Bonus Experience



Outdoor advertising



Influencer campaigns



Radio promotions



Sponsorship sales

Success Metrics



You will be judged on:

Marketing reach



Quality supplier deals



Community partnerships built



ROI from campaigns



Attendance increases



Position Type



Full-time / Part-time / Freelance considered



Remote with UK travel when required



Performance-based opportunities available

title: Social Media Video Editor and Content Manager
description:
Job Title: Social Media Video Editor and Content Manager



Location: Remote

Employment Type: Full Time

Compensation: $15 to $20 AUD per hour





About the Role

We are looking for a talented and proactive Social Media Video Editor and Content Manager to join our team. This role combines creative video editing, graphic design, and hands on social media management. You will play a key role in producing engaging content and building meaningful interactions with our audience.





Key Responsibilities

- Edit short form and long form video content for social media platforms such as Instagram, TikTok,
, and YouTube

- Design supporting graphics and visual assets aligned with brand guidelines

- Schedule and publish content across social media channels

- Monitor comments, messages, and mentions, and actively engage with followers

- Respond to audience inquiries in a timely and professional manner

- Collaborate with the team on content ideas, campaigns, and trends

- Ensure all content is optimized for each platform and audience





Requirements

- Proven experience in video editing for social media

- Strong skills in graphic design tools such as Canva, Adobe Photoshop, or similar

- Familiarity with video editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or Final Cut Pro

- Understanding of current social media trends and best practices

- Excellent communication skills in English

- Ability to manage multiple tasks and meet deadlines

- Highly organized and detail oriented

- Must provide a portfolio or examples of previous work (social media videos and graphics)

- Available to work full time from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Sydney time

- Must not be working with other clients during these hours (full focus on this role)





Nice to Have

- Experience with social media scheduling tools

- Basic understanding of analytics and performance tracking

- Experience working with brands or agencies





What We Offer

- Full time remote position

- Competitive hourly rate

- Opportunity to work with a fast growing team

- Creative and collaborative work environment

title: Advanced level secretary
description:
# Job Opportunity – Elite Executive Secretary  

## RA Monster Events



RA Monster Events is one of the UK’s fastest-growing live entertainment and event companies, delivering large-scale Monster Truck Motorfest and family events across the UK.



We are seeking an elite-level Executive Secretary to become a key part of the business and support the day-to-day operations of a fast-paced, ambitious company.



This is a high-level role for someone exceptional — highly organised, professional, intelligent, proactive, and capable of operating at executive standard.



---



## Role Overview



You will work directly with senior management, helping keep the business organised, efficient, and moving forward at speed.



You must have advanced English communication skills, excellent judgement, and the ability to manage multiple priorities with precision.



This role requires someone who can think ahead, solve problems, and handle confidential business matters professionally.



---



## Key Responsibilities



### Executive Support

- Manage diaries, schedules, meetings and appointments  

- Organise travel, accommodation and itineraries  

- Prioritise daily tasks and deadlines  

- Prepare reports, presentations and documents  

- Handle confidential business information discreetly



### Communication Management

- Draft professional
s and responses  

- Manage inboxes and communications  

- Liaise with venues, suppliers, partners and clients  

- Follow up enquiries and maintain relationships



### Administration & Operations

- Maintain organised systems and databases  

- Create trackers, spreadsheets and reports  

- Monitor deadlines and ensure completion of tasks  

- Assist with contracts, paperwork and event documentation  

- Support event planning and logistics administration



### Problem Solving & Initiative

- Anticipate issues before they arise  

- Improve systems and efficiency  

- Handle urgent requests calmly and professionally  

- Take ownership of tasks without constant supervision



---



## Required Skills



### Essential

- Advanced spoken and written English

- Exceptional organisational ability

- High attention to detail

- Strong administrative experience

- Excellent time management

- Professional communication skills

- Ability to multitask under pressure

- Strong computer skills (Google Workspace / Microsoft Office / spreadsheets)

- Trustworthy and discreet with confidential information



### Preferred

- Executive assistant / secretary experience

- Events industry experience

- Social media / marketing awareness

- Project management ability

- Experience working remotely with UK businesses



---



## Personality We Need



- Sharp and intelligent  

- Loyal and dependable  

- Calm under pressure  

- Solutions-focused  

- Fast learner  

- Positive attitude  

- High standards  

- Professional appearance and manner



---



## Performance Expectations



You will be measured on:



- Speed and accuracy of work  

- Communication quality  

- Organisation of systems  

- Ability to reduce workload for management  

- Initiative and problem solving  

- Reliability and consistency



---



## Position Details



- Full-time preferred  

- Remote / Hybrid considered  

- UK time-zone alignment preferred  

- Long-term growth opportunity for the right person



---



## Why Join RA Monster Events



This is an opportunity to work inside an ambitious, fast-growing events business with exciting projects across the UK. We are looking for someone exceptional who wants to grow with the company and become indispensable.



---



## How to Apply



Please send:



1. CV / Resume  

2. Cover message explaining why you are elite-level for this role  

3. Examples of administrative or executive support experience  

4. Confirm availability and working hours



RA Monster Events

title: Appointment Setter & GHL Specialist - US Home Services Marketing Agency
description:
We're a US-based agency that generates inbound leads for home service companies (construction, remodeling, HVAC, roofing, plumbing). You'll call warm leads, qualify them, and book appointments. These are NOT cold calls.

Compensation: 4-5$ per hour, full time



Experience: 

* 1 year+ in appointment setting. 

* Hands-on GoHighLevel experience (non-negotiable).



Responsibilities:

* Call every lead within 60 seconds of submission.

* Qualify using a short script (project type, timeline, location, budget).

* Book appointment for our clients directly on their calendar using GHL

* Follow ups with no-answers - double-dial, text, re-engage.

* 50 calls per day minimum.



What You Need:

* Fluent English with a neutral or American accent. DO NOT APPLY IF YOUR ENGLISH IS NOT IMPECCABLE.

* Strong internet connection (20 Mbps+) & quiet workspace - no background noise.

* Confident & engaging - you keep conversations flowing and handle objections.

* Organized & detail-oriented - every call logged accurately in GHL.

* Available to work 8 AM – 7 PM EST, Monday–Friday.



Growth: This is a long-term position. Top performers grow into Team Lead roles with salary increases.



Apply here: 



When asked "What do we value the most at our company?" - the answer is "Honesty."
