title: Credit Repair Dispute Specialist | DisputeFox Required | Long-Term FTEC Role
description:
Futuristic Tech Consulting is hiring a long-term Credit Repair Dispute Specialist to help manage client credit repair files inside DisputeFox.



This is not a basic VA role. I need someone who understands credit report audits, factual disputes, DisputeFox, dispute letter creation, letter library organization, bureau/furnisher responses, and deletion/correction tracking.



Your main job will be to review credit reports, identify factual dispute angles, create accurate dispute letters inside DisputeFox, organize templates, track deadlines, review responses, and help us improve client results.



We are building a long-term system, not hiring a freelancer for one quick task. You must be detail-oriented, reliable, honest, and willing to follow SOPs.



Main Responsibilities

Audit credit reports from Experian, Equifax, and TransUnion

Identify factual errors, inconsistencies, duplicate accounts, obsolete items, and reporting issues

Create factual dispute letters inside DisputeFox

Organize and label DisputeFox letter templates

Track Round 1, Round 2, Round 3, and escalation actions

Review bureau, furnisher, and collector responses

Track deletions, corrections, verified items, and next steps

Prepare daily reports

Help build SOPs for the FTEC dispute process

Keep client data secure and never store client files on personal devices

Required Experience

Credit repair experience required

DisputeFox experience strongly preferred

Strong English writing skills

Experience with factual disputing

Ability to read and compare all three credit bureaus

Ability to track deadlines and results

Ability to follow instructions and ask questions when stuck

Bonus Skills

GoHighLevel experience

Client update writing

SOP creation

Credit repair automation

Experience with CFPB complaint preparation

Experience with PrintFox/certified mail workflows

Important



This role is about legitimate, compliant dispute work. We do not promise fake results, guaranteed deletions, or removal of accurate negative information. We focus on finding real reporting issues, documenting them, disputing them correctly, and tracking results.



Accurate negative information generally cannot be removed just because it is negative, and strong disputes should explain what is wrong, why it is wrong, and include supporting documents.



Application Instructions



At the very top of your application, write:



FTEC AUDIT READY



If you do not write this exact phrase, your application will not be reviewed.



Then answer these questions:



Have you personally used DisputeFox? List the exact tasks you have done inside it.

How many credit repair client files have you processed from audit through Round 2 or Round 3?

Explain factual disputing in your own words.

What is the first thing you look for when auditing a credit report?

What do you do when a bureau verifies an item but the report still has factual inconsistencies?

What account types are you strongest with: collections, charge-offs, late payments, medical collections, inquiries, repossessions, bankruptcies, student loans, or identity theft?

What account types are you weakest with?

Are you currently working another job? If yes, how many hours per week?

Are you comfortable with the listed salary?

Are you willing to complete a paid test using fake credit report data?

Better Version If You Want It Shorter



This is the cleaner version if the job post box feels too crowded:



Futuristic Tech Consulting is hiring a long-term Credit Repair Dispute Specialist with DisputeFox experience.



This is not a basic VA role. I need someone who can audit credit reports, identify factual dispute angles, create dispute letters inside DisputeFox, organize the letter library, track dispute rounds, review bureau/furnisher responses, and help us produce legitimate deletions and corrections.



Main tasks:



Audit credit reports from all three bureaus

Identify factual errors and inconsistencies

Create dispute letters inside DisputeFox

Organize and label dispute letter templates

Track Round 1, Round 2, Round 3, and escalation steps

Review bureau responses

Track deletions, corrections, verified items, and next actions

Prepare daily reports

Help build SOPs for our credit repair process



Required:



Credit repair experience

DisputeFox experience preferred

Strong English writing

Factual dispute knowledge

Detail-oriented

Reliable daily communication



At the top of your application, write:



FTEC AUDIT READY



Then answer:



Have you personally used DisputeFox? What tasks have you done?

How many credit repair files have you processed?

Explain factual disputing in your own words.

What do you do when an item comes back verified?

Are you comfortable with the listed salary?

Are you willing to complete a paid test using fake credit report data?

title: Executive Operations Assistant (Remote) – Global Social Impact
description:
Full-Time Executive Assistant (Remote) – Join a Global Social Impact Social Enterprise ScaleUp

Salary: Up to 1000 USD/month (Full-Time, 160+ hours)



At HubLearn Group, we operate with a clear principle: outcomes over hours.

Through the use of advanced tools and systems, a significant part of repetitive work is automated. This allows you to focus on higher-value activities such as problem-solving, decision-making, and structured execution. As a result, your actual working hours may be lower—provided you are able to operate efficiently within this setup.



IMPORTANT: I personally review only applications that follow the instructions outlined in the “How to apply” section below. Please read carefully.



This role is for someone who wants to work remotely while contributing to a global Danish social enterprise focused on co-creation, upskilling, and reskilling people worldwide—independent of background or circumstance.



I am looking for a highly capable, business-minded, and proactive Executive Assistant who operates well in a dynamic environment and is motivated by growth, ownership, and long-term impact.



My name is Adam, Founder and CEO of HubLearn Group.



This is not a traditional assistant role. It is a long-term collaboration (minimum 2+ years) where you will act as an extension of my execution capacity and play a central role in scaling a global, mission-driven organization.



Due to my international schedule, your working hours will be aligned with your time zone. You will have autonomy in how you structure your work. What matters is execution, consistency, and results—not time spent. You will be compensated equally regardless of whether tasks require 80 or 200+ hours monthly. Performance and growth are the key metrics.



HubLearn Group’s mission is to increase access to knowledge, tools, and opportunities for individuals and organizations with limited resources. We operate globally with a focus on education, collaboration, and long-term impact.



Responsibilities:



• Organising, coordinating, and managing communication across stakeholders globally—from governmental level to local partners—ensuring alignment, preparation, and forward planning for meetings and CEO priorities

• Full calendar ownership, including scheduling, prioritization, and coordination

• Executing tasks based on voice memos, calls, and written instructions with minimal supervision

• Supporting, structuring, and updating global donation programs

• Developing written content in collaboration with the content team

• Managing and responding to business communication at a professional level

• Reviewing, refining, and elevating written materials

• Anticipating needs, identifying gaps, and ensuring forward 
ntum

• Supporting copywriting initiatives with a focus on persuasive and impact-driven communication

• Managing and coordinating social media activities across platforms

• Handling administrative workflows (largely automated), including follow-ups and transcription



This role requires independent thinking, structured execution, and a proactive mindset. You are expected to contribute actively—not simply execute instructions. You will be involved in improving processes, communication, and overall operational flow.



You:



• Operate with strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

• Are able to produce clear, structured, and engaging written communication

• Take ownership and maintain high levels of accountability

• Work independently with strong attention to detail and prioritization

• Understand the expectations of working as a remote EA in a high-performance environment

• Are digitally capable and comfortable working with systems and tools

• Can operate in an international and fast-paced context

• Are committed to continuous development and learning



What you can expect:



• Direct involvement in a global startup and scale-up environment

• Continuous professional and personal development

• Flexible working structure based on output

• Access to tools and learning resources

• A collaborative and performance-oriented team environment

• The opportunity to contribute to meaningful global impact

• Potential opportunities to work physically in Denmark for periods

• Access to further education opportunities in Denmark



You will join the core team as an independent contractor, with the potential for long-term integration into the organization under a Danish employment structure.



How to apply for the position:



To be considered for this position, please complete the following tasks carefully. I will review your written tasks first before proceeding to the final step.



Task-1 Executive Scenario:

You receive this message fro
:

“I have multiple upcoming meetings with different stakeholders (government, partners, internal team), and I am traveling with no preparation done.”

Explain step-by-step how you would organize everything, what you would prepare for me, and how you ensure I stay one step ahead.



Task-2 Professional Communication:

Write a professional
 reply to a potential partner who is interested in collaborating with HubLearn Group but asks for more details about our mission and how we create impact.



Task-3 Task Execution from Ambiguous Input:

You receive a short voice memo fro
 saying:

“Follow up on the donation program, check where we are, and update me.”

Explain what actions you would take, what information you would gather, and how you would report back to me.



Task-4 Content & Copywriting:

Write a short piece of content (max 800 characters) that promotes a global initiative related to education, impact, or opportunity. The content should be engaging, clear, and include a call-to-action.



Task-5 Why you?:

• List four reasons why you are the ideal Executive Assistant for HubLearn Group



Task-6 Short Video (max 2 minutes):

Record a short video introducing yourself and explaining why you are a strong fit for this role and how you would support a CEO working globally.



You may submit your application in any format you prefer (Word, PDF, PowerPoint, etc.).



I review applications personally on an ongoing basis and will hire as soon as the right candidate is identified.



I look forward to your application.



Best regards,

Adam D

title: Senior Sales Representative
description:
We are hiring a Senior Sales Rep for Little Pixies Studios, a premium children’s portrait studio in the UK.



This is a phone sales role for someone who is excellent at building trust quickly, handling emotional conversations well, and confidently securing paid bookings from warm leads.



**This role is best suited to someone who understands motherhood who has strong phone sales ability, because the conversations are emotionally led and centred around speaking with mums.**



This is not a customer support role and it is not a cold calling role.

You will be speaking to warm inbound leads and follow-up leads, helping them book our fairy tale photo shoot experience and secure their paid booking.



Pay

35,000 PHP base salary + Uncapped commission



Realistic OTE: 60,000 PHP+ per month (Strong performers can earn more)



Schedule

Monday - Saturday UK hours



What problem does this role solve for the business?

Filling our photography calendar with qualified bookings by building trust and persuading mothers our shoots are work their investment.



What you’ll be doing:

- Calling warm leads quickly and confidently

- Following up persistently until leads are booked or genuinely abandoned

- Building rapport fast and making mums feel understood

- Securing paid bookings and deposits over the phone

- Managing your pipeline properly inside GoHighLevel

- Sending follow-ups through our systems when needed

- Giving honest feedback on lead quality, objections, and sales process issues

- Taking ownership of results



Standards for this role:

- Minimum 15% close rate

- Fast follow-up speed

- 5-minute call time on new leads

- Consistent pipeline management

- Strong follow-up discipline



You are probably a strong fit if:

- You are a mother or have motherhood products/ services

- You have at least 2 years of phone sales / telesales / transactional sales experience

- You are excellent at building rapport and handling emotional sales conversations

- You are highly fluent in English with trusted accent (e.g. American, British, Irish, South African)

- You sound polished, clear, and trustworthy on the phone

- You are confident asking for the sale

- You are self-sufficient, organised, and performance-driven

- You take feedback well and care about improving



Strong preference for people with experience in:

- Luxury sales / Emotional sales (Photography sales, Fitness sales, Luxury vehicle, High-trust phone sales)

- Any role where rapport, emotion, and follow-up mattered more than hard-pressure tactics

- Clear, trust building Accent / phone presence



This is a high-trust phone role, so your spoken English must sound polished, natural, and easy for UK customers to trust.

Applicants with a clear, neutral, highly trusted English-speaking phone presence will stand out.



Tools



You’ll be using:

- GoHighLevel

- Slack

- WhatsApp

- Google Docs





This role is for someone who wants more than just a job.

If you are strong, coachable, hardworking, and want to grow with a company that values performance, this could be a great fit.



****** Please apply using the link below:




/c/little-pixies/jobs/senior-setter-remote-rstk?utm_source=onlinejobsph



Only apply if you are confident on the phone, strong in English, and comfortable working UK hours in a results-focused sales environment.

title: Experienced Amazon UK Product Sourcer / Deal Analyst (OA + Keepa + ArbiSource + Manual Analysis)
description:
Please Read Carefully Before Applying



We are only looking for experienced, high-level Amazon UK product sourcers who take pride in their work and want to grow long-term with a serious eCommerce business.



If you are the type of person who can spot opportunities others miss, understand Keepa deeply, and know how to source with both software and manual analysis, keep reading.



We are not looking for average VAs.



We are looking for real deal analysts.



?



About the Role



We are building a high-performance Amazon UK sourcing team and are looking for exceptional product sourcers who can consistently find profitable, scalable, and well-analysed deals.



This role is for someone who understands that sourcing is not just about running scans.



You must be able to:

	•	Analyse Keepa properly

	•	Understand historical price behaviour

	•	Identify strong opportunities from data

	•	Use tools like ArbiSource, SellerAmp, and Keepa

	•	Find both software-assisted and manually discovered deals

	•	Think critically like a buyer / analyst, not just a basic VA



If you are highly skilled, detail-oriented, and serious about becoming one of the best in Amazon sourcing, this could be a long-term opportunity with strong growth potential.



?



What We’re Looking For



We are specifically looking for someone with strong experience in:

	•	Amazon UK Online Arbitrage sourcing

	•	Keepa deal analysis (this is extremely important)

	•	ArbiSource sourcing / custom scans

	•	Manual sourcing / online analysis

	•	Amazon-to-Amazon opportunities

	•	Storefront stalking / advanced research methods

	•	Understanding of buy box behaviour, competition, rank, and price stability

	•	Ability to identify real opportunities, not just obvious or low-quality scan results



Wholesale sourcing experience is a plus, but not required.



?



Your Responsibilities

	•	Source profitable and high-quality products for Amazon UK

	•	Focus primarily on categories such as:

	•	Electronics

	•	Home & Kitchen

	•	Toys

	•	(and other strong opportunities where relevant)

	•	Find a mix of:

	•	Keepa-led opportunities

	•	ArbiSource opportunities

	•	Manual / online analysis deals

	•	Amazon-to-Amazon opportunities

	•	(Potentially wholesale opportunities if applicable)

	•	Deliver exclusive leads only

(No shared leads, no recycled leads, no leads given to multiple clients)

	•	Maintain a consistent output of quality over quantity

(We care more about strong, well-analysed deals than just random volume)

	•	Present all leads in a clean, professional spreadsheet including:

	•	Product name

	•	ASIN

	•	Supplier / website

	•	Cost price

	•	Selling price

	•	Estimated profit

	•	ROI

	•	Sales rank / estimated sales

	•	Number of sellers

	•	Buy box analysis

	•	Keepa screenshots / notes

	•	Any risks or concerns

	•	Avoid:

	•	Oversaturated products

	•	Unstable Keepa charts

	•	Obvious tanking listings

	•	Hazardous/restricted/problematic brands

	•	Low-quality “scan and send” deals with weak analysis



?



Minimum Deal Standards



As a general baseline, leads should typically meet:

	•	Minimum £10 profit

	•	20%+ ROI

	•	Strong sales consistency / healthy demand

	•	Stable or logical Keepa history

	•	Reasonable competition

	•	Clear buying rationale



Important:

We care more about good decisions and strong analysis than blindly forcing numbers.

A great deal analyst understands why a product is good, not just what the calculator says.



?



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)



To be considered, you must have:

	•	Proven experience in Amazon UK Online Arbitrage sourcing

	•	Strong Keepa analysis skills (non-negotiable)

	•	Experience using:

	•	Keepa

	•	SellerAmp

	•	ArbiSource (custom scan experience strongly preferred)

	•	Ability to source through:

	•	Software

	•	Manual analysis

	•	Storefront stalking

	•	Online research

	•	Amazon-to-Amazon opportunities

	•	Strong understanding of:

	•	Buy box trends

	•	Price drops / tanking risk

	•	Seller competition

	•	Rank consistency

	•	Seasonal patterns

	•	Listing risk / product quality issues

	•	High attention to detail

	•	Strong communication

	•	Ability to work independently

	•	Reliability and consistency



?



Who Will Excel in This Role



You will do well in this role if you:

	•	Think like an analyst, not just a scanner

	•	Can explain why a deal is good

	•	Understand how to read Keepa deeply

	•	Know how to spot when a deal is actually bad even if the numbers look good

	•	Care about long-term account health, not just quick wins

	•	Take pride in being one of the best at what you do

	•	Want to grow with a serious Amazon business long-term



?



Why Join Us

	•	Work directly with a serious, fast-growing Amazon UK business

	•	Long-term opportunity for the right people

	•	Performance-based bonuses for strong, consistent work

	•	Growth potential into a more senior sourcing / buying role

	•	Work with a team that values:

	•	Excellence

	•	Accountability

	•	High standards

	•	Long-term thinking



We are building a real team — not just hiring random freelancers.



?



How to Apply



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.



To apply, you must do ALL of the following:



1. Start your application with the word: YES



2. Send a sample of your previous sourcing work / deal sheet

(Applications without proof of experience will not be considered)



3. List all software and tools you are experienced with

(Example: Keepa, SellerAmp, ArbiSource, Tactical Arbitrage, etc.)



4. Briefly explain your sourcing process

Tell us:

	•	How you find deals

	•	How you analyse Keepa

	•	How you d
 whether a lead is worth sending



5. Tell us why you believe you are in the top 1% of Amazon product sourcers



6. (Important filter question)

Please answer this question in your application:



What makes a Keepa chart attractive to you, and what are 3 red flags that would make you reject a deal even if the ROI looks good?



?



Final Note



We are only looking for people who take pride in being excellent.



If you are average, this role is not for you.

If you are serious, skilled, and want to grow with a high-performance team — we’d love to hear from you.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
About the Role

Royal Assistants is a systems and operations consultancy supporting service-based businesses. We’re looking for a detail-driven, self-directed Executive & Operations Assistant to support the Founder directly across communications, task management, and day-to-day admin.



This role exists because things move fast and nothing should fall through the cracks. You will be a second set of eyes on everything coming in —
, Slack, and ClickUp — and a second set of hands on whatever needs to get done. Some days that looks like drafting a message. Some days it’s updating a task, pulling together a document, or completing a form submission. You will not always be told exactly what to do. You are expected to assess, prioritize, and execute.



If you need a detailed checklist every morning to function, this is not the role for you.



What You’ll Be Doing

Communications Monitoring

 • Monitoring shared
 inbox and flagging or drafting responses as needed

 • Monitoring Slack for messages that require action or follow-up

 • Sending communications on behalf of the Founder using established tone and context

ClickUp Task Management

 • Monitoring ClickUp for open tasks, overdue items, and anything that needs attention

 • Updating task statuses, adding notes, and keeping records clean and current

 • Following up on outstanding items with internal tea
mbers as directed

Administrative Support

 • Creating documents, templates, SOPs, trackers, and other internal resources

 • Completing form submissions, scheduling support, and research tasks

 • Preparing meeting notes, agendas, and supporting materials

 • Pulling and organizing data or reports as needed

 • Handling one-off admin requests that fall outside of a defined category — this is intentional

General Execution

 • Supporting internal operations tasks as they arise across marketing, client management, and team coordination

 • Assisting with content organization, file management, and other behind-the-scenes needs

 • Filling gaps — if something needs to happen and it doesn’t require the Founder’s direct involvement, that’s your lane



What We’re Looking For

 • Genuinely comfortable with ambiguity — you assess what’s needed and move without being pushed

 • Strong written communication; you can match tone, represent a brand professionally, and draft without heavy editing

 • Highly responsive during your availability window

 • Experience with ClickUp, Slack, and a shared
 platform (Polymail or similar)

 • Able to distinguish what to handle independently from what to escalate — and when to escalate fast

 • Organized without being rigid; you can manage multiple moving pieces without dropping any

 • Prior experience supporting a founder, executive, or small business owner in a remote capacity preferred



Logistics

 • Contract / 1099 engagement

 • Approximately 4 hours per day, multiple days per week

 • Fully remote

 • Compensation commensurate with experience

description:

You will be given access to a large database of successful channels and pages, so research is fast and structured. Your job is to take what already works and adapt it into new angles to promote our product: Pure Health Max NMN. 
 



What You Need to Understand:

How to clearly explain a problem and its internal cause

How to build a natural product bridge

How to promote without sounding forced

Rewrite and improve proven formats (not from scratch)

Hook ? Problem ? Internal Cause ? Explanation ? Product Bridge ? CTA

A simple, repeatable workflow once understood

Basic understanding of viral hooks and audience psychology

Ability to follow structure and improve existing content

Consistency and reliability (very important)



Payment:



€5 per reel

4–6 reels per day (€20–€30 daily)



Important:

If you’re not comfortable with the payment or workload, please do not apply.



Also, only apply if you are serious, consistent, and able to follow instructions. This role is focused on execution, not creative experimentation.



Application Requirement:

Your goal is to:

Keep strong hooks and retention

Build a natural product bridge

Make the script more conversion-focused



Do not copy — improve and adapt.  :""  If the skin under your chin has started to loosen,

if your neck looks older than your face,

if it happened faster than you expected,

the problem is not your age, sugar.

I am Mother Satori, a holistic healer from African.

Save this video.

The problem is hidden inside.

The neck is where collagen breaks down first.

It has thinner skin and less fat to protect it.

When your liver is clogged with toxins,

it cannot clear the waste in your blood.

That waste creates inflammation,

and inflammation destroys collagen,

faster than any amount of years.

That waste creates inflammation.

That is what loosens the skin under your chin.

Not time.

No firming cream fixes this.

No neck exercise rebuilds what keeps being destroyed from within.

In my practice,

we see this reversed all the time.

Clear the liver,

cool the inflammation, and the collagen holds.

The skin stops loosening.

Some of what was lost begins to return.

In holistic medicine,

we clean the liver with herbs passed down for generations.

Soursop, black seed, lemon root, and hibiscus.

These are bitter herbs.

Bitter compounds trigger your liver to produce bile.

Bile is what your liver uses to break down toxins

and push them out of your body.

When bile starts flowing again,

the liver finally clears the waste,

stops building up.

The inflammation has nothing left to feed on,

and your collagen stops breaking down.

That is when the skin under your chin stops loosening.

But here's the problem.

Almost all the herbs you find today are mass produced,

heavily processed, full of fillers, and completely weak.

You end up wasting money on herbs that do absolutely nothing.

There's only one brand I trust that combines all these herbs into one formula.

It's a small company called Serene Herbs.

Soursop bitters.

They use 100% pure organic herbs

and third-party test them right here in the United States.

Comment "t," and I'll send you the exact t recipe I mix my bitters with every morning.

I've attached the Amazon link to Serene Herbs Soursop Bitters in the comments and in my profile.

But ever since they became a No. 1 best seller on Amazon,

they're having a really hard time keeping up.

So if they're still in stock,

don't wait, because last time they sold out,

they were gone for months.  "" 



If you’re reliable and can consistently deliver quality work, this can become a long-term collaboration.

If you’re interested, please send your rewritten script along with any relevant information, samples, or previous work to:

title: Part-Time Content Creator + Admin Support
description:
About Nokvex



Nokvex is a Philippines-based content studio serving remote agencies and freelancers across Australia and North America. We offer flexible payment in USD or PHP, treat our team as long-term partners, and keep communication clear and respectful.



---



The Role



We're looking for a Part-Time Content Creator with light admin support responsibilities. This is a long-term role with a clear path to full-time.



20 hours/week | $300/month USD ($70/week) | Weekly payment | Starting immediately



---



Schedule



- 20 hours/week distributed across Monday to Friday primarily

- Flexible - you choose your daily hours within PHT business time

- Occasional weekend support (max 2x/month) for urgent content or time-sensitive posts

- Results-based, not hour-based monitoring



---



Main Responsibilities



1. Video Editing (40%)

- 2 long-form YouTube videos per month (8-15 minutes each)

- 8 short-form videos per month (30-60 seconds, Reels/Shorts/TikTok)

- AI education content, cartoon/Nickelodeon-inspired style

- Dynamic captions, B-roll, basic motion graphics



2. Graphic Design (20%)

- YouTube thumbnails

- Social media post graphics (Canva)

- Simple branded assets



3. AI Asset Generation (15%)

- Image generation (Nano Banana, Midjourney, or similar)

- Character art, backgrounds, supporting visuals

- Following detailed briefs



4. Social Media Management (15%)

- Scheduling posts across Instagram,
, TikTok

- Basic caption drafting

- Engagement monitoring



5. Light Admin Support (10%)

- File organization (Google Drive)

- Basic research tasks (competitor analysis, data gathering)

- Spreadsheet updates

- Simple documentation



---



Growth Path



As our content volume grows, this role will evolve:



- Month 4-6: Hours may increase to 30-40 hrs/week, salary $450-$600

- Month 7-12: Option for full-time at $650-$800/month

- Scope will narrow to specialization (video editing + graphic design focus)

- SMM and admin tasks will transfer to other tea
mbers



Salary reviewed every 3 months based on performance.



---



Who You Are



- 1-2+ years experience in video editing (Premiere Pro, CapCut, or DaVinci Resolve)

- Portfolio showing YouTube long-form AND short-form work

- Basic graphic design skills (Canva minimum)

- Familiar with AI image tools (Midjourney, DALL-E, or similar) OR willing to learn fast

- Comfortable with social media scheduling tools

- Good English written communication

- Reliable internet (backup required)

- Available during regular PHT business hours



Bonus Points:

- Experience with cartoon/animation-style editing

- After Effects skills

- Thumbnail design portfolio (YouTube-specific)

- AI education or tech content experience



---



What We Offer



- $300 USD/month ($70/week), paid weekly via Wise

- 20 hours/week with flexible schedule

- Occasional weekend availability for time-sensitive tasks (max 2x/month)

- 13th month bonus after 6 months of continuous service

- 5 days paid time off per year, available after 3 months

- Clear 12-month growth path (part-time ? full-time)

- Long-term collaboration, not a gig

- Respectful, async-first work culture



---



How to Apply



Please send:



1. Your portfolio link (video editing + graphic design samples)

2. Short answer: What's your favorite editing project and why?

3. A 30-second Loom video introducing yourself

4. Your availability (days and PHT hours)



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed.



We review applications within 3 days and reply to everyone.



Learn more at

title: EA / PA / VA
description:
Full-Time Executive Assistant (Remote) - Join a Global Social Impact Social Enterprise ScaleUp.

Salary: Up to 1000 USD / monthly (Full-Time, 160+ hours).

But at HubLearn Group, we focus on outcomes, not hours.

Thanks to our use of advanced tools and systems, much of the repetitive work is automated. 

This means your actual working hours will likely be much lower (if you can work with the setup), allowing you to focus on problem-solving, decision-making, and using your full human potential.



IMPORTANT: I personally review only applications that follow the instructions outlined in the “How to apply” section below. Please read carefully.

Do you want to work from home while contributing to a purpose-driven global international Danish social enterprise that is committed to co-create, upskilling and reskilling people around the world, no matter their background or class?

Are you a highly capable, business- and proactive-minded Executive Assistant who thrives in a dynamic environment and is ready to grow alongside a fast-scaling organization?



Welcome and please keep reading.



My name is Adam, and I am the Founder and CEO of HubLearn Group.

I am looking for a full-time, highly professional, proactive, and independent Executive Assistant who can support me at a high level while actively contributing to our shared personal growth.

This is not just a traditional assistant role. It is a long-term collaboration (2+ years minimum) where you will play a key part in scaling a global, mission-driven company while continuously developing your own professional and personal potential.

Due to my international travel schedule, your working hours will be aligned with your time zone, offering flexibility and autonomy in how you manage your work. 

For me, it is about solving the task and not the hours spent. For that reason, you will be paid the same amount no matter if you spend 80+ hours or 200+ hours monthly - It is the result and your growth that count!

Our social enterprise, HubLearn Group, is built on a clear vision: to increase access to knowledge, tools, and opportunities for individuals and businesses with limited resources worldwide. Through collaboration, education, and innovation, we aim to create meaningful and lasting impact.



The tasks I am looking for you to take ownership of include:

Responsibilities:

• Organising, coordinating, and communicating with all kinds of people, from top governmental stakeholders to local individuals in Y-country, ensuring that I (and you) are on track with meetings and one step ahead for upcoming meetings and CEO responsibilities

• Calendar management and meeting coordination

• Executing tasks communicated via voice memos, calls, or written instructions

• Starting, supporting, and updating the many global donation programs

• Creating written content for our social media platforms in collaboration with our content creator

• Managing and responding to business
s professionally and efficiently

• Proofreading, refining, and elevating my drafts

• Acting proactively and staying one step ahead by anticipating needs and priorities

• Ghostwriting and copywriting, with a strong focus on persuasive, sales- and empowering-oriented content

• Social media management, including writing, posting, engaging, and responding across platforms such as LinkedIn,
, Instagram, and YouTube

• Administrative support (largely automated), including follow-ups on events and meetings and transcription of videos and voice memos



This role requires someone who can work on their own, is proactive, curious, and wants to contribute - not just follow instructions. I expect you to take an active role in our collaboration by sharing your ideas, asking questions, and continuously looking for ways to improve how you and I operate.



You are someone who:

• Has strong English skills, both written and spoken, at a professional level

• Is an excellent communicator and writer who can create engaging, clear, and persuasive content

• Has a proactive mindset and takes ownership of tasks while keeping me consistently updated

• Works independently and delivers high-quality results with attention to detail

• Understands the role of being an EA while working remotely as my Virtual Assistant and how to provide exceptional support in a fast-paced environment

• Has strong digital skills and a stable internet connection

• Is comfortable working with a CEO who has a Nordic leadership style and with an international, diverse team

• Is eager to learn, grow, and continuously improve

At HubLearn Group, we are committed to your growth as much as our own. We aim to create an environment where you are supported, challenged, and given the tools to expand your potential.



What you can expect:

• Valuable experience in a global startup and scale-up environment

• Continuous professional and personal development

• Flexible working conditions

• Access to online courses and learning resources

• A collaborative, informal, and inspiring team environment

• The opportunity to make a real impact on people’s lives worldwide

• Potential opportunities to work in periods physically abroad in Denmark

• Study and obtain a higher degree education in Denmark

You will be part of the core main team at HubLearn Group while working remotely as an independent contractor under a contractor agreement and potentially later as an integrated employee with all the benefits of a Danish employee (health care, access to your own office worldwide, etc.).



How to apply for the position:

To be considered for this position, please complete the following tasks carefully. I will review your written tasks first before proceeding to the final step.

Task-1 Executive Scenario:

You receive this message fro
:

“I have multiple upcoming meetings with different stakeholders (government, partners, internal team), and I am traveling with no preparation done.”

Explain step-by-step how you would organize everything, what you would prepare for me, and how you ensure I stay one step ahead.



Task-2 Professional Communication:

Write a professional
 reply to a potential partner who is interested in collaborating with HubLearn Group but asks for more details about our mission and how we create impact.



Task-3 Task Execution from Ambiguous Input:

You receive a short voice memo fro
 saying:

“Follow up on the donation program, check where we are, and update me.”

Explain what actions you would take, what information you would gather, and how you would report back to me.



Task-4 Content & Copywriting:

Write a short piece of content (max 800 characters) that promotes a global initiative related to education, impact, or opportunity. The content should be engaging, clear, and include a call-to-action.



Task-5 Why you?:

• List four reasons why you are the ideal Executive Assistant for HubLearn Group



Task-6 Short Video (max 2 minutes):

Record a short video introducing yourself and explaining why you are a strong fit for this role and how you would support a CEO working globally.



You may submit your application in any format you prefer (Word, PDF, PowerPoint, etc.).





I, as the CEO, will review applications personally on an ongoing basis, so I encourage you to apply now. When I find the person who fulfills the above and has the drive, I will hire that person right away.



I look forward to hearing from you.



Best regards,

Adam D

title: Founding Senior Full-Stack Engineer (AI, Web & Mobile)
description:
About the Company



We are building an AI-native operating system for real estate professionals.



Our mission is to transform how agents, brokers, and operators source deals, analyze opportunities, and execute transactions end-to-end—bringing everything into a single intelligent system powered by AI, automation, and real-time data.



We are building the “Harvey of real estate”—a platform where workflows that once took hours or days are executed in minutes.



Our MVP is already live and built using modern AI tooling (Lovable + Supabase). It demonstrates strong product-market potential, but now needs to evolve into a production-grade, scalable system.







The Role



We’re hiring a Senior Founding Engineer to take ownership of our platform and lead the next phase of development.



This is not a typical engineering role. You will operate as a technical co-builder, shaping architecture, product direction, and execution from the ground up.



You’ll transform a high-potential MVP into a robust, scalable AI platform—while moving fast and maintaining high standards.







What You’ll Do

 • Own and evolve the current MVP into a production-ready system

 • Architect and build scalable backend systems, APIs, and data models

 • Design and implement AI/ML systems using frameworks like TensorFlow, PyTorch, and modern LLM APIs

 • Develop AI-driven workflows and automation pipelines

 • Build and ship full-stack web & mobile applications (React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, Express)

 • Integrate third-party systems including:

 • MLS data providers

 • DocuSign

 • Gmail

 • Payment processors

 • Cloud services (AWS/GCP)

 • Manage and secure multi-API ecosystems (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google Cloud, GitHub, etc.)

 • Implement secure API practices:

 • Key rotation

 • Token management

 • Permissioning systems

 • Build cloud-based CI/CD pipelines and deployment infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure)

 • Design and maintain RESTful and GraphQL APIs

 • Optimize system performance, scalability, and reliability

 • Continuously evaluate and integrate emerging AI tools and models

 • Translate product ideas into high-quality, shipped features quickly

 • Collaborate closely with founders on product strategy and roadmap

 • Conduct code reviews, mentor future engineers, and help establish engineering best practices





Technical Requirements

 • Strong experience in JavaScript / TypeScript

 • Experience with React, Next.js, or similar frameworks

 • Backend development experience (Node.js, Express, or similar)

 • Experience building scalable APIs (REST & GraphQL)

 • Experience with Postgres or Supabase

 • Familiarity with cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, or Azure)

 • Experience working with LLM APIs and AI integrations

 • Experience building or deploying AI/ML models (TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar)

 • Experience with CI/CD pipelines and production deployments

 • Strong understanding of security best practices in API systems







What We’re Looking For

 • Builder mindset — ships fast, executes faster

 • Deep curiosity and passion for AI and emerging technologies

 • Ability to operate in high ambiguity environments

 • Strong problem-solving and critical thinking skills

 • High ownership mentality — thinks like a founder

 • Product-minded engineer focused on real-world impact

 • Resourceful, adaptable, and constantly learning

 • Thrives in early-stage startup environments





Compensation

 • Competitive salary

 • Meaningful early-stage equity





Why Join

 • Build a category-defining AI product in real estate

 • Work directly with founders on core product and technical decisions

 • Shape the architecture of a platform from the ground up

 • Operate at the intersection of AI, automation, and real-world transactions

 • Be part of something positioned to redefine an entire industry

title: Senior SEO Specialist With Content Writing Experience
description:
**SEO Specialist & Content Writer – Part-Time | Sydney-Based Electrical & Security Company**



Hours: Part-Time

Schedule: Some overlap with Australian business hours preferred

Position Type: Long-term PT



**About Us**



Kmelectric is a growing electrical and security installation company based in Sydney, Australia. We have been serving the Sydney market for over 20 years and are expanding our digital presence to match our on-the-ground reputation.



We are looking for a talented, reliable, and experienced SEO Specialist and Content Writer to join our team on a part-time basis. You will be working across two websites — our existing Kmelectric website and a brand-new website currently under construction — helping us rank higher on Google, generate more leads, and grow both businesses through organic search.



This is a long-term part-time position for someone who is serious about their craft and wants to grow with a stable, established company.



**What You Will Be Doing**



• Manage SEO across two websites — our established Kmelectric site and a new site currently in development

• Write and develop content for the new website from the ground up as it is being built

• Implement on-page SEO improvements across all service pages on both sites

• Create and optimise location-specific suburb pages for local SEO

• Monitor keyword rankings and SEO performance across both sites using industry tools

• Manage and optimise our Google Business Profiles

• Build internal links and improve site structure across both websites

• Write and publish blog posts and website content regularly

• Assist with technical SEO recommendations

• Work directly with the business owner to improve lead generation through organic search



**What We Are Looking For**



Required:

• Solid understanding of SEO — especially Local SEO for service businesses

• Strong content writing skills in English — you will be writing content for a brand new website

• Experience with Google Search Console and Google Analytics

• Proven ability to optimise content and pages for search engine rankings

• Experience ranking service businesses in Google Maps / Local Pack

• Ability to manage SEO across multiple websites simultaneously

• Reliable internet connection

• Ability to meet weekly deadlines and work well within a team environment

• Ability to communicate regularly and reliably with the team



Preferred:

• Experience launching and optimising new websites from scratch

• Experience using AI tools to assist with content writing

• Experience with service-based businesses



**Why Join Kmelectric**



• Long-term, stable part-time position — not a short contract

• Work directly with the business owner — no corporate layers

• Opportunity to manage and grow SEO across two websites

• Be part of the launch of a brand new website from day one

• Consistent work with clear goals and measurable results

• A company that values your expertise and invests in long-term relationships



**How to Apply**



Please send your application and include all of the following — applications missing any of these details will not be considered:



1. A summary of your SEO experience

2. Examples of websites you have worked on (URLs preferred)

3. Results you have achieved — rankings improved, traffic growth, leads generated

4. Your monthly salary expectation (in USD or PHP)

5. Your favourite SEO tool and why you use it



We look forward to hearing from serious applicants only. If you have the skills and want a long-term home with a growing Australian company, we want to hear from you.

title: Meta Media Buyer
description:
Meta Media Buyer - Verniqo Health

Remote | Full-Time | $5–$10 USD Per Hour



MUST HAVE at least 2 years of experience running Meta ads for e-commerce brands

Please list brands you have worked with and include proof of past ad accounts you've managed :)

MUST record an introductory Loom video with your application

Your personality type MUST be one with super strong attention to detail — if you're the type who misses small mistakes, this role is not for you

MUST have excellent written and spoken English — clear communication is non-negotiable



Hey there! We're a growth-driven Meta Ads & eCommerce brand based in Washington State, US and we're looking for a Meta Media Buyer to join our team full-time. You'll work closely with our creative and strategy teams to launch, test, and scale winning ad campaigns for our Shopify customers.

Why This Role is Crucial:

This is one of the most important roles at our brand. If you're a skilled media buyer who thrives on launching campaigns that consistently perform, you'll want to read this closely!

This role is not just challenging but also incredibly fulfilling — you'll see firsthand how your campaigns move the needle for a multi-seven figure brand.

Who Are We Looking For?

At Verniqo Health, we have one core rule: you must have the desire to grow.

Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

As a Meta Media Buyer, you'll bring our team's deep strategic insights to life through precise campaign execution and sharp data analysis. Your ability to launch ads flawlessly, read performance data accurately, and make smart optimization decisions will be key to your success.

To excel, you'll need to master three key areas:

Understanding the market — Knowing the desires, awareness, and sophistication of the target audience to inform your buying decisions.

Understanding the product — Deep familiarity with the client's product features and unique selling propositions so every campaign is structured correctly.

Executing with precision — Launching campaigns cleanly, naming conventions done right, tracking in place, and zero sloppy mistakes. Attention to detail is non-negotiable.

Your Responsibilities at Verniqo Health:

Launch and manage Meta ad campaigns daily across multiple ad accounts.

Upload fresh creatives, set up A/B tests, and structure campaigns according to our playbook.

Monitor ad performance daily and flag winners, losers, and optimization opportunities.

Collaborate with our creative and strategy teams to ensure concepts are tested properly.

Attend weekly tea
etings to discuss ad strategies and review performance.

Maintain clean, organized ad accounts with flawless naming conventions and tracking.

Communicate clearly in English — written and verbal — with the team every single day.

Learn the Verniqo Health Buying Strategy to understand what makes Meta campaigns win or lose.

More Reasons to Join Verniqo Health:

You'll have access to training programs, software, and other exclusive resources packed with content that has helped generate over $3M+ in Q4.

Learn directly from operators running a multi 7-figure Meta ad operation.

Final Notes:

At Verniqo Health, we hold our tea
mbers to high standards and reward exceptional performance.

If this sounds like the opportunity you've been waiting for, I'd love to chat and learn more about you. Together, we can accomplish amazing things at Verniqo Health.

Want to stand out? When you apply, mention the core value that resonates with you the most from the list below—and be ready to explain why!

Core Values:

VALUE FIRST - Our success is measured by the value we generate for others.

MOVE FAST - We prioritize quality, but we do it with speed.

WHITE BELT MENTALITY - Growth over ego. We always keep learning, and remember that anybody can teach something new.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: $5-10 USD per hour

Benefits:

Work from home

Learn how to buy media from a multi 7-figure brand

Access to leading edge software and technology

Schedule:

8-hour shift

Monday to Friday

Application question(s):

What Core Value resonates with you the most?

Do you have experience buying Meta ads for eCommerce brands?

What got you started in media buying?

Experience:

Meta Media Buying: 2 years (required)

Ecom experience required. + Will to learn

How to Apply

Please include: A short introductory Loom video about yourself, your experience with Meta media buying (brands you've worked with, results you've driven), and up to 5 examples MAX of past ad accounts or case studies you've worked on. Your hourly rate and availability (what hours in the day).

Use the word PINEAPPLE at the top of your application if you read this far. Otherwise your application will be disregarded.

title: The one and only Executive Assistant (Remote) in a Global Social Impact Social Enterprise ScaleUp
description:
Full-Time Executive Assistant (Remote) – Join a Global Social Impact Social Enterprise ScaleUp

Salary: Up to 1000 USD/month (Full-Time, 160+ hours)



At HubLearn Group, we focus on outcomes—not hours.

With advanced tools and systems, much of the repetitive work is automated. This means your actual working hours will likely be lower, allowing you to focus on problem-solving, decision-making, and using your full potential.



IMPORTANT: I personally review only applications that follow the instructions outlined in the “How to apply” section below. Please read carefully.



Do you want to work remotely while contributing to a global Danish social enterprise focused on upskilling, reskilling, and creating opportunities worldwide—regardless of background?



Are you a proactive, business-minded Executive Assistant who thrives in a fast-moving environment and wants to grow long-term?



Welcome.



My name is Adam, Founder and CEO of HubLearn Group.



I am looking for a highly professional, proactive, and independent Executive Assistant to support me directly and contribute to scaling a global, mission-driven company.



This is a long-term collaboration (2+ years). You will play a key role in our growth while developing your own skills and potential.



Due to my international schedule, your working hours will align with your time zone. I focus on results—not time spent. You will be paid the same whether tasks take 80 or 200 hours monthly. What matters is output and growth.



HubLearn Group’s mission is to increase access to knowledge, tools, and opportunities for people and businesses with limited resources worldwide.



Responsibilities:

• Organising, coordinating, and communicating with stakeholders globally—from government level to local partners—ensuring we stay ahead of meetings and priorities

• Calendar and meeting management

• Executing tasks via voice memos, calls, and written instructions

• Supporting and updating global donation programs

• Creating written content and supporting social media

• Managing business
s professionally

• Proofreading and refining content

• Acting proactively and anticipating needs

• Ghostwriting and copywriting (sales-focused and empowering content)

• Social media management across platforms

• Administrative support (largely automated)



This role is for someone proactive, curious, and independent—someone who contributes, not just follows instructions.



You:

• Have strong English communication skills

• Are a skilled writer and communicator

• Take ownership and stay structured

• Work independently with high attention to detail

• Understand remote EA work at a high level

• Have strong digital skills and stable internet

• Are comfortable in an international, fast-paced environment

• Are eager to grow continuously



What you get:

• Experience in a global startup/scale-up

• Personal and professional growth

• Flexible working setup

• Access to learning resources

• A supportive and ambitious team

• Opportunity to create real global impact

• Potential to work and study in Denmark



You will work as an independent contractor with potential for long-term integration into the company.



How to apply for the position:



To be considered for this position, please complete the following tasks carefully. I will review your written tasks first before proceeding to the final step.



Task-1 Executive Scenario:

You receive this message fro
:

“I have multiple upcoming meetings with different stakeholders (government, partners, internal team), and I am traveling with no preparation done.”

Explain step-by-step how you would organize everything, what you would prepare for me, and how you ensure I stay one step ahead.



Task-2 Professional Communication:

Write a professional
 reply to a potential partner who is interested in collaborating with HubLearn Group but asks for more details about our mission and how we create impact.



Task-3 Task Execution from Ambiguous Input:

You receive a short voice memo fro
 saying:

“Follow up on the donation program, check where we are, and update me.”

Explain what actions you would take, what information you would gather, and how you would report back to me.



Task-4 Content & Copywriting:

Write a short piece of content (max 800 characters) that promotes a global initiative related to education, impact, or opportunity. The content should be engaging, clear, and include a call-to-action.



Task-5 Why you?:

• List four reasons why you are the ideal Executive Assistant for HubLearn Group



Task-6 Short Video (max 2 minutes):

Record a short video introducing yourself and explaining why you are a strong fit for this role and how you would support a CEO working globally.



You may submit your application in any format you prefer (Word, PDF, PowerPoint, etc.).



I personally review applications on an ongoing basis and will hire as soon as I find the right person.



I look forward to hearing from you.



Best regards,

Adam D

 Ads Manager mastery, Google Analytics, A/B testing methodology

How to Apply



Send me a message on

title: Facebook Ad Creative Compliance Specialist — Health & Wellness EU
description:
About the role:

We are a growing European health and wellness e-commerce brand running direct response
 campaigns across Finland and expanding into new EU markets. We target the 50-70 age demographic with health, wellness and skincare products.

We need a creative specialist who takes existing competitor static ad creatives and transforms them into fully 
pliant versions — adjusting copy, headlines and visuals while preserving the core message and conversion power.



What you will do:



Take existing competitor ad creatives and recreate compliant versions

Adjust headlines, ad copy and creative elements to meet Meta health advertising policies for EU markets

Generate ad images using Nano Banana 2 based on detailed prompts

Use ChatGPT and Claude to refine copy and check compliance

Produce compliant creatives for multiple health and wellness products daily

Ensure every submission is ready to go live — no back and forth on basic compliance issues





What we are looking for:



Experience with health, wellness, supplements or skincare advertising on

Strong understanding of Meta advertising policies for health products — especially EU market regulations

Hands-on experience with AI tools — Nano Banana 2, ChatGPT, Claude

Strong English copywriting skills with ability to adapt tone for different products

Detail oriented — you catch compliance issues before submission not after rejection

Self-managed — you deliver consistently without supervision

Fast worker — multiple products need creatives daily





Screening test — required before interview:

Review this ad and identify all compliance violations, then rewrite the copy and suggest what the image should show to make it fully 
pliant:

"Cures joint pain in 72 hours — clinically proven. Before: could barely walk. After: back to normal. Doctors are amazed. Order now while stocks last — limited time 80% discount."

Applications without the completed screening test will not be considered.



Compensation:



Base salary: $400/month paid weekly

Performance bonus: €40 per campaign achieving ROAS 3.0+ at €200/day budget for 2 consecutive days





Working style:



Remote, fully flexible hours

Daily creative briefs provided — existing competitor ads to adapt

Deliverables expected same day or next day

Weekly 30-minute video call for feedback and direction



leave your phone number / no phone number = no application

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
# Hiring 10+ Closers to Help Build Local Business Communities - $1,500-$4,000/Month



**Company:** Start Over Movement Holdings Ltd (Founded by Sir Marco Robinson)



**Location:** Remote - **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time** (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time)



**Type:** Full-time Independent Contractor



---



## The Story Behind Start Over



Sir Marco Robinson is a UK entrepreneur, author, and TV personality who has spent decades helping people rebuild their lives and businesses. He founded Start Over Movement with a simple idea: local business owners should support each other, not compete for the same scraps.



Every Start Over chapter is a community of local business owners who:

- Refer clients to each other, generating real revenue

- Learn marketing and sales directly from Sir Marco

- Get a dedicated commission-only closer assigned to their business

- Meet monthly with an exclusive group (only one business per industry per chapter)



It is not networking. It is a referral engine with a mentor attached. Members pay £1,500 (UK) or $1,500 (US and Canada) per year to be part of it. And the model works - we already have active chapters in Laguna Beach, Tampa Bay, New York, London and Toronto. Mississippi is next.



---



## Why We Need You



We are looking for at least 10 cold caller closers to help launch and fill the Mississippi chapter. This is part of a broader buildout of 100+ closers across all our territories. 10 is a minimum target for Mississippi alone, not a cap - we will hire every qualified closer we find.



The business owners we call are not hostile. They are overwhelmed, under-marketed, and tired of networking groups that do not deliver. When you explain what Start Over actually does - referrals, mentorship, exclusive local representation - the good ones lean in.



Your job is to find them, explain it, and close them on the call. One business per industry means urgency sells itself. Once the plumber in Jackson signs up, no other plumber in Mississippi can join. That is the hook.



---



## What You Will Earn



Commission is simple: **$100 for every $1,500 membership you close.** No cap. Pro-rated on cash collected, full commission once the full membership clears. Paid every Friday via Wise, PayPal or Payoneer.



| Monthly Closes | Commission |

|---|---|

| 15 (modest) | $1,500 |

| 25 (solid) | $2,500 |

| 40 (strong) | $4,000 |

| More | More |



Plus a $15/day base, paid daily, to cover your time while you ramp up and to guarantee you earn something from day one.



---



## The 14-Day Trial



We do not rush this. Your first 14 days are a paid trial:



- $15/day base, paid daily via Wise (for verified work days)

- Full commission on every sale you close during the trial

- **Day 1:** Onboarding, script training, shadowing, pass the roleplay by end of day

- **Day 2 onwards:** Full production with daily minimums

- Live coaching from the Cold Caller Manager throughout

- Roleplay check must be passed on Day 1 before going on real calls Day 2



**Event attendees count too:** Every call you make that leads to someone attending a Start Over event and closing at that event earns you the same $100 commission. Attribution = whoever secured the attendance.



**To continue past day 14, you need to have earned $200 in commissions during the trial.** That is 2 full sales (or more in partial payments / event closes). This gate exists because we invest real time and resources in training you. If you cannot close 2 deals in 14 days, it is not the right fit - for either of us.



---



## What Makes This Role Different



**1. You are not hustling a bad offer.** Start Over is real. Sir Marco is real. Members are paying, showing up, and referring each other. You are selling something that delivers.



**2. You are part of a real team.** We are building out 100+ closers across all territories, but we do it properly. You are not one of thousands dialling into a chaotic floor. You get proper coaching, real territory, clear structure, and a Cold Caller Manager who knows your name and your numbers.



**3. You have a growth path.** Mississippi is the start. As we launch new chapters, top performers get first pick. Build your book with us and grow as we grow.



**4. You get real support.** Cold Caller Manager in twice-weekly coaching sessions. Direct line to Marco Fernandes (Sales Director, 39 years of sales experience). Proven script refined across thousands of calls. Calendar booking, leads, and territory handed to you.



---



## The Daily Reality



Let us be honest about what the day looks like:



- **9:00 PM - 6:00 AM Philippines Time** (8:00 AM - 5:00 PM Mississippi Central Time) - yes, graveyard

- Monday to Friday, five nights a week

- **300 dials or 120 connects minimum per day** from Day 2 (whichever you hit first)

- **10+ event bookings per day** (prospects committed to attend the next Start Over event), OR 1+ direct sale, OR 15+ strong Zoom follow-ups booked

- Log every call in real time on the shared tracker

- End-of-day report to the Cold Caller Manager

- Twice weekly meetings (Tuesdays and Fridays typically)



It is not light work. Cold calling is hard. Graveyard is harder. But it is clear work with clear outcomes, and for the right person it pays better than almost anything else a Filipino remote worker can do.



---



## We Are Looking For Someone Who



**Must have:**

- 2+ years phone sales or closing experience

- **OnlineJobs.ph ID Proof 60+** verified on your profile

- **NBI clearance** (or willingness to obtain within 2 weeks of hire)

- Strong English, clear accent, professional tone

- Real experience closing on the call (not just setting appointments)

- Can commit to 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift, Monday to Friday

- Own Zoom Pro account

- Reliable internet (**25+ Mbps** - speed test screenshot required with application), quiet space, good headset



**Will thrive if you:**

- Have sold coaching, consulting, BNI, networking memberships, or community products before

- Care about what you sell, not just about commission

- Take coaching well

- Can handle "no" all day without losing energy

- Want a long-term role, not a quick gig



---



## Honest Caveats



- The first chapter in every territory is the hardest. List building, market education, all of it.

- Your first week, you may not close. That is normal. Week 2 is where the trial gate lives.

- Mississippi is a smaller market than our other chapters. That means you can cover the whole state, but you will also work the list harder.

- Overnight shifts are tough. Please do not apply if you cannot genuinely commit to the schedule long-term.



---



## Verification and Accountability



We use:

- **TimeProof** (you install on your machine, screenshots and activity tracking)

- **GoHighLevel / Ringover** (dial tracking, call recordings, connect verification)

- **Shared call tracker** (real-time logging)

- **Random call audits** (5+ recorded calls per contractor per day reviewed)



This is not surveillance for its own sake. It is so that:

1. We know you are working the hours you claim

2. You are protected if we ever question your output - the data has your back

3. Coaching can be real, because we can listen to your actual calls



We pay for work verified by these systems. Discrepancies get paid only to the verified level. Clear and fair.



**Zero tolerance for fraud:** Fabricated connects, mouse jigglers or other activity simulators, fake call logs, or dials to deliberately invalid numbers = immediate termination. Pay for fabricated work will be withheld or clawed back. This is the only thing we are strict about. Real closers never have an issue with this.



---



## Termination



Independent contractor. Either party can end the agreement at any time, with or without cause, without notice. We pay for all hours worked and commissions earned up to that point.



---



## Group Interview - Tomorrow



We are hosting a **group interview tomorrow (Saturday) at 7pm Manila time** (12pm UK, 7am Mississippi).



**Zoom link:**  







This is how we meet candidates at scale and make fast decisions. Come ready with:

- Webcam and microphone working

- Professional background and attire

- Ready to do a short live roleplay on a cold call

- Questions about the role



If you cannot attend live, send your application anyway and we will include you in the next round.



---



## How To Apply



Message us through OnlineJobs.ph with:



1. **Name and location**

2. **Internet speed test screenshot** (from speedtest.net - must show 25+ Mbps)

3. **ID Proof score** (60+ required) and NBI clearance status

4. **Short summary of your sales experience** - where, what, for how long

5. **A 2-3 minute voice recording** where you:

   - Introduce yourself

   - Answer this directly: **"Can you do 120 connects per night and close $1,500 deals? Prove it."**

   - Handle this objection
 *"I am already in BNI, why would I need another group?"*

6. **Your earliest start date**

7. **Confirmation that you can work 9:00 PM - 6:00 AM PHT graveyard shift** consistently



No voice recording = we cannot review you. We hire on voice, not paper, for phone sales roles.



---



**Start Over Movement. Building real communities. Paying real money. Looking for one real closer in Mississippi.**



We look forward to meeting you tomorrow

title: AI Video creator for fashion store dropshipping
