title: Funnel Builder (Funnelish Experience Required)
description:
We're looking for a full-time Funnel Builder who doesn't just build — but thinks. You have proven Funnelish experience, you can write advertorials yourself, and you use AI tools daily to work faster and smarter.

The target output is 2–3 funnels per day. With our SOPs, templates, and proven structures, this is absolutely achievable. You'll build 1 strong core funnel per day and create 2–3 translated or adapted versions for other markets.

But speed alone isn't enough. We want someone who researches competitors, spots winning patterns, and comes to us with new angles to test — before we ask. You have a point of view on what converts and why.

We also need someone who can breathe new life into our proven winners. You take funnels that already performed, dig into current market trends, and come back with fresh advertorials, new hooks, and creative angles that make them convert again. You don't let a winner die — you evolve it.

You must be comfortable writing compelling copy — advertorials, headlines, CTAs — without needing someone else to hand you the words. You use AI (ChatGPT, Claude, or similar) not as a crutch, but as a multiplier.

Communication is extremely important. If something is delayed, unclear, or not achievable within the deadline, you communicate immediately. We value transparency, ownership, and reliability. Being fully present during working hours and proactively updating progress is non-negotiable.

We are looking for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment, takes responsibility, and wants to build at scale long-term.



How to Apply

Start your application with "I am that person" and show us:



Links to 2–3 funnels you've built in Funnelish

Advertorials you have made from scratch

Which AI tools you use and how they make you faster

title: WordPress + SEO Operator — Own Our Website
description:
The role

Around Finance is a modern Irish accountancy firm and we're scaling. We're building an in-house marketing function and need a senior WordPress operator to own our website as a marketing asset.



This starts as on-call work — but the right person grows into a permanent fixture as we expand over the next 12–18 months. We want someone who'll learn our business, get faster and better with us, and become someone we trust without question.

You'd work directly with Richie (founder/CEO).



How it works

I send a Loom or written brief. You quote hours and turnaround. You complete the work and invoice. Sometimes that's 1 hour, sometimes 15, sometimes nothing for a month.

This works if you already have 2–3 anchor clients and want flexible top-up work. It doesn't work if you're looking for guaranteed weekly hours from day one.

The remit



Own the website. In practice that means:



WordPress page builds, edits, and updates

New landing pages from templates or from briefs

Theme refinements as the brand evolves

Conversion improvements — CTAs, forms, page structure, lead capture

On-page SEO — Yoast, schema, internal linking, image optimisation, URL structure, redirects

Technical hygiene — page speed, mobile, plugin management, security

Tracking — GA4, GTM, conversion events, Search Console

Monthly SEMrush research — competitor gaps, ranking opportunities, search intent shifts. One-page Notion summary, top 3–5 opportunities flagged.



If something needs a specialist developer or designer, flag it and we'll bring one in. The more you can own end-to-end, the better.

What we're looking for



3+ years WordPress experience

Previous experience with US, AUS, or UK professional services or B2B agency clients — strong preference, not optional

Strong on-page SEO — Yoast, schema, internal linking, image optimisation

Comfortable running SEMrush and presenting findings clearly

Familiarity with Search Console and GA4

Background in accounting, legal, financial services, or premium professional services is a real advantage

Excellent written English

Reliable turnaround on agreed timelines (24–72 hours)

Comfortable with on-call rather than guaranteed hours



Show us examples of your work.

A portfolio, links to live sites, or a Loom walkthrough. We don't need access to private back-ends.

What success looks like



Briefs completed accurately first time

Turnaround matches what you quoted

You flag issues before I notice them

You respond within 24 hours, even if it's "I can't take this one"

The website gets measurably better — speed, conversion, rankings, hygiene



Not a fit



Looking for full-time or guaranteed hours

Only worked for local PH clients or entry-level accounts

Need a lot of direction to get started

Want a minimum monthly retainer to commit



First task

First engagement is a small paid task (1–2 hours) so we can see how you work. If it goes well, we continue. If not, we part on good terms and you've been paid for your time.

How to apply



Start your message with the word TEMPLATES — applications without it won't be read.



Then tell us:



Who you've worked for, especially US, AUS, or UK professional services or agency clients

Examples of your WordPress work

Your on-page SEO and SEMrush experience

Your hourly rate in USD

Your current client load and capacity for ad-hoc work

How you'd handle a month with zero work from us





SKILL REQUIREMENT

WordPress, On-Page SEO, Search Engine Optimization

title: CUSTOMER SUPPORT VA - SHOPIFY ECOMMERCE (REMOTE, LONG-TERM)
description:
CUSTOMER SERVICE SPECIALIST - ECOMMERCE (DROPSHIPPING)

Remote | Part-Time | 4-6 Hours Per Day | 7 Days a Week

$3-4 per hour (approximately PHP 209/hour) | Growth opportunities for long-term contributors

 

-------------------------

 

This is a long-term role. We are not looking for someone for one month. We want someone we can grow with, give more responsibility to, and pay more over time. Our existing CS team has been with us for years, and we want the same for this new hire.

 

-------------------------

 

ABOUT THE ROLE

 

You will handle customer
 tickets for our Shopify-based ecommerce dropshipping brand. That means working through an inbox of 80 to 100 tickets per shift in Gorgias: order status inquiries, cancellation requests, returns and refunds, damaged or lost package cases, and size or quality complaints. You will use our documented SOPs and reply macros to resolve cases consistently, professionally, and with care.

 

This is not a chat role, not a phone role, and not a social media role. It is
 ticket handling in Gorgias, every day.

 

-------------------------

 

WHAT YOU WILL DO

 

- Reply to customer
 tickets in Gorgias using our documented SOPs and reply macros

- Hit team KPIs on First Response Time (FRT) and resolution time

- Coordinate with our Supply Chain and Disputes teams when cases require handoff

- Process refunds, replacements, and partial refunds within the approved decision tree

- Escalate cases that fall outside policy to the CS Manager with a clear summary

- Flag products with recurring complaints to the Quality team on a weekly basis

- Keep clean notes on tickets so handoffs are seamless

-------------------------

 

WHAT YOU WILL HAVE FROM DAY 1

 

- A full Customer Support SOP covering every scenario you will encounter

- Gorgias reply macros for common situations (cancellations, RTS, damaged items, lost in transit, and more)

- A Risky Products SOP for weekly product quality reporting

- Direct access to the CS Manager for escalations and questions

- An existing CS team to learn from, not a brand new setup

You do not need to invent the playbook. We have built it. You need to execute it cleanly and consistently.

 

-------------------------

 

REQUIREMENTS

 

- Hands-on experience in ecommerce customer support, dropshipping customer support, OR Shopify-based CS (any combination works, dropshipping experience is a strong plus)

- Experience with Gorgias OR a comparable ticketing tool (Zendesk, Reamaze, Freshdesk). Direct Gorgias is preferred but we can train on it quickly if you have strong Zendesk experience.

- Comfort handling 80 to 100 tickets per shift without falling behind

- Strong written English: clear, empathetic, and professional

- Reliable internet and your own computer

Bonus (not required):

- Prior experience handling RTS (return-to-sender) situations

- Familiarity with chargebacks and dispute processes in dropshipping

- Prior experience with EU customers and their return expectations

-------------------------

 

SCHEDULE - READ THIS BEFORE APPLYING

 

This role is 7 days a week, every week. Our customers
 every day including weekends and public holidays. If you cannot commit to working 7 days a week, please do not apply. We will not make exceptions, and applying anyway only wastes both our time.

 

You can flex your specific working hours within the day as long as tickets are handled within our FRT target.

 

-------------------------

 

COMPENSATION DETAILS

 

Paid weekly via Wise. Rate grows with performance and tenure, we promote from within for team leads and specialist roles.

 

-------------------------

 

HOW TO APPLY

 

Read this section carefully. Applications that do not follow these instructions will be rejected without review.

 

1. Put the word PAPAYA in your subject line. Nothing else is required in the subject.

2. In your application message, answer these 4 questions in order. Answer each inline, no attachments, no Loom videos at this stage.

Q1. How long have you worked in ecommerce customer support, and for what type of companies (dropshipping, DTC, marketplace, etc.)? Name the actual companies and your role there.

 

Q2. Describe one difficult customer ticket you resolved. What was the issue, what did the customer want, and how did you handle it? Keep it specific.

 

Q3. What ticketing tools have you used (Gorgias, Zendesk, Reamaze, Freshdesk, etc.)? What ticket volume per shift have you typically handled, and what is the most you have ever handled in a shift?

 

Q4. Confirm your availability: hours per day, days per week (we need 7), and your working hours in your local timezone. Also confirm: are you currently employed, and if yes, what would your start date look like?

 

-------------------------

 

We read every application that follows the instructions. We are looking for one person for the long term, not a roster of temporary help.

title: Talent Acquisition Agent
description:
About the Role

We are a fast-growing digital operations company seeking a highly detail-oriented Talent Acquisition Agent to join our team. This role is ideal for someone who thrives in a structured environment, communicates clearly in English, and can consistently deliver high-quality.



Key Responsibilities

- Follow established SOPs and recruitment workflows with precision

- Maintain accurate and organized candidate records

- Communicate professionally with candidates and internal stakeholders

- Ensure consistency and quality throughout the hiring process



Requirements

- Excellent written and spoken English communication skills

- Strong attention to detail and organizational ability

- Proven ability to follow SOPs and structured processes

- High level of consistency, accountability, and reliability

- Flexible availability and willingness to work varying schedules

- Previous experience in recruitment or talent acquisition is a plus



What We Offer

- 100% remote work environment

- Fixed, stable salary

- Structured daily workflow and clear expectations

- Opportunities for growth into operations and management roles

- Availability to work a fixed daily schedule (Schedule to be discussed)



How to Apply

If you are detail-oriented, consistent, and ready to grow within a structured recruitment environment, we’d love to hear from you. Submit your application along with a brief introduction highlighting your experience and availability.

title: Direct Response Copy Lead
description:
Note: Please do not apply unless you have at least 1 year of experience working with DTC or ecommerce brands.



Job Description:

We are hiring a proactive and performance-driven Copy Lead to support DTC ecommerce brands through direct-response marketing. This is a freelance, fully remote role for someone who can help drive measurable growth across paid media and landing page performance. The role is full-time with flexible working hours.



Company: The Lion Advisory

Website: 



Language: English

Availability: Full-time, 40 hours per week

Time Zone: Flexible

Work Type: Remote freelance

Industry: Agency / Service Provider

Compensation: $2,000 to $4,000, (Negotiable)





Responsibilities:



-Plan, launch, and optimize direct-response paid media campaigns for DTC ecommerce brands

-Write and refine performance-focused ad angles, hooks, and messaging based on customer awareness and intent

-Track daily performance metrics such as CPA, ROAS, MER, CTR, CVR, and AOV, and make data-backed optimizations

-Build and manage a structured testing roadmap across creatives, offers, landing pages, and funnel steps

-Review and improve landing pages and purchase flows to increase conversion rates and reduce drop-off

-Create clear performance reports and turn data into actionable next steps and test priorities

-Collaborate with creative or production teams to brief, review, and improve ad assets based on performance



Must-Haves:

title: Shopify Ecommerce Operations Manager
description:

We are looking for a senior Ecommerce Operations Manager with strong Shopify experience to oversee the day-to-day operations of a growing DTC brand. This is a full-time, remote freelance role focused on keeping the online store, fulfillment pipeline, and operational systems running smoothly while improving speed, accuracy, compliance, and customer experience.



Company: The Lion Advisory

Website: 



Language: English

Availability: Full Time, 40 hours per week

Time Zone: AEST

Work Type: Freelance, Remote, Flexible Hours

Niche: Performance-Focused DTC, Ecommerce, Shopify

Payment: $ 2,000 - $ 4,000

Role Details: Operations Manager, Ecommerce (Shopify)



Responsibilities



-Manage the daily operations of the Shopify store to ensure listings, pricing, promotions, and overall store performance are accurate and up to date

-Oversee the full order process from checkout to dispatch, tracking, returns, and issue resolution with a focus on speed and accuracy

-Build, document, and improve SOPs across inventory management, warehouse workflows, and 3PL coordination

-Forecast demand and manage stock levels across SKUs to avoid stockouts and reduce excess inventory

-Track and improve core operational KPIs such as fulfillment time, shipping cost, COGS, return rate, and customer satisfaction

-Manage the operational tech stack, including Shopify apps and key integrations, to automate workflows and reduce manual tasks

-Work closely with marketing to support campaign launches, seasonal promotions, and subscription or recurring order programs

-Manage relationships with carriers, suppliers, packaging partners, and 3PLs while maintaining service quality as the business grows

-Identify operational issues that affect customer experience and implement fixes that improve retention and satisfaction

-Ensure operations follow relevant Australian compliance requirements for regulated health or therapeutic products sold online



Must-Haves



-5 to 8+ years of ecommerce operations experience, ideally in regulated categories such as health, wellness, supplements, or similar

-Strong hands-on Shopify experience, including admin workflows, app ecosystem knowledge, and platform limitations

-Proven experience managing fulfillment operations, inventory planning, and 3PL relationships at scale in Australia

-Strong analytical skills with experience in KPI reporting, dashboards, and data-driven decision-making

-Experience with ecommerce operations tools such as ShipStation, Starshipit, Cin7, TradeGecko, QuickBooks Commerce, or -similar platforms

-Strong project management skills with the ability to handle multiple workstreams and meet deadlines

-Process improvement mindset with a track record of identifying issues and implementing long-term fixes

-Working knowledge of Australian compliance requirements for regulated health or therapeutic goods sold online, including TGA-related considerations



Nice to Haves



-Experience in telehealth, pharmaceutical, medtech, or other regulated industries

-Familiarity with subscription or recurring ecommerce operations and logistics

-Familiarity with Shopify ecosystem tools like Klaviyo, Recharge, or loyalty platforms

-Experience working in founder-led or high-growth businesses where systems and processes are still being built



Benefits



-Competitive pay based on experience

-High ownership role with direct access to leadership

-Flexible remote work setup

-Opportunity to build and improve systems in a growing company

-Access to company products or services where applicable

description:

/Instagram — direct response, not brand fluff. You'll work from scripts we provide but you're expected to bring your own creative input. Specifically:

title: Executive Assistant / Chief of Staff — Startup Co-Founder (Long-term, 30+ Hours/Week)
description:
READ THIS FIRST

This application requires a 3-minute Loom video. Applications without one will not be reviewed. We watch every Loom we receive. If yours is generic or clearly recycled from other applications, we'll notice.



========================================



ABOUT US

We're two US-based co-founders building a services company for the medical spa industry (think: nice salons that also offer Botox and laser treatments). The industry is growing fast, and most of these businesses are owned by solo operators who are drowning in the day-to-day of running them. We help them get their time and their business back.



We're at the very beginning — you would be our first hire. This means you will see how a company gets built from zero. Your work will directly shape how we run the business going forward. What you build in your first 90 days becomes the playbook for everyone who joins after you. We want someone who wants to grow with us long-term, not someone looking for one more gig.



This is NOT a front desk role. This is NOT a data entry role. This is a "right hand" role where you help one of the founders get 10x more done.



========================================



WHAT YOU'D ACTUALLY DO

No two weeks will look the same. We're early-stage, which means there will always be a new challenge, a new opportunity, or something we haven't figured out yet. If you want a predictable, same-thing-every-day role, this isn't it. If you get energy from variety and from figuring out new things, keep reading.



A typical week might include any of the following:



RESEARCH AND PROSPECT BUILDING. Building target lists of potential customers, researching their businesses on Instagram/LinkedIn/Google, finding contact info, noting interesting angles for outreach.



DRAFTING OUTREACH. Personalized
s, LinkedIn messages, and follow-ups to prospects. I'll review and approve, and you'll learn our voice fast and get better every week.



BUILDING SOPs. Every time we do something twice, you document how we do it. Our SOP library becomes one of the most valuable things we own.



SCHEDULING AND COORDINATION. My calendar, meetings with prospects and partners, travel, follow-ups.



VENDOR RESEARCH. We work with software, compliance, marketing, and supply vendors. You'll research options, compare, and summarize for me.



INBOX AND COMMUNICATION SUPPORT. Drafting replies, flagging what's important, keeping things from falling through the cracks.



GENERAL "FIGURE IT OUT" WORK. When something new comes up and neither of us has time to do it, you take it, figure it out, and come back with a recommendation.



You will use AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, others) heavily. We expect this. We don't want you writing every
 from scratch when AI can give you a first draft in 30 seconds.



========================================



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR



THE MUST-HAVES:

EXCELLENT WRITTEN ENGLISH. You write clearly, professionally, and you can match different tones (warm cold outreach, crisp internal updates, formal vendor
s).



HIGH AGENCY. When you get a task, you don't wait for step-by-step instructions. You figure out what "done" looks like, clarify anything truly ambiguous upfront, and drive it to finished.



AI FLUENCY. You already use ChatGPT/Claude/similar daily. You know when to use them and when not to. You can explain how you prompt them.



COMFORTABLE TELLING ME WHEN YOU NEED MORE WORK. If you finish your tasks by Wednesday, you tell me and ask what's next. Coasting quietly is the one thing that won't work here.



RELIABLE ASYNC COMMUNICATOR. Daily check-ins, Loom videos when text is harder, clear status updates, nothing goes dark.



AVAILABLE DURING 8AM–12PM MANILA TIME for overlap with me. Rest of your hours are on your own schedule.



THE NICE-TO-HAVES:

Experience with a US small business or startup. Experience with CRM tools (HubSpot, Close, etc.). Sales/BDR background. Any healthcare, wellness, or beauty industry exposure.



YOU DO NOT NEED:

A degree. Prior med spa experience (we'll teach you).



========================================



THE DETAILS

HOURS. 30+ hours/week to start, growing to full-time (40 hours) within 120 days based on performance.



SCHEDULE. 3 hours overlap with me (9am–12pm Manila), remaining hours on your own schedule.



PAY. $11/hour straight. We're paying above the typical OnlineJobs.ph range on purpose — we want top-tier people and expect top-tier work. Quarterly performance reviews with raises for great work. Discretionary bonuses for specific wins (for example, $500 the first time an outreach campaign you built generates a closed customer).



START. As soon as we find the right person.



LONG-TERM. We want someone for the long haul. If you're building your career, we want to build it with you.



========================================



HOW TO APPLY

Please send me the following four things:



FIRST — A SHORT LOOM VIDEO (3 MINUTES MAX) introducing yourself. Tell me: who you are, what you're doing now, one project you're proud of, and why this role interests you. This is the most important part of your application. I will watch it before I read anything else.



SECOND — YOUR RESUME or a link to your profile.



THIRD — YOUR FAVORITE AI TOOL AND HOW YOU USE IT, in two or three sentences.



FOURTH — ANSWER THIS QUESTION IN YOUR APPLICATION: "You sent a cold outreach
 on my behalf. A prospect replies with a question you don't know the answer to, and I'm asleep. What do you do?"



APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A LOOM WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.



========================================



WHAT HAPPENS NEXT

If your application stands out, I'll invite you to a short paid trial project ($30 flat for roughly 3 hours of work) so we can see how you think and work. The trial is a real task — the work you do will actually be useful to us.



From there, I'll pick one person for a 2-week paid trial period at the full rate, and if that goes well, we hire.



Looking forward to meeting you.

title: # Senior German-Speaking Customer Happiness Manager — Premium Health E-Commerce (Long-Term, Remote)
description:
## About Rekuria



Rekuria is a fast-growing premium health & wellness brand in the DACH market (Germany, Austria, Switzerland). Our flagship product — **Neckify**, an electronic neck massage device — helps thousands of people relieve neck pain naturally, without medication.



Our mission is simple: **free people from chronic neck pain through natural, medication-free self-care.**



We're not a typical dropshipping store. We're building a long-term health brand with a strong community, high customer LTV, and a voice that customers genuinely trust. That's where **you** come in.



---



## The Role: You Become "Rebecca"



You won't just answer tickets. You'll **become the voice of Rebecca** — Rekuria's dedicated customer care persona. Rebecca is:



- **Medically informed** — knows health topics, understands pain, speaks with authority

- **Warm & empathetic** — customers feel safe and in good hands

- **Educational** — empowers people to take action for themselves, explains the "why"

- **Fact-based & compliant** — never over-promises, never makes illegal health claims

- **Alternative-minded** — champion of natural, medication-free relief



Rebecca is the reason customers come back, tell their friends, and leave unsolicited 5-star reviews. That's the bar.



---



## Your Mission



Your success is measured by 4 numbers:



1. **Near-zero return rate** — because you solve problems before they become returns

2. **Near-zero chargeback rate** — because you spot escalations early and de-escalate

3. **High 5-star review volume** — customers review us because they want to, not because we beg

4. **Low ticket volume relative to order volume** — because you build smart automations, FAQs, and flows that prevent tickets from ever being created



If you only "answer tickets," you're not the right fit. If you want to **architect a customer experience system**, you are.



---



## What You'll Do



- Handle all customer conversations across *
 (Gorgias), Instagram DMs, TikTok DMs, Meta/Facebook, and WhatsApp**

- Write in Rebecca's voice: medical, professional, warm, empowering

- Proactively prevent returns and chargebacks (identify at-risk customers, reach out before they escalate)

- Build and maintain **SOPs, macros, FAQs, and Klaviyo post-purchase flows** that reduce repetitive tickets

- Solicit UGC and 5-star reviews at the right 
nts

- Stay 100% compliant with **German health advertising law (HWG), Medical Device Regulation (MDR/MPG), and Meta/Google health ad policies**

- Document everything in Notion, record Loom walkthroughs, use Claude and modern AI tools to work smarter

- Report weekly on KPIs and propose improvements



---



## Must-Haves (Non-Negotiable)



- **3+ years** of E-Commerce customer support experience for Shopify brands

- **Direct experience in the Health / Wellness / Medical Device niche** — you understand compliance, you know what can and cannot be said

- **Fluent German (C1 minimum, native-level preferred)** — ideally from working multiple years with a German brand

- Hands-on experience with **Gorgias, Shopify, and Klaviyo**

- Familiarity with **HWG, MPG/MDR, and health ad policies on Meta + Google**

- Comfortable with **Loom, Notion, Zoom, Claude, and AI tools**

- Strong writer — can adapt tone from clinical to warm in one sentence

- Self-starter — you don't wait to be told what to do

- Stable internet, quiet workspace, reliable hours



## Nice-to-Haves



- Experience preventing chargebacks (Stripe / PayPal disputes)

- Copywriting or UGC-solicitation background

- Team lead experience (you'll onboard a second CS hire within 6–12 months if we grow together)



---



## ???????? Deutscher Abschnitt — bitte auf Deutsch beantworten



Wenn du bis hierher gekommen bist: Willkommen. Der nächste Teil ist auf Deutsch, weil du mit deutschen Kunden arbeiten wirst.



**Szenario:** Eine Kundin schreibt nach 3 Tagen: "Das Gerät hilft nicht, ich habe immer noch Schmerzen. Ich will mein Geld zurück."



**Aufgabe:** Schreibe in 3–5 Sätzen, wie Rebecca diese Nachricht beantworten würde. Keine Standardfloskeln — zeig uns, dass du die Marke verstehst.



(Falls du diesen Abschnitt nicht verstehst oder nicht auf Deutsch antworten kannst, ist diese Rolle nicht die richtige für dich — das ist völlig okay, wir suchen den perfekten Fit.)



---



## Work Setup



- **Hours:** 3 hours/day, 7 days/week to start (~21 hrs/week)

- **Growth path:** Can scale to full-time within 3–6 months based on performance

- **Schedule:** Must cover DACH business hours (Central European Time)

- **Location:** 100% remote

- **Compensation:** Competitive, negotiable based on experience. Senior specialists in this niche typically earn $8–$15/hr. We pay for skill, not for time.

- **Long-term:** We're looking for a multi-year partnership, not a short-term hire. As Rekuria grows, you grow with us — more hours, higher pay, leadership opportunities.



---



## How to Apply (Read Carefully — This Is a Filter)



Applications that don't follow these steps will be ignored. We're serious about hiring one excellent person, not screening 200 generic applicants.



**Step 1:** Start your application with the word **NECKIFY** on the first line. This is how we know you read the entire post.



**Step 2:** Answer these 4 questions (short, direct, no fluff):



1. Which German (or DACH) e-commerce brand(s) have you worked for? How long, and what niche? (type down their domains)

2. What's one specific example of how you prevented a return or chargeback? Walk us through the situation and what you said.

3. Which tools from our stack have you actively used (not just heard of): Gorgias, Shopify, Klaviyo, Notion, Loom, Claude?

4. What do you know about HWG and health advertising compliance in Germany?



**Step 3:** Complete the German scenario above (3–5 sentences in German).



**Step 4:** Record a **60–90 second Loom video** introducing yourself. We want to see your communication style, not your studio lighting. Share the Loom link in your application.



**Step 5 (optional but strong signal):** If you have any recorded samples of customer responses you're proud of (anonymized), link to them.



---



## What Happens Next



1. We review applications and shortlist the top 3–5 candidates

2. 30-minute paid video interview (Zoom) with the founder

3. Paid trial task: Handle 5 real customer tickets in Rebecca's voice — you get paid regardless of outcome

4. Offer to the best fit — long-term partnership, clear growth path



---



**We're building something that genuinely helps people live pain-free lives. If that mission resonates with you, and you have the skills above, we want to hear from you.**



— Rekuria

title: AI Video Editor
description:

You will be responsible for creating videos from scratch using AI tools, not just editing existing footage.



While being familiar with certain AI video editing apps as listed you have to be able to quickly adapt to new software with the purpose of improving video quality and further AI video designs.



This role is focused on high volume, high quality short-form content creation. You will be working on realistic AI videos, talking content, and product-style videos, with the goal of scaling output across multiple accounts.



If hired, you will be joining a fast growing team with long term opportunity, consistent pay, and room to grow as we scale.



-



Main Responsibilities:

• Create and edit AI related content

• Follow scripts exactly as provided (word for word)

• Recreate high-performing videos and produce variations at scale

• Create realistic, natural looking videos (not robotic or over-edited)

• Be able to respond quickly, great at communication (English is heavily preferred) and have the ability to efficiently create AI content

• Have the ability to learn quickly and adapt according to market trends

• Assist in increasing output to multiple videos per day across different formats



-



Requirements:

• Create quality AI content for social media platforms such as TikTok, Instagram, etc.

• Quality work station such as environment and computer/laptop

• Dedicated and willing to work hard

• Great communication & fast internet speeds

• Be available on 
 and Slack

• Ability to accept feedback and follow instructions

• Understand and speak English well

• Must be comfortable working in a fast-paced, high output environment



-



Important Notes:

• You must be able to follow instructions very closely

• Attention to detail is extremely important in this role

• We prioritize execution, speed, and consistency

• You will be expected to produce multiple pieces of content daily (including variations)

• As you improve, you will take on more responsibility in the content creation process



-



Application Process:



If you are interested in this role and feel as if you are capable of taking this on full time, follow the Google form link and answer ALL the questions: (if everything is not filled in, I will assume you are not paying attention to the details)



If we believe you are the best fit for our company, we will reach out to you with further information to partake in our mandatory application project. This project will be short but it is very important to gauge your strengths, weaknesses, work load capabilities, ability to listen/follow instructions, and ultimately the quality of the edits.



-



Compensation & Growth:



$350–$500/month base with performance bonuses





This is a full-time role with a fixed monthly salary.



Performance-based bonuses are also provided based on output, quality, and overall content performance.



High performers will have the opportunity to earn more over time as they take on greater responsibility and increase content output.



We reward consistency, speed, and high-quality execution.



-



Final Note:



We are looking for A player candidates to be a part of our team as this is the standard we have within our company. We are growing extremely fast and are looking to scale content output aggressively while maintaining quality.



Again, please make sure you fill out the Google form as a majority of the review process will be done through this Google form.

title: E-commerce Fashion Creative Designer (Photos & Video Ads)
description:
We are a growing women’s fashion e-commerce brand looking for a creative and detail-oriented designer to help us create high-quality visuals for our website, social media, and paid ads.



This role is focused on creating content that not only looks beautiful but also drives sales. We are looking for someone who understands fashion, trends, and how to create engaging ad creatives.



Responsibilities:

Edit and enhance product photos for our Shopify website

Create high-converting image creatives for Meta 
/Instagram) ads

Edit short-form video content for ads (TikTok, Instagram Reels, etc.)

Use AI tools (such as Freepik) to generate and enhance visuals when needed

Follow structured prompts to create consistent model-based visuals

Add simple text overlays when needed (e.g. “Selling Fast”, “Back in Stock”)

Maintain a clean, luxury, and consistent brand aesthetic

Organize and deliver files in a timely manner

Weekly Content Expectations (IMPORTANT):



You will be responsible for creating full creative packages for approximately 5 products per week.



Each product will require:



Images:



5–8 edited product images

Mix of clean website images and ad-style creatives

Use of AI (Freepik) to create lifestyle/model-based visuals

Ability to work with a main model look and alternative model variations

Maintain consistency in model appearance, styling, and overall brand aesthetic



Videos:



2–4 short-form videos per product (10–20 seconds each)

Different styles including product-focused, aesthetic, and ad-style edits



You must be able to follow structured prompts and maintain consistency across all creatives.



Workload may increase after initial onboarding based on performance.



Requirements:

Experience with e-commerce or fashion brands (REQUIRED)

Strong skills in photo editing (Photoshop, Lightroom, or similar)

Strong video editing skills (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

Must be comfortable using AI tools such as Freepik (access will be provided)

Ability to follow creative direction and structured prompts

Ability to create ad creatives that convert (not just look good)

Understanding of current social media trends (TikTok, Instagram)

Strong attention to detail and fast turnaround time

Reliable communication

Nice to Have:

Experience creating Meta ad creatives

Experience working with Shopify brands

Basic understanding of marketing and customer psychology

Experience using AI-generated content in ads

To Apply:



Please include:



Portfolio or samples of previous work (especially fashion or e-commerce)

Examples of ads or creatives you have made

Your experience using AI tools (especially Freepik or similar)

Your favorite fashion brand (to understand your style)

The word “Lavish” at the start of your application (to confirm you read this)

Pay:



We are looking for someone long-term who can grow with our brand.

title: Online Dating & Social Media Virtual Assistant (Hinge, Instagram & More) – Remote
description:
Online Dating & Social Media Virtual Assistant (Hinge, Instagram & More) – Remote



Position: Online Dating Virtual Assistant

Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Hours: 10 to 20 hours per week - Part-Time (Flexible Schedule)

Salary: $4 - $6 per hour (depending on experience)



Important Information:

Read through entire job posting before applying.

I will only consider those who read through this entire job posting and follow steps 1 - 6 provided below to apply. And correctly message with the two google drive URLs completed and filled out in a message.



Job Description

I’m looking for a virtual assistant to help manage and optimize dating apps like Hinge, Bumble, Tinder. 

Your role will involve:



Swiping and engaging with matches based on specific strategies

Conducting split tests to analyze and improve overall performance

Tracking engagement patterns and making data-driven adjustments

Following structured messaging and interaction techniques

Providing feedback on profile performance and match quality

Instagram Profile Research

Data management



This role requires someone with strong decision-making skills, a keen eye for detail, and the ability to understand dating psychology and user behavior.



Requirements



Fully fluent in English (written & spoken)

Open-minded and willing to learn

Comfortable following structured engagement strategies

Detail-oriented and able to track results

Previous experience in social media, dating apps, or engagement-based roles is a plus (but not required)



Technology & Tools Needed



To perform this role effectively, you’ll need access to:



Smartphone (iPhone or Android) – To access dating apps like Hinge

Laptop or Desktop Computer – For tracking results and conducting split tests

Stable Internet Connection – At least 10 Mbps for smooth app usage and communication



Software & Tools Required:



Hinge & Other Dating Apps – Comfortable navigating and using dating apps

Instagram - Comfortable navigating and using Instagram

Google Sheets or Excel – For tracking engagement data and split test results

Zoom, Google Meet, or Slack – For check-ins and strategy discussions

VPN – In case location spoofing is required for testing different regions



Nice-to-Have Skills & Tools:



Basic Photo Editing Software (Canva, Photoshop, etc.) – For minor profile optimizations



*MANDATORY*

How to Apply:



Step 1:

Open Application Google Form google form the Google Form:

----------



Step 2:

"Make a copy of the google form"

File > Make A Copy



Step 3:

File out all information found within google sheet

(Including name, age, gender, city,
 etc...)



Step 4:

Ensure you provide full URL links where applicable with the sheet

(Ensure the screenshot of your internet speed is provided via a clickable/viewable URL. DO NOT HYPERLINK)



Step 5:

Follow the "Taste Test" (Information linked below)

Repeat Step 1 to 3 related to the second "taste test* google sheet:

----------



Step 6:

Submit both Dating App Application Google Sheet + Taste Test Google Sheet via sharable URL in a message response to this job posting.

Ensure to answer all the application questions provided on document

Ensure all links you've provided are "viewable" URLs and NOT HYPERLINKS



To further clarify, any submission on this job posting should have two URL links to two separate google sheets, which are "viewable" to anyone with the link. These sheets should have all information answered accurately.



We will only consider those who fill out the application correctly, and fully. So please ensure you follow all provided steps.

I will not accept any substitute. If you can't take the 10 to 20 minutes to fill out this application correctly, you will not be a good fit for this long term position.



We look forward to your application

title: Experienced Virtual Assistant – MUST-HAVE Skills for Dual Brands
description:
Hi !



We are looking for a high-level Virtual Assistant to support two growing businesses in the construction and decorative finishes industry.



This is not a basic admin role — we are looking for someone who is organised, detail-oriented, and comfortable working with systems, data, and processes.



???? Important: We already have SOPs and training videos in place for our systems. However, it is a strong advantage if you already have experience using some of the tools listed below. Also, you must be comfortable using time-tracking software to monitor tasks and productivity.



About Us



Venetian Glow Finishes (VGF)

A Sydney-based company specialising in high-end decorative finishes such as Venetian plaster and microcement for residential and commercial projects.



Pietra Marble Creations (PMC)

Our second business focuses on training courses and product supply for Venetian plaster and microcement systems.



Role Overview



This is a full-time remote position (Monday to Friday, 8 hours per day).



Working hours are flexible, starting between 8:00 am – 9:00 am Sydney time.



You will be responsible for supporting operations, maintaining systems, managing data, and assisting with day-to-day business coordination across both companies.



Key Responsibilities

1. Systems & SOP Management

Follow and maintain Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)

Help improve workflows and business processes

Assist in creating SOP documentation and training videos

2. CRM & Tools Management

Manage ActiveCampaign (contacts,
s, automations)

Work with tools such as:

Ascora (our job management software)

Square / Stripe

Calendly

OpenSign

Assist with quoting tools and systems

3. Client & Project Coordination

Send quotes, follow-ups, and confirmations

Track project progress and ensure records are updated

Support scheduling and calendar management

4.
 Management (Important)

Manage and organise 3 business
 inboxes

Respond, categorise, and prioritise
s

Ensure timely follow-ups and clear communication

5. Training Course Coordination (PMC)

Manage training course spreadsheets and trackers

Send reminders and follow-ups to students

Track leads and course participants

6. Reporting & Spreadsheets (VERY IMPORTANT)

Maintain Excel / Google Sheets

Create and improve project reports (costs, profit, tracking, etc.)

Organise data for better decision-making



???? This is a key part of the role. We are looking for someone strong in Excel and reporting.



7. Inventory & Operations Tracking

Manage inventory using Excel sheets and Square

Track materials, tools, and stock movement

Maintain accurate inventory records

8. Website & Content Updates

Upload content to Squarespace / WordPress

Assist with basic content updates

Required Skills

Strong Excel / Google Sheets skills (must)

High attention to detail

Strong organisation and time management

Good written English

Ability to follow systems and processes

Preferred (Bonus) Skills

Experience with:

Asana

ActiveCampaign

Ascora

Square / Stripe

Calendly

Squarespace or WordPress

Canva (intermediate level – not basic)

Experience with reporting or dashboards

Experience with document systems (e.g. Xerox)

Important Requirements

Must be available full-time (8 hours/day, Monday–Friday)

Must be responsive during working hours

Must be proactive and able to take initiative

Application Instructions (IMPORTANT)



To be considered, you must complete the following:



1. Subject Line



Include: I LOVE PINEAPPLE

Applications without this will not be reviewed.



2. Task Submission



Create ONE of the following:



An Instagram Reel, OR

An Instagram Carousel post ( link of this to be submitted with your application)



For Venetian Glow Finishes (VGF) using:



Existing content from our Instagram/website, OR

New content sourced online



Include:



Caption

Concept/idea



Looking forward to hearing from you!

Top performers in this role can earn up to $30,000 per year or more through base salary, commission, and bonuses.



We especially welcome fresh graduates from top Philippine universities such as UP, Ateneo, De La Salle, and UST. Applicants with backgrounds in biology, medicine, pharmacy, nursing, nutrition, public health, or other life science fields are highly preferred.

,

, or online communities for customer development

title: Online Dating Profile Manager - Bonus Included
description:
Job Overview:

I am seeking a highly organized, creative, and proactive Dating App Manager to handle all aspects of online dating profile management across multiple platforms. You will be responsible for setting up and optimizing profiles, swiping for potential matches, and engaging in meaningful initial conversations to create opportunities for connection. If you have a knack for creating compelling profiles, enjoy social interaction, and can manage multiple conversations effectively, this role is for you!



Key Responsibilities:

Create, update, and optimize dating app profiles to reflect the client's personality and preferences.

Manage profiles across 3+ dating platforms, ensuring consistency and engagement.

Swipe for matches based on pre-defined preferences and goals.

Craft engaging and creative conversation starters to initiate and sustain meaningful interactions.

Track and manage multiple conversations at once across various platforms.

Respond promptly and professionally to interactions while maintaining the client’s voice.

Monitor profile performance and implement strategies to increase quality matches.

Handle follow-ups, revive dead conversations, and manage communication timing.

Troubleshoot any issues related to account access or app functionality.



Qualifications:

Previous experience managing profiles on dating platforms such as Tinder, Bumble, Hinge, and maybe, others.

Familiarity with dating app algorithms, profile optimization techniques, and conversation strategies.

Excellent written communication skills with a strong ability to adapt to different tones and personalities.

Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple conversations and platforms simultaneously.

Creative and resourceful in writing bios, crafting messages, and troubleshooting issues.

Strong understanding of online privacy and discretion.



Preferred Experience:

Experience managing more than 3-5 dating profiles simultaneously.

Background in content creation, or customer engagement.

Understanding of dating trends, etiquette, and modern dating dynamics.



Key Skills:

Exceptional written communication and engagement skills

Organization and time management

Creativity and problem-solving

Adaptability and flexibility

Attention to detail



Availability & Compensation:

Flexible schedule, but must be able to dedicate consistent hours.

Pay is $5/hr + $10 bonus for each date that is set up.







How to Apply:



No applicant will be considered unless all questions are asked.

When can you start if hired?

How many hours a week can you work on this?

Which platforms have you managed before? Please list them all, as I’m looking to be on 3+ platforms.

I am looking for someone to set up profiles on sites I am not on, can you do this?

I am looking to have daily reports sent to me with potential matches in spreadsheet format, can you do that?

How do you approach writing profile bios and selecting photos for the best first impression?

How do you initiate conversations that catch someone’s attention?

title: Prop Firm Trader (FX / Futures / Crypto)
description:
Hello Traders!



Isla Capital is growing — and we’re looking to bring on disciplined, serious traders to join our team of elite traders.



We work with experienced prop firm traders to trade evaluation and funded accounts through firms such as FTMO, Apex, Alpha Capital Group, and similar platforms.



This opportunity is designed for Filipino professionals who understand prop firm rules, respect risk, and can trade with consistency and control.



This is not a casual trading role — it is a structured, performance-driven environment with a clear path toward higher earnings and long-term growth. Over time, this role will expand into live portfolio trading, where earning potential increases significantly.



What You’ll Do...



• Trade prop firm evaluation (challenge) accounts and funded accounts

• Strictly follow all prop firm rules and drawdown limits

• Maintain daily trading journals

• Provide consistent performance updates



What We’re Looking For...



• Experience trading prop firm accounts strongly preferred (or extensive live trading in lieu of prop firm experience)

• Strong risk management and discipline

• Ability to work independently

• Honest and reliable communication

• Understanding of scalping and/or day trading strategies



Compensation & Growth...



• Weekly base salary potential

• Bonus for passing evaluations / challenges

• Profit sharing on funded account payouts

• Performance bonuses based on payout milestones

• Access to in-house coaching from experienced traders

>> Upon certain milestones, we will also purchase additional prop accounts with copy trade software to multiply earnings



Important Notes...



• Accounts must be registered under the trader’s name (per prop firm rules), but all accounts and profits are part of Isla Capital

• All prop firm fees and account costs are fully covered by Isla Capital

• Strict confidentiality is required



Who This Is For...



This is a performance-first opportunity for traders who take their craft seriously.



We are building a system where disciplined Filipino traders can earn meaningful income and grow long-term within a structured trading environment.



If you are consistent, controlled, and committed — this could be a strong fit.



How to Apply...



Please apply and include:



• A short introduction about yourself

• Your prop firm experience and/or live trading 

• Your trading style and psychology

• Resume or link to resume (if available)



Let's build something serious together!

title: Remote Senior Nonprofit Bookkeeper
description:
About Us

We are a USA-based accounting and advisory firm dedicated exclusively to serving nonprofit organizations and mental health practices. We manage the complete accounting cycle for a portfolio of nonprofit clients simultaneously, delivering accurate, timely, and audit-ready financial records. Our clients trust us with the financial foundation of their missions. Every tea
mber we bring on is expected to perform at a professional level from day one, follow our documented systems, and take genuine ownership of their client portfolio.



About the Role

We are seeking a highly motivated, detail-oriented Senior Bookkeeper to join our team. In this role, you will oversee comprehensive bookkeeping functions, ensuring accuracy and compliance across all financial records for a portfolio of nonprofit clients. You will work within our established systems and be held to firm-wide standards of accuracy and deadlines from day one.



This is not an entry-level role. You are expected to arrive with a fully developed competency in nonprofit accounting and the professional judgment to apply it independently across multiple clients in a remote environment.



Responsibilities

- Record and classify all transactions on an accrual basis with proper account coding, class tracking, and fund designation.

- Manage and maintain the general ledger in accordance with GAAP.

- Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable: enter vendor bills, process payments, record invoices, and apply receipts accurately.

- Prepare and post all month-end journal entries, including accruals, prepaid amortization, depreciation, and deferred revenue schedules.

- Conduct balance sheet reconciliation and review financial statements for discrepancies or errors.

- Record payroll allocation entries across cost centers, grants, and functional expense categories.

- Track restricted grants, donor contributions, and program expenses in compliance with nonprofit accounting standards.

- Produce and deliver month-end financial statements for management review.

- Support the Form 990 and audit preparation process by maintaining clean, organized records and preparing schedules as requested.

- Maintain meticulous records of journal entries, account analyses, and audit documentation to ensure audit readiness.

- Utilize accounting software, including QuickBooks Online and Xero, to manage bookkeeping operations.

- Identify opportunities to automate financial processes and increase efficiency.

- Deliver clear, accurate financial reports for internal review, client communication, and external audits.



Qualifications

 - Minimum 5 years of nonprofit accounting experience with demonstrated ability to apply accrual accounting, fund accounting, net asset classifications under ASU
, grant tracking, and functional expense allocation independently and without supervision.

 - Demonstrated ability to apply ASC 606 and ASC 842 standards, specifically managing revenue recognition based on grant documents, funder restrictions, and milestones.

- Experience managing multiple clients simultaneously in an outsourced accounting firm or agency setting.

- Advanced proficiency in QuickBooks Online (QBO), Xero, Sage, and other financial management tools.

- Advanced proficiency in project and work management tools such as Asana, Gmail, Google Sheets, Microsoft Excel, 
, Ramp, and similar platforms.

- Deep understanding of GAAP, double-entry bookkeeping, bank reconciliation, and general ledger reconciliation.

- Familiarity with governmental accounting practices and tax experience is highly desirable.

- Excellent knowledge of financial concepts, including account analysis, account reconciliation, debits and credits, journal entries, and balance sheet management.

- Ability to context-shift between multiple clients and thrive in a fast-paced, remote environment.

- Strong attention to detail and analytical skills to interpret complex financial data accurately.

- Effective written communication skills for financial reporting and client correspondence.

- High integrity, accountability, and respect for client confidentiality.

- Minimum 12 consecutive months of fully remote, self-directed work with independent deadline management.

- Problem-solving mentality with a proactive approach to process improvement and continuous learning.



Schedule and Compensation

- Part-time: 15 hours per week, with required availability between 8:00 AM and 3:00 PM EST // 9 pm and 2 am Philippines time. Hours are expected to increase to full-time as performance benchmarks are met, and the client portfolio grows

- Compensation details: $8 per hour for a trial period (1-3 months) and $10 per hour (post-trial period) 



To Apply: To be considered for this position, your application must include the following, submitted together in a single
:

 - Your resume

 - A brief message describing your experience with nonprofit fund accounting and at least one outsourced or multi-client accounting environment you have supported

- The answer to the following question, included at the top of your message: "What is the net asset classification framework introduced under ASU
, and how does it differ from the previous two-category model?"



Applications that do not follow these instructions exactly will not be reviewed.

Look at a video

Replicate the same structure, pacing, and style

Execute consistently using a defined system

title: Project Administrator & Assistant
description:
Disaster Solutions Australia is a leading provider of comprehensive disaster management services, specialising in helping businesses and organisations respond to and recover from emergencies. 



The Project Administrator & Assistant is responsible for supporting the efficient planning, coordination, support and delivery of projects. This role ensures that projects are executed in accordance with company standards, client expectations, and operational requirements.



Working closely with internal departments, field teams, subcontractors, and clients, the position plays a key role in maintaining accurate documentation, supporting the coordination of resources, and facilitating clear communication throughout all stages of the project lifecycle.

This role requires strong organisational skills, attention to detail, and the ability to perform in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.





Key Responsibilities:

• Create and set up new projects in internal systems accurately and in a timely manner

• Ensure all project details, scopes, client information, and job data are correctly entered

• Maintain and continuously update project files to reflect current status and changes

• Ensure all required documentation is uploaded, stored, and easily accessible

• Assisting the implementation of projects, including client and customer communications, coordination of field staff and trades, and collecting field data from trades and staff.

• Tracking projects to ensure they continually address defined objectives and produce the committed deliverables.

• Compiling results and producing project reports, including outcomes and progress of works and communicating these with the customers and the clients daily.

• Coordination for the delivery of services effectively and efficiently. 

• Maintaining communication logs for all project-related correspondence

• Support Estimators/Supervisors with cross-service integration efforts to achieve a seamless client experience.

• Assist in maintaining positive client and customer relations throughout all project phases.

• Assist in the evaluation and solution of potential field problems, escalating them to the Project Coordinator Team Leader if necessary.

• Development of costings associated with new internal projects

• Assist in scope analysis to provide clear, documented, and coordinated interpretations to the field teams

• Conduct quality control activities of field work, your reports, etc and ensure your KPIs are met.

• Ensure all projects are updated and accurately created, produced, and generate documents.

• Coordinate and participate in an ongoing project, research, and analysis on cost in relation to workforce management are being captured effectively 

• Assist with field staff requests to resolve field issues.

• Scheduling field staff and trades and tracking all assigned projects to ensure they continually address defined objectives and produce the committed deliverables.



To be eligible and considered for the role the following must be included in your application:

• Cover letter must include Disaster Solutions Australia

• Cover letter must include job role

• Cover letter must include date of your application

title: Salesperson
description:
FULL TIME EXPERIENCED SALESPERSON.  EASTERN TIME: 9am Eastern until 6pm Eastern



PERFECT SPOKEN ENGLISH WITN NO ACCENT & GREAT WRITING SKILLS REQUIRED.



If you have not taken Accent Reduction course, PLEASE DO NOT APPLY.  



You MUST submit A VOICE RECORDING OF YOU INTRODUCING YOURSELF TO ME IN ENGLISH to demonstrate that your English sounds American. 



EXPERIENCE WITH AMAZON IS A HUGE PLUS...but not required.



Our clients are people, companies and brands that have products being sold in the US on Amazon.  We also help people that work for or formerly worked for Amazon.  We are a New York based law firm where we all work on Eastern time zone.  



We seek an experienced, energetic, self-motivated salesperson WITH PERFECT ACCENT-FREE SPOKEN ENGLISH and Great English Writing Skills to learn about the services our firm provides and then train with and join our Sales Team.  



Our process is as follows:  people with problems with Amazon contact us online,
 and by phone.  We call them on the telephone and if we think we can win their case, we offer to help them.  ALL OF THE WORK FOR THE CLIENTS IS DONE BY OUR PARALEGALS AND LAWYERS IN NEW YORK and FLORIDA (two states within the US).  



Since the applicant will be making and receiving phone calls from Americans, we need someone without an accent.  This is vital to the position. 



BEFORE applying for this position, please review our recent YouTube videos and our social media posts for Amazon Sellers Lawyer on
,
, Instagram and our YouTube channel so that you will have an idea of what we do.




 



REQUIREMENTS:

1. Perfect accent-free spoken English - THIS IS REQUIRED.  If your English has an accent, this position is not for you.

PLEASE USE THIS LINK TO SUBMIT A VOICE RECORDING OF YOU INTRODUCING YOURSELF TO ME IN ENGLISH. 



2  Prior Sales Experience.  THIS IS REQUIRED.  I am referring to salesmanship, not merely taking orders for products.  



3. You MUST be located in or near Manila so that you can participate in monthly or bi-monthly in person tea
etings when the pandemic is over.  I intend to travel to Manilla starting in May for tea
etings every 60 days.  We have hired people that were able to travel to Manila for the anticipated meetings.



4. Monthly Salary paid via Payoneer.  You MUST have a Payoneer account and be able to be paid at the end of each month.  



5. Work on EASTERN TIME.  Please do not apply unless you can work on Eastern time zone.  VERY IMPORTANT - SINCE YOU WILL BE ON THE TELEPHONE THAT WE PROVIDE TO YOU, YOU MUST HAVE A QUIET WORK PLACE.  We have had issues where there are noises from roosters crowing in the background.  When you are calling potential clients, you must have a quiet place from which to place the calls and to accept calls.



6. Great Written English.  For every client that we accept, we send a written retainer agreement.  You will have to edit the documents and therefore need great writing skills.



7. You own high speed internet connection & Computer.  You must be able to use our VOiP phone system and participate in multiple video conferences via 
pensation:

1. Commensurate with Sales Experience and Spoken & Written English skills.  

2. 13th Month Bonus payable one-half in June and one-half in December

3. 10 Paid Days Off per year after 6 months with the 
n be used 5 days, at most, 5 days at a time.  The 10 days includes both sick and holiday time combined for a total of 10 days per year.

title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter
description:
Job Title: Cold Caller / Appointment Setter (Remote – Performance Driven)

About Us

We are Umteen Company Digital Marketing, a fast-growing agency based in Vancouver, Canada. We help service-based businesses (construction, medi spas, local businesses) grow through SEO, paid ads, and high-converting websites.

We’re looking for a hungry, driven Cold Caller / Appointment Setter who can generate conversations and book qualified discovery calls.



Role Overview

Your main responsibility is to call leads, qualify prospects, and strictly set appointments for our sales team.

You will not be responsible for closing deals — your role is to generate opportunities and hand them off to our Account Executives.

This is a high-volume, performance-based role — if you’re not comfortable making 100+ calls per day, this is not for you.



Responsibilities

Make 100+ outbound calls daily using our lead sheet

Speak with business owners / decision-makers

Qualify leads and identify opportunities

Book appointments directly into our calendar

Hand off qualified leads to Account Executives

Update call outcomes in our tracking sheet / CRM

Follow call scripts while staying natural and conversational





Daily Targets (KPIs)

???? 100+ calls per day

???? 10–20 conversations

???? 3–5 booked appointments

???? 1–3 high-quality opportunities



Compensation

$400 CAD/month base

Uncapped commission (based on booked appointments & performance)

High performers have strong earning potential



Growth Opportunity

Clear path to move into an Account Executive (AE) role

Opportunity to close deals with significantly higher compensation + commission

We promote from within — top performers will grow quickly



What We’re Looking For

Strong English communication skills

Confident on the phone (not afraid of rejection)

Sales or call center experience preferred

Self-motivated and disciplined

Able to follow systems and hit targets

Reliable and shows up consistently



 Tools You’ll Use

RingCentral (Auto Dialer)

Google Sheets (Tracking)

Google Calendar (Booking)



 Important

Must be available full-time

Must be able to commit to daily call targets (100+ calls/day)

This role requires focus, consistency, and accountability



 How to Apply

Please send:

A short voice recording introducing yourself

Your experience with cold calling or sales

Your availability (timezone + hours)



 Video Instructions (Optional but Recommended)

To stand out, you may include a short video introduction (1–2 minutes):

Introduce yourself

Share your experience with cold calling or sales

Explain your approach when speaking with prospects

Tell us why you’d be a great fit for this role

???? This helps us better understand your communication skills and confidence on calls.



 Bonus Points

Experience with marketing agencies

Experience booking appointments for service-based businesses

Familiar with CRMs or dialers

title: IT Migration Specialist (Google Workspace ? Microsoft 365)
description:
Full Project Role ? Ongoing Position Opportunity



About the Role

We are an Australian company looking for a skilled IT Migration Specialist to lead a full migration from Google Workspace to Microsoft 365.   We value clear thinking, strong communications and getting the job done properly.



This is a hands-on role — you will take ownership of the migration and deliver a clean, working system and work closely with the Business Manager to deliver the completed project.



This starts as a project, with strong potential for long-term, full-time work in systems, automation and AI.



Requirements

• High level of intelligence with excellent verbal and written English skills 

• Team-oriented with strong communication and knowledge-sharing ability 

• Proactive, accountable and results-driven 

• Two verifiable professional references, including contact names and phone numbers



Scope of Work (Project Phase)

You will be responsible for:

• Migrating:

o Gmail ? Outlook / Exchange Online

o Google Drive ? SharePoint & OneDrive

o Calendars, contacts, users

o Domains and DNS setup (MX, SPF, DKIM, etc.)

• Setting up a clean Microsoft 365 environment:

o SharePoint structure (libraries, permissions, access)

o Controlled use of OneDrive

• Ensuring:

o Secure setup

o Minimal downtime

o Smooth transition for users



Required Deliverables

• Migration plan (step-by-step, including cutover)

• System structure diagrams (SharePoint + user access)

• Clean and fully working Microsoft 365 setup

• Basic SOPs / user guides



Ongoing Role (If You Perform Well)

• Automation (Power Automate / Make / n8n)

• CRM integration (GHL)

• System improvements and optimisation

• AI workflow implementation



Requirements (Strict)

• Proven experience with Google Workspace ? Microsoft 365 migration

• Strong SharePoint experience (structure + permissions)

• Solid understanding of:

o DNS and domain setup

o
 cutover and migration tools

• Excellent English (written and spoken)

• Can explain technical work clearly

• Works independently and delivers results



How to Apply (IMPORTANT – Follow Exactly)

To be considered, your application must include all of the below:

1. List 2–3 migration projects you have completed

o Include what you migrated and tools used

2. Answer this question (short response):

o What are the biggest risks when migrating from Google Workspace to Microsoft 365 and how do you handle them?

3. Your availability (hours per week + timezone)

4. Start your application with this line:

“M365 MIGRATION – READY”

(Applications without this will be ignored)



Important

• Do not send generic or copy-paste applications

• We are looking for someone who has real experience, not theory



Role Details

• Project-based (initial)

• Ongoing role available for the right person

• Remote work

• Must overlap with Australian business hours, between the hours of 7am to 5pm PHP 



Why This Role

If you are good, this becomes a long-term role working on:

• System design

• Automation

• AI integration

• Business process improvement



Please Note:  If your application is not completed as described in this position description your application will be ignored.

description:

Remote | Full-Time | $5/hour USD



ABOUT US

Top Rep Training is a growing US-based sales training company serving home service contractors (roofing, windows, HVAC, bath remodeling, plumbing, electrical, etc.). We provide sales training through our Flight School platform, coaching programs, and live events. We need an experienced, reliable VA to support our coaching team and operations.



THE ROLE – Key Responsibilities:



Coaching Session Support: Schedule 1-on-1 coaching sessions, send reminders, join Zoom calls to confirm recordings, retrieve Fireflies links, tag and organize recordings in ClickUp

Group Coaching Support: Join all group coaching calls (Weekly Group Coaching, Sales Accelerator, Flight Instructor Sessions, etc.), manage recordings, monitor chat for questions, handle follow-ups

Weekly Masterclass Logistics: Coordinate our free Wednesday webinar – confirm speakers, send registration/reminder
s, manage recordings

Customer Support: Handle
 inquiries, troubleshoot basic platform access issues, maintain professional communication

Calendar Management: Manage team calendars across US/Philippine time zones, send 24-hour reminders for all coaching sessions and calls, resolve scheduling conflicts

Admin Support:
 management, documentation, file organization in Google Drive, data entry, prepare documents from templates

Event Support: Assist with Bootcamps and virtual events – attendee communication, coordination, post-event follow-up





?? NIGHT SHIFT REQUIREMENT – READ CAREFULLY

This role is 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM EST every weekday (8:00 PM – 5:00 AM Philippine Time).

This schedule is NON-NEGOTIABLE.

DO NOT APPLY if you:



Have never worked full graveyard shift before

Have only worked partial night shift

Experienced health issues on night shift (migraines, headaches, sleep problems, fatigue)

Cannot sustain graveyard shift long-term



ONLY APPLY if you:



Have successfully worked full graveyard shift for 6+ consecutive months in a previous role

Had NO health issues during that time

Can prove you can handle this schedule long-term





REQUIREMENTS (Must Have):

Proven full night shift experience: 6+ months working 8 PM – 5 AM PHT (or similar graveyard hours) WITHOUT health issues

ClickUp experience (intermediate level – task management, organization, documentation)

Google Workspace proficient (Gmail, Calendar, Drive, Docs, Sheets)

Zoom experience (video calls, screen sharing, recording management)

Excellent English (C1/C2 level – written and spoken)

Reliable infrastructure:



Computer: Minimum 16GB RAM, webcam, microphone

Internet: Minimum 50 Mbps, BACKUP internet connection required

BACKUP power source required (UPS, generator, power bank)

Dedicated quiet workspace





Detail-oriented with high accuracy

Self-starter who takes initiative

Long-term commitment – we're hiring for years, not months



BONUS POINTS:



Experience with GoHighLevel (CRM platform)

Experience with LearnWorlds or other LMS platforms

Experience with Fireflies AI or similar transcription tools

Experience supporting coaches, trainers, or educators

Experience with home service companies (roofing, HVAC, windows, contractors)

Process documentation skills (creating SOPs, Loom tutorials)





WHAT WE OFFER:



Compensation: $5.00/hour USD

Approximately $880/month for full-time (40 hours/week)

Annual Raises: 5–15?sed on performance (first review after 1 year)

Benefits: 13th month pay

Schedule: Consistent hours, no weekends

Long-term Role: We're hiring for years, not months

Professional tools: ClickUp, Zoom, Google Workspace, Fireflies AI, all provided





HIRING PROCESS:



Application review (2–3 days)

ClickUp form with video introduction link (10-15 mins)

Automated video interview (5 questions, 10-12 mins)

Live skills assessment + interview with Operations Manager (45–60 mins)

Live interview with CEO (15–20 mins) – top 2-3 candidates only

Reference checks

Job offer

IMPORTANT NOTES:



No beginners – we need someone who can hit the ground running

Visit 
 before applying

We will NOT consider candidates who have never worked full graveyard shift or who experienced health issues on night shift

We prioritize candidates currently working or recently worked graveyard shift successfully



Include the word Champion somewhere in your reply.



Apply here: 




 VA

Apply now!

 and SMS campaigns for e-commerce brands. We’re looking for someone who understands how to drive revenue through retention marketing, flows, and campaign optimization using Klaviyo and OneText.



Please apply here (required): 
 



At Skinnify, we’re reinventing fitness by integrating resistance into everyday clothing. In just two years, we’ve grown from 0 to 120,000+ customers – and we’re just getting started.



Here's a video about our company and what it's like to work on our team:

/SMS regulations and best practices

Candidates must be able to manage multiple weekly campaigns and maintain/optimize core flows that generate consistent revenue

 & SMS strategy and execution

Skinnify started when our founder Christian realized most women wanted to get in shape but lacked the time or motivation for regular workouts. After training with resistance bands, he had an idea: what if resistance bands were built into leggings?

The result? Resistance Band Leggings - leggings that make every step a workout. Since then, we’ve launched sleeves, shoes, and more. Our mission is simple: make fitness effortless by turning movement into exercise.

title: AI Video Generator / Editor
description:
We are a fast-growing e-commerce brand looking to scale our short-form video advertising. We have identified a highly profitable ad format and need an AI Video Specialist to help us produce these at scale. We will provide and pay for all the necessary tools and software subscriptions you need to get the job done.



The Role:

We are looking for a creative powerhouse who can generate 3D animated, character-driven short-form ads (TikTok, Reels, Shorts). You will be creating personified 3D characters (e.g., talking vitamins, organs, or "villain" health issues) that explain symptoms and introduce our supplements as the ultimate solution.



What You Will Do:



AI Video Generation: Use Veo 3 (and other cutting-edge AI video models) to generate high-quality, consistent 3D character animations.



Hook Creation: Write and execute scroll-stopping visual and auditory hooks within the first 3 seconds of every video.



Voiceovers & Audio: Generate dynamic, emotionally engaging AI voiceovers that match the personality of the 3D characters (villains sounding sinister, hero products sounding heroic).



Video Assembly: Edit the generated clips, voiceovers, and captions together into fast-paced, high-retention 30 to 60-second ads.



Produce at Scale: Maintain a consistent output of high-quality videos each week without sacrificing the Direct Response marketing formula.



Requirements:



Proven experience using advanced AI video generation tools (specifically Veo 3 or similar state-of-the-art text-to-video/image-to-video models).



A strong portfolio of short-form content, preferably in the health, wellness, or supplement niche.



Deep understanding of Direct Response marketing, pacing, and what makes a video go viral on TikTok/Meta.



Ability to prompt AI effectively for consistent character design and movement.



Proficiency with AI voice generation tools (e.g., ElevenLabs) and basic video editing software (CapCut, Premiere, etc.).



Why Work With Us?



All Tools Provided: We cover all your software costs. You just bring the talent.



Clear Creative Direction: We know exactly what works; you won't be guessing.



Consistent Work: We are looking for a long-term partner to scale with us.



How to Apply:

Please send your portfolio showcasing at least two examples of 3D animated or AI-generated short-form videos you have created, along with a brief explanation of the tools you used to make them.
