title: Copywriter / Thought Leadership Writer
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled copywriter who can do far more than write polished words. This role is for someone who can think strategically, hold a founder’s voice with precision, and translate complex ideas into clear, compelling messaging across platforms.



This is not a plug-and-play copy role. The right person will know how to shape thought leadership, protect nuance, and support a brand with depth, intelligence, and editorial judgment.

What We’re Looking For:



Strategic Copywriter

 You think like a brand strategist who writes, not just a writer waiting for instructions. You can translate high-level ideas into grounded, clear messaging and understand how copy contributes to long-term brand authority, positioning, and trust.



You know how to:

Turn thought leadership into language that feels clear and resonant

Hold context across multiple offers, platforms, and seasons

Build messaging that strengthens authority over time, not just immediate engagement



Deep Fluency in Female Leadership Language



This role is best suited for a woman who understands the nuances of modern female leadership from lived experience.

You should feel comfortable writing about:



Power without performative masculinity

Authority without arrogance

Identity, discernment, boundaries, and self-trust

The emotional interior of leadership

The tone is not “girlboss,” and it is not corporate. It is grounded, intelligent, and embodied.



Ability to Hold and Protect a Distinct Voice



The right writer must be able to enter an established voice without flattening or diluting it.

You should be able to:

Match cadence, rhythm, and emphasis

Write conversationally without sounding casual

Be bold without becoming aggressive

Be warm without becoming soft

This requires taste, restraint, and strong listening skills.



Strong Long-Form Writing Ability



This is not a short-caption-only role. You should be confident writing and shaping:

 sequences that build over time

Long-form posts, essays, and leadership narratives

Workshop descriptions and progra
ssaging

Thought pieces that require structure, pacing, and discernment

You should also have strong editorial instincts and know what should be said, what should be refined, and what should be left unsaid.



High Emotional Intelligence



This role sits close to the founder’s thinking. You must be able to read between the lines, work from voice notes or partially formed ideas, and handle feedback with maturity.

The right person knows how to:

Ask thoughtful, clarifying questions without over-questioning

Interpret nuance, subtext, and intention

Know when to push an idea further and when to protect the message



Comfort With Abstract Ideas

The work often lives in concepts, frameworks, and invisible architecture. You should enjoy working with ideas that are still forming and helping shape them into language people can immediately recognize themselves in.



Platform Versatility



You should be able to write across:




Instagram

LinkedIn

Sales pages

Workshop and program positioning



Professional Maturity



We need someone who is dependable, discreet, and collaborative. This person should manage deadlines responsibly, hold context well, and understand the level of confidentiality that comes with founder-facing work.



Strong Taste and Editorial Judgment



This is one of the most important parts of the role. You should know:

What not to say

When something is too much

When clarity matters more than cleverness

When simplicity or restraint is more powerful than saying more



Key Responsibilities



-Content

Plan out monthly content calendars

Write LinkedIn and Meta posts tied to the content plan and current offers

Write weekly articles

Turn notes, voice notes, or training transcripts into finished content

Research positioning, trends, current language, relevant examples, and insights to inform future content



-Campaigns and Launches

Create campaign briefs

Write promotional, sales, and fulfillment
s

Write support landing pages and other offer-related copy

Develop swipe copy and launch messaging as needed



-Reporting and Performance

Track
 and content performance, including opens, clicks, engagement, and reach

Gather performance insights regularly

Use data to inform rewrites, content adjustments, and future messaging decisions



-Collaboration and Revisions

Revise
s, posts, and other copy based on feedback

Collaborate closely with the founder or team to shape ideas into finished messaging

Handle ad hoc copy requests as needed



Additional Requirements



Must be available to work during PST hours

Can start part-time, with the opportunity to expand hours as responsibilities grow

Starting rate is $7.50 USD per hour, with potential for an increase after the first month based on performance and fit

Must be comfortable working in a collaborative, founder-facing role that requires discretion, responsiveness, and strong follow-through



Bonus Qualifications

These are not required, but would be strong indicators of fit:

Background in psychology, leadership, coaching, philosophy, literature, or narrative work

Experience writing for founders, thought leaders, or experts

Comfort working behind the scenes through ghostwriting, without needing visibility or credit



Ideal Fit

This role is for someone thoughtful, sharp, emotionally intelligent, and deeply attuned to voice. You are not just producing copy. You are helping shape and protect a founder’s message with care, precision, and depth.



To apply:



Send your resume and sample work to 

Applications that do not meet the requirements will not be considered

mber to help create footage for AI influencers. This role focuses on generating and preparing supporting video clips that match simple scripts and references.

Opportunity to grow with a fast-moving content team.



If you're dependable, organized, and comfortable learning new tools, this could be a great long-term role.

title: DIRECT HIRE: Virtual Assistant / SALES CLOSER (REMOTE | PST)
description:
We’re a Vancouver-based rental company looking for a high-energy VA who can generate leads, CLOSE deals, and help us scale fast. This is not just admin work—we want a growth partner.



If you know how to find leads, turn inquiries into tenants, and improve systems, this role is for you.

Schedule: Sat–Wed | 9 AM–5 PM PST (Thu–Fri OFF)

Location: 100% Remote | FULL TIME

Your Role:

• Generate and convert rental leads (FB Marketplace, Craigslist, liv & other website) into signed leases

• Find and qualify new leads beyond existing sources

• Build and automate simple lead generation systems

• Use research and creative tools to improve results

• Track, analyze, and optimize lead performance

• Handle tenant screening via calls (voice/video)

• Manage listings, schedules, move-ins/outs, and admin tasks

What We’re Looking For:

• Strong English communication (written & verbal)

• Proven experience in lead generation and sales/closing

• Tech-savvy (CRMs, Google Sheets, scraping tools)

• Background in a computer-related field is a plus

• Independent, proactive, and results-driven

• Bonus: Experience in real estate, rentals, or social media optimization



How to Apply:

Send your resume + answers with the subject line:

"HIRE ME: Full Name"



Include:

• Your specialized skill (GHL / Accounting / Programming)

• What extra value can you bring to help us grow faster?

• Confirm your availability (Sat–Wed, PST)



Also send a short video recording introducing yourself and answering the questions.

No video = not considered.



Applications without the value-add answer will not be reviewed.

This role is ideal for someone who can both think strategically and execute at a high level bringing strong creative direction, performance driven marketing, and polished content production across multiple platforms.

/Instagram), YouTube, TikTok, and other platforms

title: Experienced Bookkeeper (QuickBooks + Dext Expert)
description:
We are hiring an experienced Bookkeeper on behalf of a Canada-based professional bookkeeping firm that supports growing businesses with clean, accurate, and compliant financials.



This is not an entry-level role.



We are looking for someone who truly understands bookkeeping inside and out—someone who can jump into QuickBooks and Dext confidently, work independently, and maintain high standards with minimal supervision.



If you love clean books, reconciliations, and structured workflows—and you take pride in accuracy—this role is for you.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Full-cycle bookkeeping using QuickBooks Online

- Daily and monthly transaction categorization

- Bank and credit card reconciliations

- Managing receipts and documents using Dext

- Reviewing, matching, and validating expenses

- Identifying discrepancies and resolving issues proactively

- Supporting month-end and year-end bookkeeping tasks

- Maintaining organized, audit-ready financial records

- Communicating clearly with the internal team when clarification is needed



What We’re Looking For (Must-Haves)

- Minimum 5 years of hands-on bookkeeping experience

- Expert-level QuickBooks Online knowledge

- Strong experience using Dext 

- Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

- Strong understanding of bookkeeping best practices

- Ability to work independently and manage your own workload

- Reliable internet connection and availability during PST business hours

- Professional written and verbal English communication



Nice-to-Haves (Assets)

- Experience supporting Canadian businesses

- Experience working with accounting firms or bookkeeping agencies

- Familiarity with month-end close processes

- Comfortable working with multiple client files



Why This Role Is a Great Opportunity

- Stable, long-term role with a professional Canadian firm

- Clear processes and expectations

- Opportunity to increase hours based on performance

- Work with a team that values accuracy, accountability, and professionalism

- No micromanagement—your expertise is trusted



How to Apply

- Please include the following in your application:

- A brief summary of your bookkeeping experience

- Your years of experience with QuickBooks Online

- Your experience level with Dext (be specific)

- Examples of bookkeeping tasks you’ve handled independently

- Your availability during PST hours



Only applicants with relevant bookkeeping experience will be considered.

title: Debt Collector
description:
Prime Recovery LLC is a third-party consumer debt collection agency based in the United States. We operate with strict FDCPA compliance and specialize in the recovery of defaulted installment loan and credit card accounts. 



We are currently hiring a remote Debt Collector who is fluent in English, disciplined, and ready to contribute to a high-performance recovery team.



Job Requirements:

MUST HAVE 3rd PARTY DEBT COLLECTION EXPERIENCE

Fluent spoken and written English

Must be available during U.S. business hours

Stable high-speed internet connection with a STATIC IP ADDRESS

Windows computer (preferably with dual monitors)

Highly organized, able to manage tasks independently

Self-motivated and results-driven

Open to training and coaching to meet performance benchmarks

Must submit a 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself in English



Key Responsibilities:

Make outbound calls to consumers regarding overdue installment loans

Document all call results and debtor responses clearly in system notes

Monitor and flag broken promises, skipped payments, or refusals

Assist in reviewing payment arrangements for accuracy and compliance

Locate and verify updated contact information using online tools

Upload and organize call recordings as part of account documentation

Track settlement approvals, payment plan progress, and status updates



This is a long-term position with performance-based incentives. You’ll be part of a serious, compliance-first recovery agency with room to grow and contribute meaningfully to our success.

title: Web Designer (Squarespace / Wix + Figma) – Part-Time (15–20 hrs/week)
description:
We’re a growing digital team made up of graphic designers, frontend and backend developers, and UX designers. We build high-quality websites and digital experiences for therapists and mental health brands.



We’re looking for a web designer to help alleviate and expand our current bandwidth. You’ll be working directly under our Head of Design and collaborating with the rest of the team across different types of projects.



This is a hands-on role focused on real web design and execution, not just social media graphics.



What You’ll Be Doing:

-Build and design websites inside Squarespace and/or Wix

-Assist with layouts, sections, and full page builds

-Support design work in Figma for WordPress and custom-coded projects

-Collaborate with our design team to maintain consistency and quality

-Help with light social content (
s, simple graphics, basic edits if needed)



What This Role Looks Like:



This role can range from:



-Building a full Squarespace or Wix website from start to finish

-Assisting on WordPress or custom projects through Figma design work

-Supporting ongoing design needs across active client projects

-Some projects will be structured, others will require you to think and design independently. The expectation is that you can step in, execute cleanly, and contribute without needing constant direction.



Requirements:

-Experience with Squarespace and/or Wix (required)

-Experience with Figma

-Strong understanding of layout, spacing, and clean design

-Ability to follow direction and also design independently

-Good communication and reliability



Nice to Have:

-Experience with WordPress

-Basic video editing (Reels/TikTok)

-Experience working with agencies or multiple clients



Hours & Pay:



15–20 hours per week

$7/hour

Long-term opportunity for the right person





Important (Read Carefully):



How to Apply (Important)



Please send your application directly to:







1. 2–3 Squarespace or Wix websites you’ve worked on

2. 2–3 design samples (Figma or similar)

3. A short explanation of your role in those projects



Also include the word “FOCUS” at the top of your application so we know you read this.



If your experience is mainly Canva or templates, this role is not a fit.



Business Name:

The Feelings Center – Creative Studio

title: Video Editor Part-Time
description:
***PLEASE NOTE: There is a hidden test below, so please read the detailed application instructions***



I am looking for an honest, hardworking, self-motivated Content Production Virtual Assistant who can work independently and grow with me long-term.



This will start as a part-time role (approximately 10–20 hours per week), with the strong intention of becoming a full-time, permanent position for the right person.



This is NOT just a “video editor” role.



Your main responsibility will be to help turn raw audio, video, and ideas into polished, usable content across multiple businesses, including:

• A kitchen remodeling company (primary revenue driver)

• A flooring showroom brand (growth phase)

• An AI automation agency (high upside)

• A real estate / investing education brand (long-term brand)



YOUR CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Audio Editing (Simple but VERY Important)

• Trim raw audio recordings (remove mistakes, long pauses, filler)

• Follow verbal cues (e.g. double clap, “cut that”)

• Normalize audio levels

• Light cleanup (background noise, clicks, etc.)

• Export clean, ready-to-use voiceovers



2. Video Editing (Template-Based, Not Overly Creative)

• Create long-form videos (YouTube-style, faceless or voiceover-based)

• Create short-form videos (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

• Add:

  • Subtitles / captions

  • Basic B-roll stock footage

  • Simple zoom cuts and jump cuts

  • Follow clear templates and brand style (we will provide examples)



3. Content Repurposing (VERY High Value)

• From one long video, you should be able to:

• Create 3–5 short clips

• Identify “hook-worthy” 
nts

• Add captions and simple on-screen text

• Format for multiple platforms



4. Course Content Production (Under Team Guidance)

• Assist in assembling online video courses

• Sync audio with slides or visuals

• Organize lessons into modules

• Upload and format content inside our platforms

• Work closely with our team lead (Dexie), who will guide you



5. Marketing Content Support (Priority Focus)

• You will help produce content for:

• Primary Priority:

  • Kitchen & Bath Remodeling (lead generation, before/after, demos)



• Secondary Priority:

  • Flooring Brand (product showcases, educational content)



• Tertiary Priority:

  • AI Agency (demo videos, SMS/emulator-style content)



• Fourth Priority:

  • Real Estate Education Brand (YouTube + course content)



6. Organization & File Management

• Organize files in Google Drive and/or Dropbox (VERY important)

• Maintain clean naming conventions

• Track content status (raw ? edited ? published)



TOOLS (Preferred, not mandatory)

• Video: Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar

• Audio: Audacity or Adobe Podcast



Optional: Descript (bonus)

• IDEALLY, you use Adobe Premiere Pro, because many of our existing project files are there



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED, BUT A BIG PLUS)

• Graphic design (thumbnails, social posts)

• Motion graphics

• Explainer video animations

• Basic storytelling/editing instincts



COMPENSATION

• Base hourly rate of 200 PHP per hour plus performance bonus.

• Your performance will be evaluated based upon:

• Speed, accuracy, and quality of completed tasks

• Productivity

• Communication responsiveness (how quickly you reply)

• Ability to follow instructions and improve over time



YOUR IDEAL ATTITUDE

• You are hard-working, honest, loyal, and trustworthy

• You take initiative and do not need constant supervision

• You are detail-oriented and take pride in clean, organized work

• You are coachable and open to feedback

• You are dependable and follow through on commitments

• You genuinely want to grow with a long-term team



IMPORTANT: APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY)

Work hours are 9:00 am to 1:00 pm EDT/EST (New York/Florida), that’s 10:00 pm to 2:00 am Philippine Standard Time.

As your first test, please include the words “purple cow” at the very beginning of your application, so that I know you have read this job post in full.



REQUIRED: PERSONALIZED VIDEO OR AUDIO

Please also include a brief personalized recording (VERY IMPORTANT):

You may use:

• Loom (free), OR

• Vocaroo (free)



In your recording (2–4 minutes), please answer:

1. Do the compensation and work hours fit your goals?

2. Your experience with video and/or audio editing

3. What tools you currently use

4. Your internet speed and computer specs

5. Why you believe you would be a strong fit for this role

6. Any additional skills (design, animation, etc.)



This step is REQUIRED. Applications without this will be ignored.



FINAL TEST TASK (SHORTLISTED APPLICANTS ONLY)

If shortlisted, you will be given a paid test task:

You will receive:

• A short raw audio clip (with mistakes and pauses)

• A simple instruction brief



Your task:

• Clean and trim the audio



Create:

• 1 short-form video clip (30–60 seconds)

• 1 simple long-form video (2–5 minutes)

• Add captions and basic visuals



This helps us evaluate your:

• Attention to detail

• Editing quality

• Ability to follow instructions



If you’re just looking for a quick freelance gig, this is NOT for you.



If you’re looking for a long-term opportunity where you can grow your skills and become a key part of a content-driven business, then apply.

If shortlisted, you will be given a paid test task:

You will receive:

• A short raw audio clip (with mistakes and pauses)

• A simple instruction brief



Your task:

• Clean and trim the audio



Create:

• 1 short-form video clip (30–60 seconds)

• 1 simple long-form video (2–5 minutes)

• Add captions and basic visuals



This helps us evaluate your:

• Attention to detail

• Editing quality

• Ability to follow instructions



If you’re just looking for a quick freelance gig, this is NOT for you.



If you’re looking for a long-term opportunity where you can grow your skills and become a key part of a content-driven business, then apply.

title: Video Editor Part-Time
description:
***PLEASE NOTE: There is a hidden test below, so please read the detailed application instructions***



I am looking for an honest, hardworking, self-motivated Content Production Virtual Assistant who can work independently and grow with me long-term.



This will start as a part-time role (approximately 10–20 hours per week), with the strong intention of becoming a full-time, permanent position for the right person.



This is NOT just a “video editor” role.



Your main responsibility will be to help turn raw audio, video, and ideas into polished, usable content across multiple businesses, including:

• A kitchen remodeling company (primary revenue driver)

• A flooring showroom brand (growth phase)

• An AI automation agency (high upside)

• A real estate / investing education brand (long-term brand)



YOUR CORE RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Audio Editing (Simple but VERY Important)

• Trim raw audio recordings (remove mistakes, long pauses, filler)

• Follow verbal cues (e.g. double clap, “cut that”)

• Normalize audio levels

• Light cleanup (background noise, clicks, etc.)

• Export clean, ready-to-use voiceovers



2. Video Editing (Template-Based, Not Overly Creative)

• Create long-form videos (YouTube-style, faceless or voiceover-based)

• Create short-form videos (Reels, Shorts, TikTok)

Add:

 • Subtitles / captions

 • Basic B-roll stock footage

 • Simple zoom cuts and jump cuts

 • Follow clear templates and brand style (we will provide examples)



3. Content Repurposing (VERY High Value)

• From one long video, you should be able to:

• Create 3–5 short clips

• Identify “hook-worthy” 
nts

• Add captions and simple on-screen text

• Format for multiple platforms



4. Course Content Production (Under Team Guidance)

• Assist in assembling online video courses

• Sync audio with slides or visuals

• Organize lessons into modules

• Upload and format content inside our platforms

• Work closely with our team lead (Dexie), who will guide you



5. Marketing Content Support (Priority Focus)

• You will help produce content for:



Primary Priority:

 • Kitchen & Bath Remodeling (lead generation, before/after, demos)



Secondary Priority:

 • Flooring Brand (product showcases, educational content)



Tertiary Priority:

 • AI Agency (demo videos, SMS/emulator-style content)



Fourth Priority:

 • Real Estate Education Brand (YouTube + course content)



6. Organization & File Management

• Organize files in Google Drive and/or Dropbox (VERY important)

• Maintain clean naming conventions

• Track content status (raw ? edited ? published)



TOOLS (Preferred, not mandatory)

• Video: Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar

• Audio: Audacity or Adobe Podcast



Optional: Descript (bonus)

• IDEALLY, you use Adobe Premiere Pro, because many of our existing project files are there



BONUS SKILLS (NOT REQUIRED, BUT A BIG PLUS)

• Graphic design (thumbnails, social posts)

• Motion graphics

• Explainer video animations

• Basic storytelling/editing instincts



COMPENSATION

• Compensation is a combination of base hourly rate plus performance bonus.

• Your performance will be evaluated based upon:

• Speed, accuracy, and quality of completed tasks

• Productivity

• Communication responsiveness (how quickly you reply)

• Ability to follow instructions and improve over time



YOUR IDEAL ATTITUDE

• You are hard-working, honest, loyal, and trustworthy

• You take initiative and do not need constant supervision

• You are detail-oriented and take pride in clean, organized work

• You are coachable and open to feedback

• You are dependable and follow through on commitments

• You genuinely want to grow with a long-term team



IMPORTANT: APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY)

Work hours are 9:00 am to 1:00 pm EDT/EST (New York/Florida), that’s 10:00 pm to 2:00 am Philippine Standard Time.

As your first test, please include the words “purple cow” at the very beginning of your application, so that I know you have read this job post in full.



REQUIRED: PERSONALIZED VIDEO OR AUDIO

Please also include a brief personalized recording (VERY IMPORTANT):

You may use:

• Loom (free), OR

• Vocaroo (free)



In your recording (2–4 minutes), please answer:

1. Does the compensation fit your goals?

2. Your experience with video and/or audio editing

3. What tools you currently use

4. Your internet speed and computer specs

5. Why you believe you would be a strong fit for this role

6. Any additional skills (design, animation, etc.)



This step is REQUIRED. Applications without this will be ignored.



FINAL TEST TASK (SHORTLISTED APPLICANTS ONLY)

If shortlisted, you will be given a paid test task:



You will receive:

• A short raw audio clip (with mistakes and pauses)

• A simple instruction brief



Your task:

• Clean and trim the audio



Create:

• 1 short-form video clip (30–60 seconds)

• 1 simple long-form video (10 to 14 minutes)

• Add captions and basic visuals



This helps us evaluate your:

• Attention to detail

• Editing quality

• Ability to follow instructions



If you’re just looking for a quick freelance gig, this is NOT for you.



If you’re looking for a long-term opportunity where you can grow your skills and become a key part of a content-driven business, then apply.

title: Remote Sales Manager
description:
Remote Sales Manager



Position Title: Inside Sales Manager

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Schedule: Monday to Friday, 9:00 a.m.–6:00 p.m. (US Eastern Time)

Pay: depending on your experience and qualifications.



About the Role

We are seeking a high-energy, growth-driven Inside Sales Manager to lead and scale our outbound and inbound sales teams in the Philippines. This role is pivotal to our 10X growth strategy and will be responsible for recruiting, training, scripting, and continuously developing a high-performing remote and onsite sales force.



Key Responsibilities

• Build and manage two distinct departments: Outbound and Inbound Sales.

• Recruit, onboard, and train remote and onsite sales reps.

• Develop and refine sales scripts, objection handling, and closing techniques.

• Implement ongoing training programs and performance coaching.

• Set, track, and achieve clear performance metrics (KPIs) for teams and individuals, create dashboards/reports and drive data-backed improvements.

• Monitor pipeline health, conversion rates, AHT, contact rates, and revenue per rep.

• Collaborate with leadership to align sales strategy with company growth goals.

• Foster a culture of accountability, energy, and excellence.



Qualifications

• 5–10 years of experience in inside sales leadership, preferably in BPO or high-volume environments.

• Proven track record of scaling teams and delivering revenue growth.

• Strong understanding of remote team dynamics and call center operations.

• Excellent communication, coaching, and analytical skills.

• Experience with CRM systems (preferably Infor CRM/Saleslogix) and sales-enablement tools.

• Hands-on experience creating KPI frameworks, setting targets, and managing to those metrics.



Preferred Traits

• Energetic and motivational leadership style.

• Strategic thinker with a hands-on approach.

• Familiarity with the Philippine market and workforce culture.

title: Mechanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer
description:
Mehanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer



Job Description



A US-based manufacturing company is looking for a qualified Mehanical engineer/ Industrial Engineer/ Mechanical Designer  to join our team. We are a recognized leader in the design and manufacture of ergonomic, interactive technical products for various industries.



Our customers include medical/healthcare, public safety/mission control, all government agencies, IT, and cleanroom ergonomic products.



Required Professional Skills:

Produce accurate 2D and 3D shop drawings to adequately show and dimension all machined sheet metal welded, assembly parts, part numbers, specifications for bends, welding, assembly, etc.

Develop and maintain bill of materials and manufacturing documents.

Produce drawings using AutoCAD 3D and Autodesk Inventor software

Drafting and design responsibilities would include incorporating modifications into existing designs, developing component models and scaling fabrication drawings from initial concept.

Evaluate existing designs and processes and provide recommendations for improving productivity and increasing efficiency throughout.

Work with managers to solve problems and offer ideas for improving processes



Requirements:

Must be proficient with AutoCAD 3D and Autodesk Inventor (2007+) software

This individual must be self-motivated and able to perform routine duties with some supervision.

Experience in sheet metal fabrication and machine shop environment is preferred

Experience in metal casting and plastic molding is an advantage.

Follow verbal and written instructions



Autodesk Inventor and AutoCAD 3D are required.



Schedule: Monday to Friday, from 9:00 a.m. to 6:00 p.m. US EST, with a one-hour lunch break



NOTE: Please read!!!

Please send a link to your resume in PDF or Word format and your Teams account. Please submit your application if you are proficient in Autodesk Inventor and AutoCAD 3D.

title: SEO Specialist
description:
Job Title: Remote SEO Specialist

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Employment Type: Full-Time



Job Overview:

We are seeking a results-driven SEO Specialist with strong expertise in search engine optimization, keyword strategy, and digital growth. The ideal candidate will be responsible for improving website rankings, increasing organic traffic, and optimizing overall search performance. This role requires hands-on experience in keyword research, on-page and off-page SEO, technical optimization, and performance tracking.

In addition, the candidate should have a creative eye for improving digital assets such as websites, catalogs, and marketing materials. The role will also involve supporting the manager in ensuring virtual employees are assigned daily tasks and meeting performance expectations.



Key Responsibilities:

• Develop and implement effective SEO strategies to improve search rankings and visibility

• Conduct keyword research, competitor analysis, and identify growth opportunities

• Optimize website content, meta tags, images, and site structure for SEO performance

• Execute on-page and off-page SEO, including link-building strategies

• Monitor website performance using tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, and Ahrefs

• Analyze traffic, rankings, and user behavior to provide actionable insights

• Collaborate with developers and designers to improve technical SEO and website performance

• Support content creation by ensuring SEO best practices are followed

• Manage local SEO efforts to improve visibility in targeted regions

• Assist with PPC campaigns (Google Ads,
 Ads) when needed

• Stay up to date with SEO trends, algorithm updates, and best practices

• Provide recommendations to improve website design, catalogs, and marketing materials

• Assist in ensuring remote tea
mbers have daily tasks and are meeting objectives



Requirements:

• Proven experience as an SEO Specialist or similar role

• Strong knowledge of SEO tools (Google Analytics, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Moz, Screaming Frog, etc.)

• Solid understanding of on-page, off-page, and technical SEO

• Experience with CMS platforms such as WordPress and Shopify

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Excellent communication and time management skills

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment and meet deadlines

• Willing to work US EST hours (8:30 AM to 5:30 PM, Monday to Friday, with a 1-hour lunch break)

• Willing to use time tracking tools and remote desktop access



Preferred Qualifications:

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Digital Media, Business, or related field

• Certifications in Google Analytics, Google Ads, or SEO-related programs

• Experience in e-commerce, B2B, or SaaS industries

• Basic knowledge of graphic design tools (Photoshop, Illustrator, Canva) is a plus



Application Requirements:

If interested, please send the following:

• A link to your resume (PDF or Word format)

• A voice recording introducing yourself

• Your internet speed test result from Speedtest by Ookla



::Note::

Your application will be ignored if these requirements are not submitted.



• Please apply only if you are willing and able to work this schedule

title: Senior Developer — Part-Time Code Reviewer & Architecture Advisor
description:
Rate: $10–13/hr (starting), with raise to $15/hr at 90 days based on performance

  Hours: 10 hrs/week (~43 hrs/month), mostly async with 1-hour weekly sync call

  Company: Pharmacy Pearls LLC — US-based pharmacy education company. We run a live LMS serving hundreds of pharmacists preparing for board exams (BCEMP, BCCCP, BCPS), an AI-powered

  medical research platform, and an AI podcast pipeline.



  ---



 Why this role exists

  We have two excellent full-stack developers who ship production features with Claude Code every day. They do great work — but no one is critically reviewing their code. We need a

  senior developer who will block bad PRs, catch architectural mistakes, and mentor the team. This is NOT a feature-coding role. You will review their work, propose architectural

  improvements, and make sure our platform doesn't collect tech debt or security holes.



  Think of it as the role a staff engineer or tech lead plays — but focused on review and advisory, not building.



  ---

  What you'll do (10 hrs/week)



  - Review 4–8 pull requests per week with actual line-level comments (not "LGTM")

  - Block PRs that aren't ready — enforce testing, security, and code-quality standards

  - 1-hour weekly sync call with the founder + 2 developers (Manila morning, your 8–10 AM)

  - Async architecture input on design docs before devs start coding

  - Monthly 1-page codebase health report (tech debt, risks, recommendations)

  - Answer ad-hoc async questions about security, DB design, auth patterns



  What you will NOT do



  - Write feature code (our devs handle that)

  - Own delivery timelines or sprint planning

  - Handle client communication or support



  ---

  Required skills



  - 8+ years full-stack JavaScript/TypeScript

  - React / Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL (production experience, not tutorials)

  - Daily Claude Code user — you must use Claude Code yourself. We'll ask to see your setup.

  - Code review experience — you have reviewed other developers' PRs and left line-level comments

  - Written English at C1/C2 level — your review comments must be clear and professional

  - Willingness to push back respectfully — if the founder proposes something bad, you say so



  Strongly preferred



  - AI/LLM integration experience (Claude API, RAG pipelines, vector databases)

  - Drizzle or Prisma ORM

  - Supabase, pgvector

  - Observability tools (BetterStack, Sentry, Datadog)

  - Testing discipline (Vitest, Jest, integration tests with real DBs)

  - Security mindset (OWASP familiarity, auth/session patterns)



  ---

  Our stack



  TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, PostgreSQL + Drizzle ORM, Supabase, pgvector, Tailwind CSS, BetterStack, Stripe, ClickUp, WordPress (legacy), Claude API, Voyage AI, OpenAI,

  Cartesia TTS



  ---

  How to apply



  To be considered, include ALL of the following in your application. Applications missing any item will be skipped.



  1. Your Claude Code workflow — screenshot of your CLAUDE.md file or a ~/.claude/ directory listing. When do you use Opus vs Sonnet vs Haiku? What slash commands or skills have you

  created?

  2. A link to one pull request you reviewed where you left at least 5 line-level comments that were not just approvals. If the repo is private, share a redacted screenshot.

  3. Answer this in 200 words or less:

  "A junior developer on the team opens a 170-file pull request that mixes three unrelated features — a dashboard, a notification system, and a database migration. All tests pass. The

  founder wants it shipped this week. What do you do?"

  4. Your rate preference between $10/hr and $14/hr, and why you'd accept a part-time retainer vs. a full-time gig.

  5. Years of React/Node/TypeScript/PostgreSQL experience — specific numbers per stack.



  ---

  Red flags that will get your application skipped



  - Generic "I am hardworking and detail-oriented" cover letters

  - No Claude Code evidence

  - "LGTM" as your concept of a real code review

  - Inflated experience claims (listing "5 years React" with a LinkedIn showing you started it last year)

  - Asking to write feature code "to help"



  ---

  What to expect if shortlisted



  - 30-minute video interview (we will ask you to share your screen and show Claude Code in action)

  - Paid 1-hour code review trial ($20) — you review a real PR from our codebase and leave written comments

  - If the trial goes well, we start immediately with a 2-week probation period



  Response time: We reply to all qualified applicants within 3 business days. We typically receive 100+ applications within 48 hours, so please make yours specific.



  Looking forward to meeting you.

description:

title: Construction Admin VA (Remote)
description:
IMPORTANT: READ BEFORE APPLYING

We are only considering candidates with real construction project management experience (commercial preferred). If you do not have this experience, please do not apply.



About the Role

We are hiring a full-time Construction Admin Virtual Assistant to support commercial tenant improvement (TI) projects ranging from 5,000 to 10,000 square feet. This role supports the full project lifecycle, from pre-acquisition through Certificate of Occupancy and final handoff.



You will work closely with general contractors, subcontractors, lenders, and city officials to ensure projects stay organized, on schedule, and compliant.



What You’ll Be Doing

In this role, you will be responsible for managing RFPs and contractor bidding by creating scopes of work, handling multiple bids per trade, building comparison sheets, and verifying contractor compliance documents such as COIs and W-9s.



You will also oversee budgeting and draw management, including maintaining monthly draw schedules, reviewing AIA G702 pay applications, collecting lien waivers, coordinating with construction lenders, tracking budgets, and processing change orders.



A key part of your role will involve coordinating with general contractors and subcontractors by maintaining project schedules, tracking daily logs and trade sequencing, and managing punch lists to ensure smooth project execution.



You will support city and municipality coordination by conducting zoning research, assisting with permit submissions, tracking approvals, and scheduling inspections.



Additionally, you will handle documentation and administrative tasks such as organizing Google Drive folders, maintaining compliance trackers, providing weekly project updates, and updating SOPs as processes evolve.



Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

We are looking for someone with proven construction project management experience, preferably in commercial tenant improvement projects. You must be familiar with AIA G702 pay applications and lien waivers and have daily working experience using ClickUp, Slack, Google Drive, and AI tools such as ChatGPT or Claude.



Strong English communication skills, both written and verbal, are required, along with a high level of organization and attention to detail to manage strict deadlines and documentation standards.



Schedule & Compensation

This is a full-time role, Monday through Friday from 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM CST. The pay ranges from $12 to $14 per hour, with a $1,000 bonus for each successfully completed project. You will also receive 10 PTO days per year.



How to Apply:

To apply, please attach your updated resume(PDF) and a 1–2 minute voice recording introducing yourself and your construction experience.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Position Overview



In2HR&Talent is seeking a detail-oriented Executive Assistant to support the CEO and Head of Growth and Client Services with internal operations and client work through strong systems management and coordination. This role is ideal for someone who thrives on organization, process efficiency, and keeping multiple platforms and workflows running smoothly.



Key Responsibilities



Systems & Operations Management

Manage and maintain internal and client systems, ensuring data accuracy and organization

Support platforms such as HRIS, timekeeping, and communication tools

Perform system audits, clean-up, and process improvements

Track tasks, deadlines, and workflows across teams



Administrative & Executive Support

Coordinate calendars, meetings, and communications for leadership

Prepare and manage documents, reports, and records

Support inbox management and follow-ups

title: UK Company Hiring: US Cold Callers
description:
We are a *UK based company* expanding our sales team and hiring *100 Filipino cold callers this week* to call the US market.

Cold calling US business owners to invite them first to a FREE event in their area to join the local Start Over Movement business chapter - which will bring them referral leads, sales and marketing strategies from the world leaders in creating marketing and sales strategies

Fixed weekends off.

3. Your own PC or laptop + noise-cancelling headset + stable 10mbps+ internet

4. Quiet work-from-home setup and able to work 9AM-7PM Mississippi Time

5. Available to start training THIS WEEK



*This Role Is NOT For You If:*

- You require a guaranteed base salary or hourly pay

- You are not comfortable with rejection or a sales environment

- You cannot commit to full-time US day hours



*How to Apply - Book Your Spot Now:*

/meeting/register/FEDFiFtQRvyU07HgrIatLw

We are filling 100 seats and will close applications once filled. Hiring decisions made same day.

No benefits, 13th month, or government contributions are provided. No fees will ever be charged to apply or work. By applying you confirm you understand this is 100% performance-based pay.

title: Sales Support Virtual Assistant – Bullpen Team (Promotional Products / Branded Merch)
description:
About the Role

We are looking for a dependable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to provide dedicated selling support to two members of our Bullpen sales team. Our company operates in the promotional products and branded merchandise (swag) industry. You will act as the behind-the-scenes operational backbone, primarily handling order management and sales-administration tasks inside our core platform, commonsku.



This role is not client-facing at the start, but may evolve to include light client communication as you grow with the team. The goal is simple: keep the sales team focused on selling while you make sure every order, quote, and follow-up runs smoothly and accurately.



Key Responsibilities

- Create, update, and manage purchase orders (POs), sales orders, and production timelines inside commonsku

- Accurately enter and maintain customer data, product details, artwork, and order specifications

- Track orders from quote ? PO ? production ? delivery; proactively follow up with suppliers/vendors

- Prepare and format quotes, order confirmations, and supporting documents

- Keep CRM records clean and up-to-date; run basic sales reports when requested

- Handle day-to-day sales admin 
 organization, file management, data entry, calendar coordination)

- Assist with product research, supplier sourcing, or any ad-hoc requests from the two supported sales reps

- Help document and improve repeatable processes to make the Bullpen team more efficient



Required Skills & Qualifications

- 1+ years of experience as a Virtual Assistant, sales support, order processor, or administrative assistant

- Strong familiarity with order-management or CRM platforms (experience with commonsku is a big plus, but we will provide full training)

- Excellent written and spoken English

- Extremely detail-oriented with strong organizational and multitasking skills

- Proficient in Microsoft 365

- Reliable high-speed internet, quiet workspace, and a modern computer setup

- Self-motivated, proactive, and comfortable working independently with minimal daily supervision

- Ability to work in a US time-zone overlap 



Preferred (but not required)

- Previous experience in the promotional products, branded merchandise, or e-commerce/swag industry

- Comfortable transitioning into occasional client-facing tasks 
s, status updates) in the future



What We Offer

- Competitive hourly or monthly rate (commensurate with experience)

- Paid training on commonsku and our internal processes

- Opportunity for long-term growth and increased responsibility (including client interaction)

- Direct support to only two sales professionals — focused, low-chaos role

- Collaborative, supportive team environment



If you thrive on accuracy, enjoy making complex order workflows run like clockwork, and want to be a key player in a growing promotional products company, we’d love to hear from you.



To Apply Please send your resume + a short note (or 1-minute video) telling us:

- Your experience with order management / CRM systems

- Why you’re interested in the promotional products industry

- Your availability for US time-zone overlap



We review applications quickly and will move fast with the right candidate. Looking forward to welcoming you to the Bullpen team!

Profile with achievements and trust level progress

Session setup (class name, app selection)

Session management (start/end)

Implement Firebase Authentication

Handle offline mode with local Room database

Work with our Lead Developer on architecture decisions

Required Skills:

Experience with Jetpack Compose OR Android XML layouts

Firebase Firestore and Firebase Auth integration

RESTful API integration

Git version control

Good English communication (written and verbal)

Published at least 1 app to Google Play Store

Bonus Skills (Not Required):

Experience with Room database

Background services / WorkManager

Push notifications (Firebase Cloud Messaging)

UI/UX design sense

Experience with EdTech or school apps

etings at 9:30 AM CST)

Accuracy over speed.



How to Apply (Important)



Include **all** of the following:



1. Number of monitors you use **with a photo**

2. A short example of a repetitive task you’ve done well

3. The phrase **“Accuracy over speed”** in your message



Applications that don’t follow instructions will not be reviewed.



Subject line: PT- LEAD

title: Graphic Designer
description:
GRAPHIC DESIGNER: FAST-TURN CREATIVE ASSETS

Full-time / Part-time | 20–40 hrs/week | Remote | Long-term Relationship



WE MOVE FAST.

If you thrive under tight deadlines and can produce polished work quickly, this role was built for you.



ABOUT US

We're a marketing agency called Motive (
) serving personal brands. We handle social media, video, podcasts, ads, slide decks, keynote presentations, and web projects for a range of high-profile clients, and we need a graphic designer who can keep up with our growth.



This is a long-term position. We're not looking for a one-off freelancer. We want someone who becomes a trusted part of our creative team and grows with us.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

- Design social media graphics, story templates, carousels, and branded content, often within same-day turnaround.

- Create thumbnails, event graphics, promotional materials, and presentation assets.

- Resize and adapt existing assets across multiple platforms and formats quickly.

- Maintain brand consistency across multiple client accounts simultaneously.

- Receive feedback and revise assets fast. We often need a second version within an hour.

- Organize and manage design files in shared folders so the team can always find what they need.

- Collaborate directly with our team via Slack throughout your day.



MUST-HAVES



Tools:

- Adobe Photoshop & Illustrator

- Adobe InDesign (a plus)

- Google Drive or Dropbox file management



Skills & traits:

- Strong typography and layout sense

- Excellent English comprehension

- Comfortable receiving fast, direct feedback

- Available during US Central Time hours



WHAT SETS THE RIGHT PERSON APART



We're not looking for the most technically advanced designer. We're looking for someone who is fast, reliable, and easy to work with. You take direction well, ask clarifying questions upfront, and don't disappear when things get busy. You know how to work across multiple brand styles without blending them together.



Experience in faith-based, nonprofit, or speaker/coaching content is a bonus, but not required.



POSITION DETAILS:

Hours: 20–40 hrs/week (flexible based on workload)

Type: Long-term, ongoing

Timezone: Must have strong overlap with US Central Time (CST)

Communication: Slack. Responsive during work hours if possible.

Portfolio: Required. Link in your application.



HOW TO APPLY:

Include a link to your portfolio or samples of recent work. In the first line of your message, write "Graphic Designer: I read the full post". This tells us you pay attention to details. Bonus: share one project you're especially proud of and what made it challenging.

title: Video Editor (PHP 358/HR - USD $6/HR | PART Time)
description:
Hey!



We are looking for a Video Editor ROCKSTAR who will turn our long form content into high-performing short form clips and weekly YouTube videos.



We are a marketing and education company that works with English speakers and already have a team of high-performing individuals from the Philippines. Mastery of the English language is a requirement and will be tested prior to hiring.



BENEFITS INCLUDE:

- 100% remote

- Weekly pay

- USD $6 / Hour = 350 PHP / Hour

- Paid training

- No work during the weekends

- Opportunity to go from part time to full time

- We pay for the AI and creative tools you will use (Adobe, Descript, Opus Clip, Canva Pro)

- Grow with a team that values initiative, speed, and high standards



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



Short form (main focus):

- Take long form content (webinars, trainings, YouTube videos, podcasts) and turn it into short form clips for Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn

- Add attention-grabbing hooks, captions, emojis, B-roll, overlays, and pattern interrupts

- Create short testimonial videos from coaching calls, client interviews, and other raw footage

- Organize and manage video assets so clips are easy to find and reuse



Long form & channel support:

- Edit 1 piece of long form content per week (highlight key 
nts, add B-roll, overlays, and graphics)

- Publish that long form video on YouTube (upload, title, description, tags, end screens, cards)

- Create and upload custom YouTube thumbnails that drive clicks

- Handle one-off editing requests as needed (simple promos, clips, intros/outros, etc.)

- Analyze performance of published videos in YouTube Studio (CTR, views, watch time, retention) and provide simple reports and recommendations



Collaboration & cadence:

- Meet once a week with the owner of the company for feedback, direction, and priorities

- Join 1 monthly content planning session with the team

- Use AI tools (that we pay for) to speed up editing, transcription, captioning, and repurposing while still polishing by hand



Expected volume (part-time ~20 hours per week):

- 20–30 finished short form clips per week (30–90 seconds each)

- 1 edited and published long form YouTube video per week

- Ongoing testimonial edits and one-off requests as needed



WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR:



Experience & portfolio:

- Proven experience editing short form content from long form videos

- Strong portfolio showing:

Before/after edits from long form to short form

YouTube videos you have edited and thumbnails you have designed

Short testimonial / social proof videos (a plus)



Tool competence (we provide licenses):

You will work daily inside:

- Adobe Premiere Pro (primary editor)

- Basic Adobe After Effects (simple animations, lower thirds, transitions)

- Descript (transcription, rough cuts, repurposing)

- Opus Clip (AI clipping & short-form ideas)

- Canva Pro (YouTube thumbnails & simple graphics)

- YouTube Studio (publishing & analytics)

- Google Drive, Google Docs/Sheets (file management, tracking)

- ClickUp (task management)

- Slack (communication)



You don’t need to be a master of every tool on day one, but you must already be strong in at least one pro editor (Premiere / Final Cut / DaVinci) and be able to learn the rest quickly.

Having experience with video editing is a requirement to be considered for this role.

We will ask you what your favorite dog breed is, answer chowchow in your application so we know you have read the full job posting.

We will start with relatively limited hours (around 20 hours per week to begin) with the opportunity for it to grow as our relationship develops.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Mastery of the English language (spoken and written)

- Strong project management skills and ability to hit volume targets consistently

- Comfortable reviewing analytics and making basic performance recommendations

- Quiet environment to work



TECH REQUIREMENTS (MINIMUM):

- Computer: Windows 10/11 PC or Mac (released within the last 4–5 years)

CPU: Intel i7 / Ryzen 7 / Apple M1 or better (or equivalent)

RAM: Minimum 16 GB (32 GB strongly preferred)

Storage: At least 512 GB SSD, with 150+ GB free for active projects

GPU: Dedicated graphics card with 4 GB VRAM or more (e.g., NVIDIA GTX 1660 / RTX series or equivalent). For Mac, M1/M2 with integrated GPU is fine.



- Software capability:

Must be able to run Adobe Premiere Pro / After Effects smoothly while having multiple Chrome tabs, cloud drives, and AI tools (Descript / Opus Clip / etc.) open.



-High Speed Internet: Stable enough for uploading/downloading large video files and live calls without interruption

Reliable backup option (mobile data or secondary ISP) is a plus



- Other:

Quality headphones and microphone for edit reviews and team calls

Quiet, dedicated workspace suitable for focused editing work



If your current setup struggles with Adobe Premiere or AI tools like Descript / Opus Clip, please upgrade first before applying. This role requires fast, reliable hardware to hit our weekly volume targets.



SCHEDULE:

You must be available to work 4 hours per day, following this schedule: 3 PM – 7 PM Philippines time.



You must APPLY with this link:

title: Facebook Ads Manager — Chess Academy (Part-Time, Growth Role)

 & Instagram Ads Manager to help us fill our classes with new students. This is a part-time role to start, with real growth potential as we scale.

Ad creatives are handled — you focus purely on strategy, targeting, and optimization

A clear, motivated team behind you

Real experience running
/Instagram lead generation campaigns

Self-starter who takes ownership, not someone who needs hand-holding

Path to $15–20/hour as results are proven — within 2026

Potential to grow into a full-time role as the academy expands



To apply, please complete our short screening form here: 

Applications without the completed form will not be considered.

description:
We are a Hong Kong-based accounting firm currently seeking a dedicated full-time accounting professional to join our team.

You will be involved in a range of accounting functions, beginning with data entry, bookkeeping, payroll, inventory management, budgeting, and company secretarial duties, progressing to financial reporting and taxation compliance. Comprehensive online training will be provided upon employment to support your development in these tasks.

title: Growth Video Editor — Meta Ad Creatives (TikTok Sourcing + Editing)
description:
We're a fast-growing B2B SaaS company looking for a full-time Growth Video Editor to create high-performing Meta ad creatives. Your main job is sourcing viral/trending content from TikTok and editing it into scroll-stopping ad creatives that drive results on
 and Instagram.



This is an execution role — we'll provide creative direction and briefs, you produce the ads.



What You'll Do:



- Source trending and relevant video content from TikTok daily

- Edit and repurpose TikTok videos into Meta ad creatives (different hooks, formats, lengths)

- Create multiple ad variations for A/B testing (different hooks, CTAs, text overlays)

- Add captions, text overlays, transitions, and branded elements

- Resize and format videos for different Meta ad placements (Feed, Stories, Reels)

- Deliver a consistent volume of fresh creatives weekly (target: 15-20 ad variations/week)

- Organize and maintain a creative asset library



You're a Great Fit If You Have:



- 1+ years of experience editing short-form video content (TikTok, Reels, Meta ads)

- Proficiency in video editing tools (CapCut, Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

- Strong eye for what makes content engaging — hooks, pacing, text placement

- Understanding of Meta ad formats and specs (aspect ratios, safe zones, length best practices)

- Ability to turn around edits quickly — we move fast and test a lot

- Familiarity with TikTok trends, formats, and what's currently working in paid social



Bonus Points:



- Experience editing Meta/Facebook ad creatives specifically

- Basic motion graphics or animation skills (After Effects, CapCut templates)

- Understanding of direct response advertising (hooks that stop the scroll, CTAs that convert)

- Experience with thumbnail creation



Why Join Us:



- Fully remote — work from anywhere

- Creative work with real impact — your ads directly drive revenue

- Small, fast-moving team — lots of ownership, no bureaucracy

- Consistent workload with clear deliverables



To Apply:



Send us 2-3 examples of short-form video ads you've edited (TikTok repurposes, Meta ads, or similar). If you don't have ad-specific samples, send any short-form video edits that show your style — hooks, pacing, text overlays, transitions. We want to see your editing skills in action.

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT
description:
Executive Virtual Assistant -  Farm Girl - only apply if you have taken the tests : English must be C1 - IQ 120+ & 2 years + experience 



We’re looking for a highly organised, proactive and reliable Virtual Assistant to support the day-to-day running of Farm Girl.



This is a remote role, working closely with SJ and the on-site team, helping manage the backend of the business across admin, systems, communication and support.



Farm Girl is a busy wellness space with 7 therapists and one on-site admin lady, alongside Farm Girl Facial and additional wellness offerings. This role supports across all areas of the business and requires strong organisation, responsiveness and attention to detail.



About the Role

This is a varied support role focused on keeping the business running smoothly behind the scenes.

You will not be the main person managing the diaries, but you will act as a support and back-up to the on-site admin, helping ensure therapist schedules, bookings and client communication continue to run smoothly when needed.



You will need to be communicating with clients via WhatsApp and messaging, so it’s really important you can match our tone — warm, calm, professional and helpful.



You’ll also be expected to learn our booking system (Phorest), and over time become confident in running reports and identifying patterns — such as gaps in bookings, client retention and general trends — and flagging these back to SJ (founder)



Key Responsibilities

Admin & Operations



Supporting SJ with day-to-day admin and organisation

Managing general business admin across multiple areas

Assisting with urgent queries outside of on-site hours when needed



Diary & Booking Support (Back-Up)

Supporting the on-site admin with diary management when required

Reviewing the diary to understand therapist availability

Identifying gaps and flagging opportunities to fill appointments

Assisting with booking adjustments and client coordination

Sending consultation forms to clients if they haven't filled them in



Supporting Phorest backend (training provided)

Client Communication

Responding to WhatsApp messages where needed

Assisting with Instagra
ssages when required

Replying to Google reviews weekly

Ensuring all communication feels aligned with our brand (warm, thoughtful, professional)



Finance & Reporting Support

Maintaining a finance spreadsheet

Filing and organising invoices

Sending weekly invoices to the bookkeeper

Supporting with reporting through Phorest



Supplier & Stock Coordination

Monitoring stock levels and supporting retail product ordering

Placing orders with suppliers when required

Following up on deliveries and ensuring stock arrives on time

Liaising with suppliers regarding products, branding or any issues

Helping ensure the business is always well stocked and prepared



Digital Support

Managing Shopify listings

Uploading and organising content, including saving facial videos and assets



HR & Team Support

Logging sickness and updating records

Supporting rotas and team coordination

Keeping contracts and records organised



Farm Girl Facial - Training academy 

Supporting admin for training and courses

Assisting with onboarding



Events

Supporting admin for events and wellness sessions



We’re Looking For Someone Who:

Is highly organised and detail-oriented

Is very responsive and reliable

Communicates clearly and naturally (written English is very important)

Can match a warm, calm and professional tone when messaging clients

Is confident learning new systems (including booking systems like Phorest)

Is comfortable working with data and willing to learn how to run reports and identify trends

Is able to support and step in where needed, working alongside an on-site admin





Can manage multiple tasks across different areas of the business





Is able to work within UK business hours





Is available to support occasional urgent enquiries (including some Saturday mornings)





Has previous experience as a Virtual Assistant or similar role

title: Shopify Product Lister + AI Image Creator (GMC-Compliant Listings)
description:
We're an e-commerce company running multiple DTC Shopify brands jewelry, fasion niches. We're scaling fast and looking for a reliable, detail-obsessed product lister to join our team long-term.



What You'll Do



Create Shopify product listings that are fully Google Merchant Center (GMC) compliant — titles, descriptions, attributes, categories, all clean and correct.

Generate realistic AI fashion images using Freepik (and other tools) — images with real-looking models, proper lighting, and natural poses. No "AI-looking" images.

Use Claude and ChatGPT to work efficiently — writing descriptions, checking compliance, speeding up repetitive work.

Double-check every listing before marking it done. Mistakes cost us money and ad accounts.

Share ideas and feedback on how we can improve listings, visuals, and workflows. We want a teammate, not just a task-doer.





Must-Haves



Proven experience with Shopify product listings (please share examples).

Experience generating AI images with Freepik or similar tools — must be able to produce realistic fashion/product photography with models.

Detail-oriented to the point where you re-check your own work before submitting.

Comfortable using Claude and ChatGPT daily to work faster and smarter.

Familiarity with GMC policies and common disapproval reasons.

Reliable internet and ability to commit to consistent hours.





Schedule



First weeks (mandatory): Available 14:00–19:00 Philippine Time. Hours may extend depending on workload.

After onboarding: Schedule becomes more flexible once you're up to speed and delivering consistently.





Pay & Growth



Starting: $3/hour

Growth: up to $8/hour based on quality, speed, reliability, and the value you bring.

This is a long-term role. If you help us grow, we grow together — and your pay grows with us.





How to Apply Please send:



Examples of Shopify listings you've created (links preferred).

2–3 sample AI-generated fashion images with models that you made yourself (please specify the tool used).

A short note: which Shopify store or brand impresses you most right now, and why?

Your availability for the 14:00–19:00 PH window.

Applications without samples will not be reviewed.



To confirm you read this post carefully, start your message with the word "Carmen".

title: Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a creative and fast-paced YouTube Shorts Video Editor to join our team. Your main task will be to transform raw footage into engaging, high-retention short-form videos (15–60 seconds) optimized for YouTube Shorts.



You will work on viral-style content, focusing on strong hooks, smooth cuts, captions, and dynamic editing to maximize watch time and engagement.



Responsibilities

Edit short-form videos for YouTube Shorts (vertical 9:16 format)

Cut, trim, and arrange clips into engaging stories

Add subtitles, sound effects, and background music

Create strong hooks in the first seconds to grab viewer attention

Use fast-paced editing, zooms, and transitions

Follow trends and adapt content for viral potential

Ensure videos are optimized for audience retention and engagement

Basic knowledge of sound design and captions

title: Senior Property Accountant
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Senior Property Accountant with deep, hands-on experience in short-term rental accounting (Airbnb, VRBO).



Key Responsibilities:

• Reconcile Airbnb & VRBO payouts to PMS and bank deposits (Stripe/PayPal)

• Record and audit gross bookings, host fees, cleaning fees, and platform commissions

• Handle deferred revenue, accruals, and revenue recognition per stay period

• Manage owner statements, payouts, and trust/liability accounts

• Perform monthly close, including journal entries, balance sheet reconciliations, and variance analysis

• Track and reconcile occupancy taxes, remittances, and platform-collected taxes

• Maintain clean chart of accounts aligned with STR operations

• Support financial reporting and property-level profitability analysis



Requirements:

• Proven experience in short-term rental / property management accounting (Airbnb, VRBO required)

• Strong proficiency in QuickBooks Online

• Experience with PMS systems (Guesty, Hostaway, etc.)

• Familiarity with tools such as 
, Ramp, RHO, Track, Expensify

• Solid understanding of multi-entity, trust accounting, and OTA integrations

• Advanced Excel skills (recs, tie-outs, large data sets)



Schedule: Full-time, US hours



Please do NOT apply if you have no experience in property accounting.



Send a link to your resume and relevant experience.



What We Offer

• 13th month pay

• HMO coverage

• Paid holidays

• Paid time off (PTO)

• Remote setup

title: AI Creative Asset Specialist
description:
Ubiquity Media is looking for a Senior AI Creative Asset Specialist to own the end-to-end generation of scalable creative assets for a single DTC brand, Pawty Dog Toys. This person will be responsible for producing and refining AI-assisted UGC-style content, static lifestyle imagery, short-form video, and campaign-ready creative assets that support paid social, organic social, e-commerce,
, landing pages, and internal brand initiatives.



This is a hands-on production role for someone who combines strong prompting and AI workflow skills with excellent creative judgment, channel awareness, pop-culture awareness and production discipline. The right candidate knows how to move quickly, generate at volume, and maintain a high standard of taste and consistency. They also understand how to prepare assets so they are immediately usable by growth, design, and editing teams across digital channels.



This person will help build a repeatable, efficient, and brand-safe content pipeline that allows Pawty to create more assets, test more creative concepts, and support growth without sacrificing quality.



Success in this role means producing high-quality, scalable creative assets that are immediately usable across Pawty’s digital channels and flexible enough for downstream editing, testing, and iteration.



TL:DR of the role: part AI prompter + part creative producer + part asset operations manager + part DTC performance creative thinker



Qualifications



5+ years of experience in creative production, digital content, design, performance creative, or AI-assisted asset generation

Strong hands-on experience producing assets with AI tools for consumer brands, ecommerce, or paid social environments

Proven ability to generate UGC-style content, static imagery, and short-form video assets that are commercially usable

Strong prompt writing and prompt iteration skills across image, video, and copy workflows

Strong visual taste and judgment across composition, styling, realism, pacing, brand fit, and audience relevance

Experience adapting assets for digital marketing channels including Meta, TikTok,
, web, PDPs, and landing pages

Proficiency with post-production and creative-finishing tools such as Photoshop, Premiere, After Effects, CapCut, or similar

Ability to distinguish between concept-stage outputs and production-ready assets

Strong file organization, version control, and asset management habits

Excellent communication skills with the ability to interpret briefs and turn ambiguous direction into strong creative output

Highly organized, self-directed, and output-oriented



Additional “Nice-to-have” Qualifications

Prior graphic design, photography, videography experience.

Experience preparing assets for paid social, ecommerce, web,
, and organic social specifications

Understanding of safe zones, aspect ratios, compression, file types, cutdown needs, and modular asset delivery

Ability to deliver assets in a way that allows designers, editors, and media buyers to easily repurpose or iterate on them



Qualifications

5+ years of experience in creative production, digital content, design, performance creative, or AI-assisted asset generation

Strong hands-on experience producing assets with AI tools for consumer brands, ecommerce, or paid social environments

Proven ability to generate UGC-style content, static imagery, and short-form video assets that are commercially usable

Strong prompt writing and prompt iteration skills across image, video, and copy workflows

Strong visual taste and judgment across composition, styling, realism, pacing, brand fit, and audience relevance

Experience adapting assets for digital marketing channels including Meta, TikTok,
, web, PDPs, and landing pages

Proficiency with post-production and creative-finishing tools such as Photoshop, Premiere, After Effects, CapCut, or similar

Ability to distinguish between concept-stage outputs and production-ready assets

Strong file organization, version control, and asset management habits

Excellent communication skills with the ability to interpret briefs and turn ambiguous direction into strong creative output

Highly organized, self-directed, and output-oriented



If you are interested, please apply.

description:

title: Facebook Ads Video Editor
description:
Ji Martial Arts is a premium martial arts performance brand founded by brothers Joshua and Joel Iyalla — elite martial artists with over 35 years of combined experience and a combined following of 3.5 million across social media. Our founder Joshua Iyalla holds three Guinness World Records including the world's fastest puncher. UFC fighter Michael "Venom" Page uses and endorses our product.

We are full-time content creators with over 10 years of combined experience in the industry. We understand content deeply and know exactly what we want. We need an editor who shares that same understanding — someone who can take our vision and bring it to life on screen with precision and creativity.

We are hiring a part-time
 Ads Video Editor to produce high-converting ad creatives for our flagship product — the Ji Full Body Resistance Band — and future products as we scale.

What the role looks like week to week:

This is a lean, structured role with predictable hours. You will work primarily on Mondays (6 hours) to source clips, edit all ads for the week, and deliver them for review. You will also attend a short tea
eting on Fridays (1 hour). If revisions are needed following review, you may be required for up to 2 additional hours on Tuesday. Total hours: 7–9 hours per week.

Growth potential:

This role starts part-time, but that will not stay the case for long. As Ji Martial Arts scales — increasing ad volume, launching new products, and expanding into new content — the demand for editing will grow fast. The right person will find their hours and responsibilities increasing naturally with the brand. For the editor who performs, full-time is a very realistic outcome.

What you will do:



Receive ad scripts via Slack every Monday and edit 3–5
 ad creatives per week

Source your own clips from our Airtable raw clips library

Generate AI voiceovers using ElevenLabs where required

Apply your own creative judgement on music, SFX, pacing, and visual effects

Log all clips used in Airtable after each edit

Upload finished edits to Google Drive following our naming convention

Move cards through our Notion pipeline at each stage

Attend a weekly tea
eting on Fridays

Action revision feedback when required



What we need from you:



Proven experience editing
 or Instagram ads specifically — not just organic content. A portfolio is required; applications without one will not be reviewed

Proficiency in CapCut — this is mandatory, not optional

A strong creative eye with the ability to match a premium, cinematic aesthetic

Familiarity with Airtable and Notion, or the ability to get up to speed quickly

Reliability — you hit deadlines and communicate proactively

Self-sufficient — you do not need to be hand-held through every task



This role is NOT for you if:



You have never edited a paid ad

You are not proficient in CapCut

You need every asset handed to you before you start

You cannot commit to Monday as your primary working day



To apply, complete our application form here: 

Applications without a portfolio of ad work will not be reviewed.

Marieke

title: Full-Time Marketing Assistant (Local SEO, Reviews, and Systems) – Detail-Oriented + Smart Problem Solver
description:
FULL-TIME MARKETING ASSISTANT (LOCAL SEO, REVIEWS, SYSTEMS)



ABOUT US:



We are Breakthrough Basketball, a well-established basketball training company that runs camps and programs across the United States.



We serve thousands of players and families each year and are focused on improving our local online presence across hundreds of locations.



ABOUT THE ROLE:



We are hiring a full-time marketing assistant to help manage and improve our local online presence.



This role starts with execution (following systems and checklists), but will grow into owning projects and improving processes over time.



You do NOT need to be an expert.



But you DO need to be:



* detail-oriented

* reliable

* a good communicator

* able to figure things out



WHAT YOU WILL DO:



* manage and optimize Google Business Profiles (GBP)

* help generate and track customer reviews

* update listings, citations, and business information

* follow step-by-step SEO and marketing processes

* monitor rankings and report changes

* help improve systems over time (after training)



We have written systems and instructions for you to follow and complete the above tasks. 



IMPORTANT:



This is NOT just a task-following job.



We want someone who:



* pays attention to detail

* takes ownership over time

* notices problems and helps solve them



REQUIREMENTS:



* excellent written and spoken English

* strong attention to detail (VERY important)

* reliable and consistent

* able to follow instructions exactly

* comfortable learning new tools and systems

* available full-time (40 hrs/week, Mon-Fri)



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED):



* experience with SEO, Google Business Profile, or marketing

* experience with spreadsheets or tracking data

* past marketing or admin experience



COMPENSATION:



* $5 to $8 per hour depending on experience

* full-time (40 hours per week)



APPLICATION INSTRUCTIONS (READ CAREFULLY):



To be considered, you MUST follow ALL steps below.



STEP 1:

At the TOP of your application, write this exact phrase:



Breakthrough Basketball - Detail Matters



STEP 2:

Record a short video (2 to 4 minutes) and include the link.



In your video, answer:

1) Tell me about yourself and your work experience

2) Why are you a good fit for this role

3) Describe a time you had to follow detailed instructions



STEP 3:

Answer this question in writing:



If you were asked to double-check 50 business listings for accuracy, what steps would you take to make sure nothing is missed?



STEP 4:

Confirm this statement:



I am available full-time (40 hours per week) and can work consistently Monday through Friday.



IMPORTANT:



Applications that do NOT follow these instructions will NOT be considered.
